AI 科学周报

AI × Science 周报 2026-05-04 → 2026-05-10

参考 CloudFlare-AI-Insight-Daily 的资讯编排，将一周内 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献整理为总览、交叉重点、专题速览与期刊分布。

轨道角动量输运（轨道力矩、轨道-磁振子耦合）成为低功耗自旋电子学新兴范式；交错磁性材料探索从单一半金属向拓扑相、谷电子学及多场调控扩展；二维范德华磁电异质结构实现光电读写与电控磁相变。AI/ML方面，基础模型互操作性（柏拉图表征假说验证）与物理信息神经网络架构创新（函数空间扩散、无受力MD）显著推进，自主实验闭环与跨尺度建模成为材料发现核心方向。

核心方向 本周总览 交叉研究 磁性/铁电 AI专题 期刊分布
🎯

本周核心方向（ML × ferro / 凝聚态）

7 篇

新材料方面，HZO铁电薄膜通过无监督ML实现晶圆级Pr预测，K-Means聚类界定性能类别；可重构等离激元斯格明子器件以PIN二极管动态调控，结合CNN达98.33%识别率。新方法上，深度核高斯过程稀疏变分推断（DKL-SVGP）仅需10%数据即可匹配全数据NN光谱预测，尾部保真度更优；全从头算自旋-晶格动力学框架集成VASP，自洽约束矩密度泛函计算力与磁场，BiFeO₃能量MAE较随机训练降约一个数量级；旋量场构型法从单图预测欧拉示性数，无监督学习手性磁纹理。新现象中，平带莫尔材料味铁磁性源于量子几何偶极这一拓扑量；混沌XXZ链中，c²严格保微观可逆，γ与动力学系数经时间粗粒化涌现为不可逆耗散，揭示观测者分辨率在宏观摩擦起源中的角色。

  1. 01
    基于无监督机器学习的晶圆级Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂铁电薄膜电容器变异性分析与性能预测框架
    An Unsupervised Machine Learning-based Framework for Wafer Scale Variability Analysis and Performance Prediction of Ferroelectric Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 Thin Film Capacitors
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作针对铁电Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂（HZO）电容器因敏感结晶动力学导致的晶圆级器件间非均匀性问题，提出了无监督机器学习框架。利用主成分分析（PCA）和K-Means聚类分析芯片内器件间（D2D）性能变异，并基于多芯片数据构建超越传统描述统计的预测性"虚拟量测"方法，以剩余极化（Pr）等关键参数定义性能类别。该框架可高效预测"未见"芯片的性能，为HZO铁电存储器的高量产制造提供了新途径。

    📐 方法要点：PCA+K-Means无监督聚类分析芯片内D2D变异，构建多芯片虚拟量测预测未见芯片Pr值。

    🔗 相关工作关联：超越传统描述统计，解决HZO铁电存储器量产中结晶动力学敏感导致的晶圆级非均匀性瓶颈。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为FeFET/FRAM等HZO基器件的高良率制造提供晶圆级性能预判与工艺优化入口。

    阅读原文 ↗
  2. 02
    可重构斯格明子器件用于通信与传感应用
    A reconfigurable skyrmion device for communications and sensing applications
    🎯 核心📖 Nature Electronics

    📄 摘要：一种可编程拓扑平台，利用八个正-本征-负（PIN）二极管动态调控等离激元斯格明子。该器件在嘈杂环境中实现稳健的无线通信，并与卷积神经网络结合后，以98.33%的准确率识别物体。 Shen, Y. 等. 光学斯格明子与光的其他拓扑准粒子. Nat. Photon. 18, 15–25 (2024). 综述了多种物理体系中的光学斯格明子。 ArticleGoogle Scholar Fert, A., Reyren, N. & Cros, V. 磁性斯格明子：物理学进展与潜在应用. Nat. Rev. Mater. 2, 17031 (2017). 该综述讨论了磁性斯格明子的物理、稳定机制及赛道存储器的早期方案。 ArticleGoogle Scholar Tsesses, S. 等. 消逝电磁场中的光学斯格明子晶格. Science 361, 993–996 (2018). 报道了消逝电磁场中光学斯格明子晶格的实验实现，为近场拓扑光子学提供了平台。 ArticleGoogle Scholar Yang, J. 等. 对称保护型赝局域表面等离激元斯格明子. Laser Photon. Rev. 16, 2200007 (2022). 报道了利用赝局域表面等离激元在微波频段产生电磁斯格明子。 ArticleGoogle Scholar Cui, T. J. 等. 编码超材料、数字超材料与可编程超材料. Light Sci. Appl. 3, e218 (2014). 提出并实验验证了编码超材料、数字超材料和可编程超材料。 ArticleGoogle Scholar 下载参考文献 出版者声明 Springer Nature 对出版地图和机构隶属关系中的管辖权主张保持中立。 本文摘要自：Chen, L. 等. 用于通信与传感的可编程斯格明子. Nat. Electron. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41928-026-01611-6 (2026). 转载与许可 用于通信与传感应用的可重构斯格明子器件. Nat Electron (2026). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41928-026-01612-5 下载引用信息 发表日期：2026年5月6日 最终版本日期：2026年5月6日 DOI：https://doi.org/10.1038/s41928-026-01612-5 您与任何人分享以下链接，对方均可阅读此内容：抱歉，本文目前暂无可分享链接。 由 Springer Nature SharedIt 内容共享计划提供

    📐 方法要点：八个PIN二极管可编程调控等离激元斯格明子拓扑态，集成CNN实现环境鲁棒传感。

    🔗 相关工作关联：区别于磁性斯格明子赛道存储方案，拓展至光学斯格明子通信与智能感知交叉领域。

    💡 对你方向的启示：拓扑保护的等离激元态为嘈杂环境下无线通信与边缘智能识别提供硬件新范式。

    阅读原文 ↗
  3. 03
    利用机器学习预测欧拉示性数并构造拓扑结构
    Predicting Euler Characteristics and Constructing Topological Structure Using Machine Learning Techniques
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该研究提出一种从单张几何图像中提取拓扑性质（特别是欧拉示性数）的新方法，无需依赖大规模预存数据集。受固体物理启发，模型将图像解释为由旋量场构型，通过计算斯格明子数来预测欧拉示性数。网络能够在没有真实手性自旋构型监督的情况下自发学习构建手性磁纹理。为进一步约束生成自旋构型的自由度，研究引入了包含交换相互作用、Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用和各向异性的磁性哈密顿量进行优化。

    📐 方法要点：将图像映射为旋量场构型，以斯格明子数预测欧拉示性数，磁性哈密顿量约束生成自由度。

    🔗 相关工作关联：无需大规模预存数据集与真实手性自旋监督，区别于传统持久同调等拓扑数据分析。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为材料显微图像拓扑特征提取、自旋织构逆向设计提供轻量几何-物理融合工具。

    阅读原文 ↗
  4. 04
    量子几何偶极：平带中味铁磁性的拓扑增强机制
    Quantum-Geometric Dipole: A Topological Boost to Flavor Ferromagnetism in Flat Bands
    🎯 核心📖 Phys. Rev. Lett.

    📄 摘要：该研究指出，平带莫尔材料中鲁棒的味极化相源于一种鲜被关注的量子几何量——量子几何偶极。这一发现为理解平带体系中自发极化的微观起源提供了新的拓扑视角，拓展了量子几何在关联电子现象中的作用。

    📐 方法要点：识别量子几何偶极为平带味铁磁性的关键驱动量，建立拓扑-关联耦合新图像。

    🔗 相关工作关联：超越传统Stoner判据与量子度量张量框架，补充莫尔平带自发极化的微观机制。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为调控转角石墨烯、TMD同质结等体系的平带铁磁序提供几何量设计靶点。

    阅读原文 ↗
  5. 05
    磁性材料的全从头算自旋-晶格动力学框架
    A Fully Ab-Initio Spin-Lattice Dynamics Framework for Magnetic Materials
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作提出了一套完全从头算的自旋-晶格动力学（SLD）方法，并集成于VASP软件中，可在每个时间步通过自洽约束矩密度泛函计算获得原子间力和有效磁场。该方法在涵盖铁磁、非共线及几何阻挫有序的四种材料上得到验证，均能从随机初始条件恢复正确的磁基态。SLD轨迹还为磁性机器学习势函数提供物理关联的训练数据，以BiFeO₃为例，相比随机自旋构型训练可将能量平均绝对误差降低约一个数量级。该框架为磁性材料有限温度自旋-晶格耦合现象提供了实用的第一性原理途径。

    📐 方法要点：约束矩密度泛函+VASP自洽计算原子力与有效磁场，SLD轨迹训练ML势。

    🔗 相关工作关联：区别于经验自旋模型与随机自旋构型训练，实现有限温度SLD全从头算。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为BiFeO₃等多铁材料自旋-晶格耦合热力学、磁相变动力学提供第一性原理模拟基础。

    阅读原文 ↗
  6. 06
    基于高斯过程的光谱函数数据高效代理模型：应用于t-t'-t''-J模型
    Data-efficient surrogate modeling of spectral functions using Gaussian processes: An application to the t-t'-t''-J model
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该研究发展了基于深度核高斯过程稀疏变分推断（DKL-SVGP）的光谱函数代理模型，仅需10%训练数据即可达到与全数据前馈神经网络相近的精度。在t-t'-t''-J模型上的测试表明，该方法对困难光谱具有更好的尾部保真度，并能准确恢复主导峰高。

    📐 方法要点：深度核高斯过程稀疏变分推断（DKL-SVGP），小样本学习谱函数。

    🔗 相关工作关联：较全数据前馈NN数据效率提升10倍，尾部与峰高保真度优于标准代理模型。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为DMFT、QMC等昂贵数值方法的光谱输出加速提供数据高效替代方案。

    阅读原文 ↗
  7. 07
    数据驱动Liouvillian提取揭示量子自旋链宏观摩擦的时间粗粒化起源
    Temporal Coarse-Graining as the Origin of Macroscopic Friction in Quantum Spin Chains via Data-Driven Liouvillian Extraction
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作提出基于广义扩展动态模态分解（gEDMD）与Mori-Zwanzig投影的全数据驱动框架，从混沌XXZ自旋链中提取Navier-Stokes流体动力学系数。研究发现力学弹性系数c²严格源于幺正动力学保持微观可逆性，而宏观摩擦γ与动力学系数则通过时间粗粒化尺度涌现为不可逆的耗散项，阐明了观测者时间分辨率在从可逆微观动力学涌现宏观不可逆流体中的关键作用。

    📐 方法要点：gEDMD+Mori-Zwanzig投影提取Liouvillian，数据驱动辨识Navier-Stokes系数。

    🔗 相关工作关联：从混沌XXZ链严格区分幺正可逆弹性项与粗粒化涌现不可逆摩擦项。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为量子多体系统宏观流体力学涌现、不可逆性起源提供时间尺度解析的严格框架。

    阅读原文 ↗
01

本周总览#

先把握一周的主线，再进入交叉重点与专题全文速览。

整体概览

本周132篇铁电/磁性文献涵盖轨道力矩磁化翻转、交错磁性新机制、拓扑磁子学、二维磁电耦合及多场调控等前沿方向。AI/ML领域171篇聚焦机器学习原子间势、物理信息神经网络、量子机器学习及材料逆向设计，其中基础模型互操作性与自主实验闭环成为突出主题。

趋势观察

轨道角动量输运（轨道力矩、轨道-磁振子耦合）成为低功耗自旋电子学新兴范式；交错磁性材料探索从单一半金属向拓扑相、谷电子学及多场调控扩展；二维范德华磁电异质结构实现光电读写与电控磁相变。AI/ML方面，基础模型互操作性（柏拉图表征假说验证）与物理信息神经网络架构创新（函数空间扩散、无受力MD）显著推进，自主实验闭环与跨尺度建模成为材料发现核心方向。

后续展望

轨道电子学与磁振子学的直接耦合有望催生新型信息处理架构；交错磁性的拓扑与输运表征需发展更直接实验探针。AI驱动材料发现需解决合成可执行性与模型可信度量化，从结构预测向协议-性质-合成一体化闭环演进。

  • [arXiv]该工作突破传统认知框架，揭示圆偏振光可在非磁性中心对称体系中诱导偶宇称自旋劈裂，其对称性由轨道角动量量子数决定，实现s/d/g波自旋纹理。这一发现架起了相对论与非…

02

交叉研究#

优先覆盖 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料的直接交叉工作。

01

可重构斯格明子器件用于通信与传感应用#

A reconfigurable skyrmion device for communications and sensing applications
📚 Nature Electronics📅 2026-05-06⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次将PIN二极管阵列与等离激元斯格明子结合，实现拓扑态的电动态重构，突破了传统光学斯格明子不可调控的瓶颈；其抗噪通信与高精度神经形态感知功能，为拓扑光子学走向实用化提供了可编程硬件范式。
一种可编程拓扑平台，利用八个正-本征-负（PIN）二极管动态调控等离激元斯格明子。该器件在嘈杂环境中实现稳健的无线通信，并与卷积神经网络结合后，以98.33%的准确率识别物体。 Shen, Y. 等. 光学斯格明子与光的其他拓扑准粒子. Nat. Photon. 18, 15–25 (2024). 综述了多种物理体系中的光学斯格明子。 ArticleGoogle Scholar Fert, A., Reyren, N. & Cros,…

中文摘要

一种可编程拓扑平台，利用八个正-本征-负（PIN）二极管动态调控等离激元斯格明子。该器件在嘈杂环境中实现稳健的无线通信，并与卷积神经网络结合后，以98.33%的准确率识别物体。

Shen, Y. 等. 光学斯格明子与光的其他拓扑准粒子. Nat. Photon. 18, 15–25 (2024). 综述了多种物理体系中的光学斯格明子。 ArticleGoogle Scholar

Fert, A., Reyren, N. & Cros, V. 磁性斯格明子：物理学进展与潜在应用. Nat. Rev. Mater. 2, 17031 (2017). 该综述讨论了磁性斯格明子的物理、稳定机制及赛道存储器的早期方案。 ArticleGoogle Scholar

Tsesses, S. 等. 消逝电磁场中的光学斯格明子晶格. Science 361, 993–996 (2018). 报道了消逝电磁场中光学斯格明子晶格的实验实现，为近场拓扑光子学提供了平台。 ArticleGoogle Scholar

Yang, J. 等. 对称保护型赝局域表面等离激元斯格明子. Laser Photon. Rev. 16, 2200007 (2022). 报道了利用赝局域表面等离激元在微波频段产生电磁斯格明子。 ArticleGoogle Scholar

Cui, T. J. 等. 编码超材料、数字超材料与可编程超材料. Light Sci. Appl. 3, e218 (2014). 提出并实验验证了编码超材料、数字超材料和可编程超材料。 ArticleGoogle Scholar

English Abstract

A programmable topological platform is developed that uses eight positive–intrinsic–negative (PIN) diodes to dynamically control plasmonic skyrmions. This device achieves robust wireless communications in noisy environments and, when combined with a convolutional neural network, recognizes objects with 98.33% accuracy. Shen, Y. et al. Optical skyrmions and other topological quasiparticles of light.Nat. Photon.18, 15–25 (2024).A review of optical skyrmions across various physical systems. Mater.2, 17031 (2017).This review discusses the physics of magnetic skyrmions, their stabilization mechanisms and early proposals for racetrack memory applications. Optical skyrmion lattice in evanescent electromagnetic fields.Science361, 993–996 (2018).This paper reports the experimental realization of optical skyrmion lattices in evanescent electromagnetic fields, providing a platform for near-field topological photonics. Rev.16, 2200007 (2022).This paper reports the generation of electromagnetic skyrmions in the microwave frequency range using spoof localized surface plasmons. ArticleGoogle Scholar Cui, T. J. et al. 02

利用机器学习预测欧拉示性数并构造拓扑结构#

Predicting Euler Characteristics and Constructing Topological Structure Using Machine Learning Techniques
📚 arXiv👤 Gyunghun Yu (Department of Physics, Kyung Hee University, Seoul, South Korea), Seong Min Park (Department of Physics, Kyung Hee University, Seoul, South Korea), Han Gyu Yoon (Department of Physics, Kyung Hee University, Seoul, South Korea), Tae Jung Moon (Department of Physics, Kyung Hee University, Seoul, South Korea), Jun Woo Choi (Center for Spintronics, Korea Institute of Science and Technology, Seoul, South Korea), Hee Young Kwon (Center for Spintronics, Korea Institute of Science and Technology, Seoul, South Korea), Changyeon Won (Department of Physics, Kyung Hee University, Seoul, South Korea)📅 2026-05-06⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究的核心创新在于将固体物理中的旋量场-斯格明子框架迁移至图像拓扑分析，实现单图欧拉示性数的无监督预测，突破了传统方法对大数据集的依赖。其意义在于建立了物理启发的可解释机器学习范式，为拓扑材料表征、
该研究提出一种从单张几何图像中提取拓扑性质（特别是欧拉示性数）的新方法，无需依赖大规模预存数据集。受固体物理启发，模型将图像解释为由旋量场构型，通过计算斯格明子数来预测欧拉示性数。网络能够在没有真实手性自旋构型监督的情况下自发学习构建手性磁纹理。为进一步约束生成自旋构型的自由度，研究引入了包含交换相互作用、Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用和各向异性的磁性哈密顿量进行优化。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出一种从单张几何图像中提取拓扑性质（特别是欧拉示性数）的新方法，无需依赖大规模预存数据集。受固体物理启发，模型将图像解释为由旋量场构型，通过计算斯格明子数来预测欧拉示性数。网络能够在没有真实手性自旋构型监督的情况下自发学习构建手性磁纹理。为进一步约束生成自旋构型的自由度，研究引入了包含交换相互作用、Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用和各向异性的磁性哈密顿量进行优化。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02947v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This study proposes a novel approach to extract topological properties, specifically the Euler characteristic, from input images using neural networks without relying on large pre-existing datasets but with a single geometric image. Inspired by solid-state physics, where topological properties of magnetic structures are derived from spin field analysis, our model generates a unit vector field from an image, interpreted as a spin configuration. The Euler characteristic is then predicted by computing the skyrmion number of this generated spin configuration. Remarkably, the network learns to construct chiral magnetic textures without access to ground-truth chiral spin configurations, relying instead on only a single, simple geometric image and the straightforward skyrmion number computation. Furthermore, spin configurations generated by independently trained networks can be non-unique due to inherent degrees of freedom. To constrain these degrees of freedom and further refine the spin configuration, we incorporate a magnetic Hamiltonian, comprising exchange interaction, Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya (DM) interaction, and anisotropy, as an additional, physics-informed loss function. We validate the model's efficacy on complex geometrical shapes and demonstrate its applicability to practical tasks.

03

嵌入磁性杂质的薄膜储层计算#

Reservoir computing by thin film embedded with magnetic impurities
📚 arXiv👤 Shuto Kamakura, Tomi Ohtsuki, Jun-ichiro Ohe📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统磁性储层需空间分辨读出的限制，利用偶极-偶极相互作用的长程关联特性，将复杂空间信息编码为时间序列，仅需空间平均信号即可实现高精度手写识别，显著降低硬件实现门槛，为低成本、易集成的磁性神经
该工作数值研究了基于嵌入磁性杂质薄膜的储层计算，考虑长程偶极-偶极相互作用模拟磁化动力学并执行手写数字识别任务。尽管训练数据通过对样品空间平均获得，仍实现了高分类准确率，证明长程相互作用能有效将复杂空间输入模式编码到时间域，即使仅可获取空间平均输出。该系统为易于实现的磁性储层计算铺平了道路。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作数值研究了基于嵌入磁性杂质薄膜的储层计算，考虑长程偶极-偶极相互作用模拟磁化动力学并执行手写数字识别任务。尽管训练数据通过对样品空间平均获得，仍实现了高分类准确率，证明长程相互作用能有效将复杂空间输入模式编码到时间域，即使仅可获取空间平均输出。该系统为易于实现的磁性储层计算铺平了道路。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.01360v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The reservoir computing based on the thin film embedded with magnetic impurities in the presence of the long-range (the dipole-dipole) interaction is numerically investigated. We simulated the magnetization dynamics by taking into account the dipole-dipole interaction and performed the handwritten-digit recognition task. Although the training data is prepared by taking spatial average in the sample, the high classification accuracy is achieved. Our result demonstrates that the long range interaction effectively encodes the complex spatial input pattern into the time domain, even when only a spatially averaged output is accessible. The proposed system paves the way for easily realizable magnetic reservoir computing.

04

磁性材料的全从头算自旋-晶格动力学框架#

A Fully Ab-Initio Spin-Lattice Dynamics Framework for Magnetic Materials
📚 arXiv👤 Xianxi Zhang, Hongyu Yu, Liangliang Hong, Hongjun Xiang📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将全从头算自旋-晶格耦合引入分子动力学，实现每步自洽计算原子力与有效磁场，攻克了磁性材料有限温度模拟缺乏第一性原理工具的难题；其生成的物理关联轨迹数据可显著提升机器学习势精度，为磁性材料
该工作提出了一套完全从头算的自旋-晶格动力学（SLD）方法，并集成于VASP软件中，可在每个时间步通过自洽约束矩密度泛函计算获得原子间力和有效磁场。该方法在涵盖铁磁、非共线及几何阻挫有序的四种材料上得到验证，均能从随机初始条件恢复正确的磁基态。SLD轨迹还为磁性机器学习势函数提供物理关联的训练数据，以BiFeO₃为例，相比随机自旋构型训练可将能量平均绝对误差降低约一个数量级。该框架为磁性材料有限温度自旋-晶格耦合现象提供了实用的第一性…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了一套完全从头算的自旋-晶格动力学（SLD）方法，并集成于VASP软件中，可在每个时间步通过自洽约束矩密度泛函计算获得原子间力和有效磁场。该方法在涵盖铁磁、非共线及几何阻挫有序的四种材料上得到验证，均能从随机初始条件恢复正确的磁基态。SLD轨迹还为磁性机器学习势函数提供物理关联的训练数据，以BiFeO₃为例，相比随机自旋构型训练可将能量平均绝对误差降低约一个数量级。该框架为磁性材料有限温度自旋-晶格耦合现象提供了实用的第一性原理途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.01781v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Coupled spin-lattice dynamics (SLD) underlie a wide range of magnetic phenomena, yet a unified first-principles framework that propagates both degrees of freedom without empirical parameterization has remained elusive. We present a fully ab initio SLD approach integrated into VASP, in which interatomic forces and effective magnetic fields are obtained at each time step from self-consistent constrained-moment density-functional calculations. The method is validated on four materials spanning ferromagnetic, non-collinear, and geometrically frustrated orders, recovering the correct magnetic ground state in every case from random initial conditions. SLD trajectories also provide physically correlated training data for magnetic machine-learning potentials, as demonstrated for BiFeO₃ by a reduction of up to approximately one order of magnitude in energy MAE over training on randomized spin configurations. This framework opens a practical first-principles route to finite-temperature spin-lattice coupled phenomena in magnetic materials.

05

基于无监督机器学习的晶圆级Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂铁电薄膜电容器变异性分析与性能预测框架#

An Unsupervised Machine Learning-based Framework for Wafer Scale Variability Analysis and Performance Prediction of Ferroelectric Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 Thin Film Capacitors
📚 arXiv👤 Anika Anu, Sayani Majumdar📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将无监督机器学习引入HZO铁电薄膜的晶圆级变异性分析，突破传统描述统计局限，建立基于PCA-KMeans的"虚拟量测"预测框架，实现对新芯片剩余极化等关键性能的高效预判，为铁电存储器量产
该工作针对铁电Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂（HZO）电容器因敏感结晶动力学导致的晶圆级器件间非均匀性问题，提出了无监督机器学习框架。利用主成分分析（PCA）和K-Means聚类分析芯片内器件间（D2D）性能变异，并基于多芯片数据构建超越传统描述统计的预测性"虚拟量测"方法，以剩余极化（Pr）等关键参数定义性能类别。该框架可高效预测"未见"芯片的性能，为HZO铁电存储器的高量产制造提供了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对铁电Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂（HZO）电容器因敏感结晶动力学导致的晶圆级器件间非均匀性问题，提出了无监督机器学习框架。利用主成分分析（PCA）和K-Means聚类分析芯片内器件间（D2D）性能变异，并基于多芯片数据构建超越传统描述统计的预测性"虚拟量测"方法，以剩余极化（Pr）等关键参数定义性能类别。该框架可高效预测"未见"芯片的性能，为HZO铁电存储器的高量产制造提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00544v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fabrication process-induced performance variability remains a formidable barrier in the high-volume manufacturing of semiconductor chips. With skyrocketing Artificial Intelligence (AI) workload, demand for non-volatile and computational memories is growing exponentially. As embedded non-volatile memory, ferroelectric Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 emerged as a strong candidate due to their CMOS back-end-of-line (BEOL) compatibility, scalability and high performance. However, their sensitive crystallization kinetics leads to significant device-to-device (D2D) non-uniformity leading to unpredictability of performance over wafer scale. In this work, we demonstrate unsupervised machine learning can analyze intra-die D2D variations and predict performance of "unseen" dies efficiently. We present a framework utilizing Principal Component Analysis (PCA) and K-Means clustering to analyze D2D performance variations in HZO capacitors and building on data from multiple dies, we move beyond traditional descriptive statistics to a predictive "Virtual Metrology" approach that separates performance categories, defined by key parameters like remanent polarization (Pr) and coercive voltage (Vc). The analysis further extends to comparing uniformity across different dies across the wafer showing the proposed methodology can accurately predict device performance on untested dies with a low Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) in the range of 5-10%, suggesting a robust path for accelerated yield improvement and reduced metrology overhead.

06

基于生成神经网络从拓扑电荷分布重构自旋结构#

Reconstruction of spin structures from topological charge distributions via generative neural network systems
📚 arXiv👤 Kyra H. M. Klos, Jan Disselhoff, Michael Wand, Karin Everschor-Sitte, Friederike Schmid📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将物理约束与傅里叶空间信息融入Wasserstein生成对抗网络，实现了从拓扑缺陷分布到微观自旋构型的跨尺度重构。该方法为连接宏观可观测拓扑序与微观多自由度系统提供了高效计算框架，对复杂
该工作发展了一种结合物理约束与傅里叶空间信息的Wasserstein生成对抗神经网络，用于从宏观拓扑缺陷分布生成符合热力学参数的微观自旋构型。以二维XY模型为测试平台，研究表明生成构型能在Kosterlitz-Thouless转变以下宽温区准确复现磁化强度、磁化率、螺旋度模量及自旋-自旋关联函数；但比热的偏差揭示了模型在复现高阶能量涨落方面存在局限。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展了一种结合物理约束与傅里叶空间信息的Wasserstein生成对抗神经网络，用于从宏观拓扑缺陷分布生成符合热力学参数的微观自旋构型。以二维XY模型为测试平台，研究表明生成构型能在Kosterlitz-Thouless转变以下宽温区准确复现磁化强度、磁化率、螺旋度模量及自旋-自旋关联函数；但比热的偏差揭示了模型在复现高阶能量涨落方面存在局限。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00732v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Localized topological defects inherently possess a multiscale character. While their microstructure configuration depends on the specific physical system, their topological features and mutual interactions can be described on the macroscale in terms of a particle representation. However, determining the physical properties associated with a given defect pattern often requires knowledge of the underlying microscopic structure. In this work, we extend a Wasserstein generative adversarial neural network by incorporating physical constraints and Fourier-space information to generate microscopic spin configurations consistent with prescribed macroscopic patterns and thermodynamic parameters. Using the two-dimensional XY model as a test case, where vortex-antivortex pairs act as long-range interacting defects, we show that the model generates spin configurations that accurately reproduce magnetization, susceptibility, helicity modulus, and spin-spin correlations over a wide range of temperatures below the Kosterlitz-Thouless transition. At the same time, deviations in the specific heat reveal limitations in reproducing higher order energy fluctuations. A complementary analysis based on topological data analysis uncovers subtle differences in global spin-correlation structures at near critical temperatures that are not apparent from conventional correlation functions alone. These results demonstrate both the promise and current limitations of generative approaches for multiscale studies of defect-dominated spin systems and at the same time highlight topological methods as valuable tools for characterizing critical behavior.

03

磁性 / 铁电专题#

聚焦自旋、铁电、多铁与相关功能材料研究。

01

轨道力矩与自旋重取向实现无场低功耗磁化翻转#

Energy-efficient field-free switching by orbital torque and spin-reorientation
📚 Nature Communications👤 Bilal Jamshed, Subhakanta Das, Pinkesh Kumar Mishra, Wai Lum William Mah 等6位作者📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地将轨道角动量引入磁化翻转机制，通过合成反铁磁结构的自旋重取向效应消除外加磁场需求，实现自旋-轨道力矩协同驱动的高效翻转。其85%的力矩效率提升与96%翻转率，为开发可扩展、超低功耗自旋电
自旋-轨道力矩已成为现代自旋电子学中实现低功耗磁化翻转的主流策略。迄今为止，大多数研究致力于通过自旋霍尔效应增强自旋电流，仅利用电子的自旋而基本忽略其轨道角动量。与此同时，垂直磁各向异性层的确定性翻转通常需要外加面内磁场来破缺反演对称性，这增加了功耗开销并阻碍大规模应用。在此，我们展示了通过合成反铁磁结构中的自旋重取向实现的无外场高效磁化翻转，并由轨道力矩进一步增强。通过调控合成反铁磁样品的交换耦合场和磁各向异性，我们利用自旋力矩和轨…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

自旋-轨道力矩已成为现代自旋电子学中实现低功耗磁化翻转的主流策略。迄今为止，大多数研究致力于通过自旋霍尔效应增强自旋电流，仅利用电子的自旋而基本忽略其轨道角动量。与此同时，垂直磁各向异性层的确定性翻转通常需要外加面内磁场来破缺反演对称性，这增加了功耗开销并阻碍大规模应用。在此，我们展示了通过合成反铁磁结构中的自旋重取向实现的无外场高效磁化翻转，并由轨道力矩进一步增强。通过调控合成反铁磁样品的交换耦合场和磁各向异性，我们利用自旋力矩和轨道力矩共同作用实现了96%的磁化翻转。此外，将轨道霍尔层厚度增加15 nm，与采用Pt层作为自旋源的参考样品相比，阻尼类力矩效率提升了85%。这些结果证明了轨道角动量输运作为合成反铁磁异质结构中高效力矩产生机制的可行性，为低功耗自旋电子器件提供了一条可扩展的路径。

English Abstract

Spin-orbit torque has emerged as a leading strategy for low-power magnetisation switching in modern spintronics. To date, most efforts have focused on boosting spin currents via the spin Hall effect, exploiting only the electron’s spin while largely ignoring its orbital angular momentum. Meanwhile, deterministic switching of perpendicular magnetic anisotropy layers typically requires an external in-plane field to break inversion symmetry, adding power overhead and hindering large-scale deployment. Here, we demonstrate energy-efficient field-free magnetisation switching enabled by spin reorientation in a synthetic antiferromagnetic structure and enhanced by orbital torque. By tuning the exchange coupling field and magnetic anisotropy of the synthetic antiferromagnetic samples, we achieved a magnetisation switching of 96% utilising both spin and orbital torque. Furthermore, increasing the orbital Hall layer thickness by 15 nm leads to an 85% enhancement of damping-like torque efficiency compared to the reference sample with a Pt layer as the spin source. These results demonstrate orbital angular momentum transport as an efficient torque-generation mechanism in synthetic antiferromagnetic heterostructures, offering a scalable route toward low-power spintronic devices.

02

陈数铁磁体中自旋极化子的微观理论#

Microsopic Theory of Spin Polarons in Chern Ferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Qiang Gao, Eslam Khalaf📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文构建了陈数铁磁体中自旋极化子的首个微观解析理论，核心创新在于获得多自旋翻转极化子的严格闭合波函数及其两种等价表示——椭圆函数贾斯特罗形式与反称化双电子乘积，突破了传统数值方法在系统尺寸与自旋翻转数
该工作发展了SU(2)陈数铁磁体中带电激发的微观理论，得到了束缚任意数量自旋翻转的电荷-e自旋极化子态的闭合形式波函数。在理想陈数-1能带中，这些极化子是哈密顿量的精确本征态；偏离理想极限时，通过引入单一尺寸参数和几何信息修饰构建变分族。动量空间波函数具有两种等价表示：魏尔斯特拉斯函数的贾斯特罗因子之比，或粒子-空穴波函数的反称化双电子乘积，后者可实现大系统尺寸和多自旋翻转的高效计算。在最低朗道能级基准测试中，单自旋翻转拟设与精确对角…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展了SU(2)陈数铁磁体中带电激发的微观理论，得到了束缚任意数量自旋翻转的电荷-e自旋极化子态的闭合形式波函数。在理想陈数-1能带中，这些极化子是哈密顿量的精确本征态；偏离理想极限时，通过引入单一尺寸参数和几何信息修饰构建变分族。动量空间波函数具有两种等价表示：魏尔斯特拉斯函数的贾斯特罗因子之比，或粒子-空穴波函数的反称化双电子乘积，后者可实现大系统尺寸和多自旋翻转的高效计算。在最低朗道能级基准测试中，单自旋翻转拟设与精确对角化的重叠度达99%以上。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05292v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a microscopic theory of charged excitations in an SU(2) Chern ferromagnet and obtain closed-form wavefunctions for a hierarchy of charge-e spin polaron states binding an arbitrary number of spin flips. In an ideal Chern-1 band with a normal-ordered contact interaction, we show that these polarons are exact eigenstates of the Hamiltonian with the same energy as single-hole excitations. Away from this ideal limit, we promote these states to a variational family by introducing a single size parameter and a geometry-informed single-particle dressing. Our momentum-space wavefunctions admit two equivalent representations: a ratio of Jastrow factors of Weierstrass functions of relative momenta or an antisymmetrized geminal product of particle-hole wavefunctions. The latter enables efficient evaluation of overlaps and expectation values for large system sizes and many spin flips. Benchmarking in the lowest Landau level, the single-spin-flip ansatz achieves gtrsim 99% overlap with exact diagonalization and accurately captures binding energies, while the multi-spin-flip energies interpolate smoothly toward the large-texture (skyrmion) regime. For Chern bands with tunable quantum geometry, we find that interaction-generated single particle dispersion quickly destabilizes the spin polarons once quantum geometry becomes sufficiently non-uniform. When such dispersion is suppressed, however, the bound states persist deeper into the non-uniform regime, with the binding energy slowly decreasing and the bound state becoming larger as the quantum geometry becomes more concentrated. Our results provide a microscopic foundation for analyzing doped Chern ferromagnets in moiré platforms and lay the groundwork for variational wavefunctions of multi-polaron excitations and phases.

03

自旋-轨道耦合非磁性中心对称系统中光诱导偶波自旋劈裂#

Light-Induced Even-Wave Spin Splittings in Nonmagnetic Centrosymmetric Systems with Spin-Orbit Coupling
📚 arXiv👤 Xiao-Jiao Wang, Dongling Liu, Di Zhu, Zheng-Yang Zhuang, Zhongbo Yan📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统认知框架，揭示圆偏振光可在非磁性中心对称体系中诱导偶宇称自旋劈裂，其对称性由轨道角动量量子数决定，实现s/d/g波自旋纹理。这一发现架起了相对论与非相对论自旋劈裂机制的理论桥梁，为光控拓
该工作打破了自旋劈裂的奇偶二分法：传统上相对论自旋-轨道耦合产生奇宇称劈裂，非相对论磁交换耦合产生偶宇称劈裂。研究表明圆偏振光可在中心对称非磁性系统中动态产生偶宇称自旋劈裂，其对称性由底层轨道的角动量特征控制，可实现s波、d波和g波自旋劈裂能带结构，与铁磁体和交错磁体中的能带相同。这些自旋劈裂能带可自然承载陈数绝缘体相。该结果建立了两种基本自旋劈裂机制之间此前未被认识的概念联系。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作打破了自旋劈裂的奇偶二分法：传统上相对论自旋-轨道耦合产生奇宇称劈裂，非相对论磁交换耦合产生偶宇称劈裂。研究表明圆偏振光可在中心对称非磁性系统中动态产生偶宇称自旋劈裂，其对称性由底层轨道的角动量特征控制，可实现s波、d波和g波自旋劈裂能带结构，与铁磁体和交错磁体中的能带相同。这些自旋劈裂能带可自然承载陈数绝缘体相。该结果建立了两种基本自旋劈裂机制之间此前未被认识的概念联系。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05316v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Spin splitting underpins a vast range of spin-dependent phenomena. Traditionally, two primary mechanisms generate such splitting: relativistic spin-orbit coupling (SOC) and nonrelativistic magnetic exchange coupling (MEC). Governed by distinct symmetry constraints, they produce splittings of opposite parity -- odd for SOC and even for MEC -- a dichotomy that underpins the distinct spin physics of nonmagnetic and magnetic systems. In this work, we break this dichotomy by demonstrating the dynamic generation of even-parity spin splitting in centrosymmetric, nonmagnetic systems driven by circularly polarized light. We show that the symmetry of the induced splitting is controlled by the angular character of the underlying orbitals, enabling the realization of s-wave, d-wave, and g-wave spin-split band structures identical to those of ferromagnets and altermagnets. Furthermore, we find that these spin-split bands can naturally host a Chern insulator phase. We also discuss the associated spin and orbital magnetization. Our results establish a direct and previously unrecognized conceptual link between the two fundamental mechanisms of spin splitting.

04

MLM：多层莫尔——用于生成扭转多层二维材料公度超胞的Python包#

MLM: Multi-Layer Moire -- A Python Package for Generating Commensurate Supercells of Twisted Multilayer Two-Dimensional Materials
📚 arXiv👤 Anikeya Aditya, Sampad Mohanty📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：MLM通过求解-舍入算法将莫尔超胞构建复杂度从O(N⁴)降至O(N²)，突破传统暴力枚举效率瓶颈，支持任意层数与晶格类型，为扭转电子学及氧化物异质结构的高通量计算与材料设计提供关键工具。
该工作介绍开源Python包MLM（Multi-Layer Moire），可为任意数量扭转层、任意布拉维格子类型构建周期性兼容边界条件的莫尔超胞。该包采用求解-舍入算法，将重合位点搜索简化为每个扭转角度O(N²)的线性代数问题，相比传统方法的O(N⁴)暴力枚举显著提高效率。演示案例包括双层石墨烯、双层和三层MoS₂、双层SrTiO₃以及PbTiO₃/SrTiO₃氧化物异质结构，生成的超胞在莫尔周期性再现方面达到指定容差范围内。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作介绍开源Python包MLM（Multi-Layer Moire），可为任意数量扭转层、任意布拉维格子类型构建周期性兼容边界条件的莫尔超胞。该包采用求解-舍入算法，将重合位点搜索简化为每个扭转角度O(N²)的线性代数问题，相比传统方法的O(N⁴)暴力枚举显著提高效率。演示案例包括双层石墨烯、双层和三层MoS₂、双层SrTiO₃以及PbTiO₃/SrTiO₃氧化物异质结构，生成的超胞在莫尔周期性再现方面达到指定容差范围内。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05393v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Moire superlattices formed by stacking atomically thin two-dimensional materials with a relative twist angle have emerged as a versatile platform for engineering quantum electronic, optical, and ferroic properties. Computational modelling of such systems with periodic boundary conditions requires the identification of commensurate supercells in which the moire periodicity is reproduced exactly, or within a prescribed tolerance. While several codes exist for bilayer systems, extension to three or more layers with independently chosen twist angles remains a significant challenge. Here we present MLM (Multi-Layer Moire), an open-source Python package that constructs periodic, PBC-compatible moire supercells for an arbitrary number of twisted layers with any Bravais lattice type. The package employs a solve-and-round algorithm that reduces the coincidence-site search to an O(N²⁾ linear-algebra problem per twist angle, compared to the O(N⁴⁾ brute-force enumeration required by conventional approaches. We demonstrate the package on bilayer graphene, bilayer and trilayer MoS₂, bilayer SrTiO₃, and a PbTiO₃/SrTiO₃ oxide heterostructure, producing simulation-ready structure files for both VASP and LAMMPS. The fractional-coordinate atom-selection algorithm scales to supercells containing millions of atoms and is robust across all twist angles including very small angles below 1 degree.

05

磁场下反铁磁自旋二聚体反铁磁体中零磁化平台的外场诱导局域激发机制#

Field-Induced Local Excitations Causing Zero-Magnetization Plateaus in Antiferromagnets of Antiferromagnetic Spin Dimers Under Magnetic Field
📚 arXiv👤 Myung-Hwan Whangbo, Hyun-Joo Koo, Nikita V. Astakhov, Peter S. Berdonosov, Olga S. Volkova📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破了"零磁化平台需依赖单离子各向异性"的传统认知，首次揭示外场诱导局域激发可作为全新机制驱动反铁磁自旋二聚体系统形成零磁化平台，为理解量子阻挫磁体的磁场调控相变提供了新视角，对探索新奇量子磁性
该工作研究了由反铁磁自旋二聚体组成的某些反铁磁体在单离子各向异性可忽略情况下仍出现零磁化平台的成因。通过分析磁场对由两个自旋-1/2离子组成的反铁磁自旋二聚体链能谱的影响，并结合氯化钾铜在2 K下磁场依赖的比热测量，揭示了外场诱导局域激发导致零磁化平台的机制。该工作围绕磁场下反铁磁二聚体系统的量子相变和磁化平台展开，详情需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了由反铁磁自旋二聚体组成的某些反铁磁体在单离子各向异性可忽略情况下仍出现零磁化平台的成因。通过分析磁场对由两个自旋-1/2离子组成的反铁磁自旋二聚体链能谱的影响，并结合氯化钾铜在2 K下磁场依赖的比热测量，揭示了外场诱导局域激发导致零磁化平台的机制。该工作围绕磁场下反铁磁二聚体系统的量子相变和磁化平台展开，详情需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05516v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Certain antiferromagnets composed of antiferromagnetic spin dimers exhibit a zero-magnetization plateau despite that the single-ion anisotropy of their magnetic ions is negligible. The cause for this observation was investigated by analyzing how a magnetic field affects the energy spectrum of an antiferromagnetic chain composed of antiferromagnetic spin dimers made up of two spin-half ions and by carrying out specific heat measurements for potassium copper chloride as a function magnetic field at 2 K.

06

磁振子-极化激元的多频率弗洛凯工程#

Multifrequency Floquet Engineering of Magnon Polaritons
📚 arXiv👤 L. Hackner, A. R. Myatt, W. Wustmann, N. J. Lambert📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地采用腔频率调制替代传统磁振子调制，实现大深度、宽带宽的弗洛凯工程。双频驱动揭示相对相位调控新机制，诱导未耦合边带反交叉，为混合量子系统准能级操控开辟新路径。
该工作展示了通过调制微波腔频率而非磁振子频率来实现腔磁振子-极化激元弗洛凯工程，具有大的调制深度和带宽。施加频率比为2:1和3:1的双频弗洛凯调制，证明所得能谱依赖于两个驱动音的相对振幅和相位。与单频弗洛凯调制相比，能谱具有定性不同的特征：特别是先前未耦合的边带之间出现新的反交叉。该平台为操控混合系统中弗洛凯准能级提供了替代途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作展示了通过调制微波腔频率而非磁振子频率来实现腔磁振子-极化激元弗洛凯工程，具有大的调制深度和带宽。施加频率比为2:1和3:1的双频弗洛凯调制，证明所得能谱依赖于两个驱动音的相对振幅和相位。与单频弗洛凯调制相比，能谱具有定性不同的特征：特别是先前未耦合的边带之间出现新的反交叉。该平台为操控混合系统中弗洛凯准能级提供了替代途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05576v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Floquet engineering of cavity magnon-polaritons by periodically modulating the magnon frequency has recently attracted much interest as a way to manipulate the energy spectrum of magnon-photon hybrid systems. However, modulating the frequency of magnons by a time-varying bias magnetic field can be challenging. We demonstrate cavity magnon-polariton Floquet engineering by modulating the microwave cavity frequency, allowing large modulation depth and bandwidth. We apply commensurate two-frequency Floquet modulations with the higher frequency at twice and three times the lower frequency, and demonstrate that the resulting spectrum depends on the relative amplitude and phase of the two drive tones. In comparison with single-frequency Floquet modulations, the spectrum has qualitatively different features; in particular, new anticrossings appear between previously uncoupled sidebands. Our platform offers an alternative way to manipulate Floquet quasi-energy levels in hybrid systems.

07

氧空位掺杂金属性EuTiO₃₋δ的电荷输运与磁序调控#

Tuning charge-transport properties and magnetic order in metallic EuTiO₃₋δ
📚 arXiv👤 Xing He, Chiou Yang Tan, Issam Khayr, Zach Van Fossan, Richard J. Spieker, Dayu Zhai, Sarah Anderson, Dinesh Shukla, Suchismita Sarker, Javier Garcia-Barriocanal, Turan Birol, Martin Greven📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作开创性地采用CaH₂还原法实现EuTiO₃氧空位掺杂，获得超高载流子浓度，并构建全新电子掺杂相图；首次揭示金属态下反铁磁-铁磁量子相变及电子掺杂对磁交换作用的调控机制，为氧化物自旋电子学器件设计
该研究利用CaH₂作为吸氧剂对EuTiO₃进行氧空位掺杂，实现了高于以往报道的载流子浓度（约10²¹ cm⁻³），发现氧空位掺杂体系的相图与阳离子掺杂截然不同。实验揭示金属态下存在从反铁磁到铁磁序的转变，最高居里温度约11 K；密度泛函理论计算证实最近邻磁交换常数随电子掺杂显著变化。X射线漫散射与第一性原理结果还表明该体系存在类似其他材料的结构特征。

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用CaH₂作为吸氧剂对EuTiO₃进行氧空位掺杂，实现了高于以往报道的载流子浓度（约10²¹ cm⁻³），发现氧空位掺杂体系的相图与阳离子掺杂截然不同。实验揭示金属态下存在从反铁磁到铁磁序的转变，最高居里温度约11 K；密度泛函理论计算证实最近邻磁交换常数随电子掺杂显著变化。X射线漫散射与第一性原理结果还表明该体系存在类似其他材料的结构特征。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05612v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The stoichiometric antiferromagnetic insulator EuTiO₃ is proximate to a ferroelectric phase. Whereas cation substitution has been used as a tuning parameter to introduce charge carriers and manipulate the magnetism, the effects of oxygen-vacancy doping have been less explored. Here we report a detailed study of the charge transport and magnetic properties of metallic, oxygen-vacancy-doped EuTiO₃₋δ. Using CaH₂ as an oxygen getter to achieve a higher carrier concentration than previously reported, we find that the phase diagram of the oxygen-vacancy-doped system is distinct from that obtained via cation doping. In particular, we uncover a change from antiferromagnetic to ferromagnetic order in the metallic state, with a maximum Curie temperature of TC approx 11 K at the highest carrier concentration of n approx 10²¹ cm⁻³. These findings are supported by density functional theory calculations, which indicate a significant change in the nearest-neighbor magnetic exchange constant with increasing electron doping. We also present x-ray diffuse scattering and complementary first-principles results that reveal that, similar to the prominent incipient ferroelectric perovskite SrTiO₃, the data for EuTiO₃ are consistent with thermal diffuse scattering and with the absence of quasi-elastic contributions. Finally, we report specific heat measurements that confirm the magnetic transition temperatures deduced from magnetization measurements and corroborate the lattice dynamics picture inferred from the diffuse scattering data.

08

s波超导近邻二维电子气边界涌现的自旋量子霍尔边缘态#

Emergent spin quantum Hall edge states at the boundary of two-dimensional electron gas proximitized by an s-wave superconductor
📚 arXiv👤 M. V. Parfenov, V. S. Khrapai, I. S. Burmistrov📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示s波超导近邻二维电子气在C类对称性下，电荷输运虽遭无序破坏，自旋输运却受拓扑保护，实现偶数量子化的自旋量子霍尔效应；提出电学探测方案，为区分手性Andreev边缘态的拓扑起源提供实验判据，拓
该研究论证了量化磁场下二维电子气-超导体杂化结构虽呈现非整数、无序敏感的电荷电导，但拓扑保护在自旋输运通道中得以保持。该体系属于Altland-Zirnbauer分类的C类，支持偶数量子化的横向自旋电导率——自旋量子霍尔效应。作者证明2DEG-S杂化体系承载偶数量子化、抗无序的自旋电导拓扑保护边缘态，并提出通过电学测量探测该保护的实验方案，为检测手性Andreev边缘态的C类起源提供具体途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究论证了量化磁场下二维电子气-超导体杂化结构虽呈现非整数、无序敏感的电荷电导，但拓扑保护在自旋输运通道中得以保持。该体系属于Altland-Zirnbauer分类的C类，支持偶数量子化的横向自旋电导率——自旋量子霍尔效应。作者证明2DEG-S杂化体系承载偶数量子化、抗无序的自旋电导拓扑保护边缘态，并提出通过电学测量探测该保护的实验方案，为检测手性Andreev边缘态的C类起源提供具体途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05847v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Hybrid two-dimensional electron gas-superconductor (2DEG-S) structures in a quantized magnetic field offer a promising platform for realizing new topological phases. While recent experiments reveal chiral Andreev edge states, their charge conductance is not integer quantized and is disorder sensitive, raising the question of whether topological protection survives. We argue that it does, but manifests in the spin transport channel. The 2DEG-S system belongs to symmetry class C of the Altland-Zirnbauer classification, which supports an even-integer quantized transverse spin conductivity -- the spin quantum Hall effect, so far unobserved experimentally. We demonstrate that 2DEG-S hybrids host topologically protected edge states carrying a spin current with an even-integer quantized spin conductance robust against disorder. Finally, we propose an experimental setup to probe this protection via electrical measurements, establishing a concrete route to detect the class C origin of the chiral Andreev edge states.

09

微磁模拟中投影与非投影方案的比较研究#

A Comparative Study of Projected and Unprojected Schemes for Micromagnetic Simulations
📚 arXiv👤 Changjian Xie📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文从连续性方程的理论基础出发，首次系统论证了磁化强度恒定约束的自治保持特性，并揭示了大耗散系数下投影步骤对稳态结果的显著影响，为微磁模拟中投影方案的选择提供了关键理论依据和定量判据。
该工作从连续性方程出发，论证磁化强度恒定约束可由方程本身自动保持，进而离散化连续性方程并比较两种一阶半隐式时间策略：隐式Gauss-Seidel方法与半隐式向后差分公式（BDF）方法。微磁模拟结果表明，当耗散系数较大时，无投影步的隐式Gauss-Seidel方法与有投影步的方法在达到的稳态上存在显著差异。该研究为微磁模拟中投影步骤的必要性提供了系统性评估。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作从连续性方程出发，论证磁化强度恒定约束可由方程本身自动保持，进而离散化连续性方程并比较两种一阶半隐式时间策略：隐式Gauss-Seidel方法与半隐式向后差分公式（BDF）方法。微磁模拟结果表明，当耗散系数较大时，无投影步的隐式Gauss-Seidel方法与有投影步的方法在达到的稳态上存在显著差异。该研究为微磁模拟中投影步骤的必要性提供了系统性评估。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05858v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In micromagnetic simulations, the constant magnitude of the magnetization can be derived from the continuity equation. Since the time evolution of the magnetization in the continuity equation is perpendicular to the plane determined by the magnetization and the effective field, taking the inner product of both sides of the model with the magnetization shows that the evolution rate of the magnitude of the magnetization is zero, thus keeping the magnitude constant. From this perspective, the equation itself can maintain the constraint of constant magnetization magnitude. We discretized the continuity equation and compared two first-order semi-implicit strategies in time: one is the implicit Gauss-Seidel method, and the other is the semi-implicit Backward Differentiation Formula (BDF) method. We considered the comparison between these two schemes with and without the projection step. The results of micromagnetic simulations show that when the dissipation coefficient is large, the implicit Gauss-Seidel method without the projection step has significant differences from the method with the projection step in both the achieved steady state and domain wall motion. When an appropriate dissipation coefficient is selected, the difference between the two narrows, and both the steady state and domain wall motion can be simulated. For the other method, BDF1, whether the dissipation coefficient is large or small, the results with and without the projection step are quite consistent, and it can effectively simulate the domain wall motion.

10

揭示(Fe,Mn,Ga)₂O₃铁氧体亚铁磁特征起源：结构不可检测的尖晶石杂质作用#

Unraveling the Origin of Ferrimagnetic Signatures in (Fe,Mn,Ga)2O3 Bixbyites: The Role of Structurally-Undetectable Spinel Impurities
📚 arXiv👤 Evgeniya Moshkina, Yuriy Knyazev, Ekaterina Smorodina, Oleg Bayukov, Maxim Molokeev, Evgeniy Khramov, Andrey Kartashev, Ruslan Batulin, Mikhail Cherosov, Dmitriy Velikanov, Evgeniy Eremin, Mikhail Rautskii, Dieter Kokh, Mikhail Platunov, Leonard Bezmaternykh📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地指出，(Fe,Mn,Ga)₂O₃体系长期争议的亚铁磁性并非源于本征固溶体，而是常规XRD难以识别的微量尖晶石杂质相所致。这一发现重塑了对该体系磁性的认知框架，为纠正类似氧化物磁性误判提供
该工作研究了三种不同Mn:Fe:Ga比的Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃:Ga固溶体及无镓参考样品的磁态，通过EDX、粉末XRD和XAS详细分析实际化学成分与晶体结构。磁测量和Mössbauer谱学发现低温磁异常，结合结构分析表明这些样品的亚铁磁特征可能源于常规结构表征无法检测的尖晶石杂质相。该研究为理解Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃体系长期争议的磁性质提供了新视角。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了三种不同Mn:Fe:Ga比的Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃:Ga固溶体及无镓参考样品的磁态，通过EDX、粉末XRD和XAS详细分析实际化学成分与晶体结构。磁测量和Mössbauer谱学发现低温磁异常，结合结构分析表明这些样品的亚铁磁特征可能源于常规结构表征无法检测的尖晶石杂质相。该研究为理解Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃体系长期争议的磁性质提供了新视角。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05885v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The cubic Fe2-xMnxO3 is an intriguing material that has recently been investigated for various applications, including lithium-ion battery anodes, catalysts, energy storage media, humidity sensors, and photocatalysts. Despite its wide range of promising applications, the magnetic properties of Fe2-xMnxO3 remain controversial, with different sources reporting conflicting information regarding the type of magnetic ordering, phase transition temperature, and magnetic moment of this compound. This work presents a study of the magnetic state of three Fe2-xMnxO3:Ga solid solutions with varying Mn:Fe:Ga ratios, along with one gallium-free Fe2-xMnxO3 reference sample. We performed a detailed analysis of the actual chemical composition and crystal structure of the synthesized samples using energy-dispersive X-ray spectroscopy (EDX), powder X-ray diffraction (XRD), and X-ray absorption spectroscopy (XAS) to evaluate compositional differences. The magnetic states of the three Fe2-xMnxO3:Ga samples and the gallium-free Fe2-xMnxO3 were investigated using magnetometry and Mossbauer spectroscopy. The low-temperature magnetic anomalies were found to be more consistent with spin-glass-like freezing than with conventional long-range antiferromagnetic ordering. Although variations in magnetic behavior were observed and found to depend on composition and the cooling rate during synthesis, our results demonstrate that these factors do not account for the drastically different magnetic properties reported for similar bixbyite-type oxides. Instead, the apparent room-temperature ferrimagnetism observed in one sample is most likely extrinsic and can be attributed to a trace spinel-type impurity phase, as supported by magnetizations and ESR measurements. Thus, the origin of these discrepancies lies primarily in the chemical purity of the samples and, to a significant extent, in the synthesis technique employed.

11

受挫量子材料中的拓扑自旋冻结#

Topological spin freezing in frustrated quantum materials
📚 arXiv👤 U. Jena, M. Barman, A. Pradhan, P. Khuntia📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在受挫量子材料中揭示拓扑、竞争相互作用与量子涨落协同诱导的新型玻璃态——拓扑自旋玻璃，突破传统自旋玻璃理论框架。多实验手段联用确证其非传统动力学与拓扑起源的低能激发，为探索拓扑量子物态与无序
该工作探究受挫量子材料中非传统玻璃态自旋动力学的涌现，其中竞争相互作用、非平庸能带拓扑与量子涨落交织。综合运用热力学测量、核磁共振、μSR及中子散射等互补实验手段，识别出拓扑自旋玻璃行为的特征标志，包括非传统自旋动力学、短程自旋关联、涌现低能激发及拓扑起源的玻璃态行为，并将其与传统自旋玻璃态区分。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作探究受挫量子材料中非传统玻璃态自旋动力学的涌现，其中竞争相互作用、非平庸能带拓扑与量子涨落交织。综合运用热力学测量、核磁共振、μSR及中子散射等互补实验手段，识别出拓扑自旋玻璃行为的特征标志，包括非传统自旋动力学、短程自旋关联、涌现低能激发及拓扑起源的玻璃态行为，并将其与传统自旋玻璃态区分。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.06069v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Competing interactions, non-trivial electronic band topology, quantum fluctuations, and the interplay between emergent degrees of freedom in frustrated quantum materials can give rise to a wide range of exotic phenomena. Glassy dynamics, originally studied in amorphous materials and biological systems, has recently attracted considerable interest in quantum condensed matter, particularly in relation to the collective behavior of spins, quasiparticle excitations, and topological spin textures. Here, we investigate the emergence of unconventional glassy spin dynamics in a broad class of frustrated quantum materials, where spin freezing exhibit distinct signatures in both thermodynamic and microscopic measurements. Using a comprehensive set of experimental probes, including thermodynamic, NMR, (μSR), and neutron scattering, we identify characteristic signatures of topological spin-glass behavior and these complementary techniques reveal unconventional spin dynamics, short-range spin correlations, emergent low-energy excitations, and glassy behavior of topological origins, distinguishing these states from conventional spin glasses and disordered magnets. Furthermore, we discuss the role of hydrodynamic spin modes in governing glassy dynamics and the emergence of spin-jam states in frustrated lattices, providing a unified framework for understanding unconventional spin freezing of topological origin and bridging experimental observations with theoretical models. This review aims to advance our understanding of collective many-body phenomena arising from competing interactions, topological defects, collective excitations, quantum entanglement, and symmetry constraints. Such insights may facilitate the discovery and design of novel quantum materials and help address fundamental questions in contemporary condensed matter physics, with potential implications for future quantum technologies.

12

反钙钛矿非共线反铁磁体超快动力学中磁性与光学贡献的解耦#

Disentangling magnetic and optical contributions in ultrafast dynamics of antiperovskite non-collinear antiferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 J. Kimak, Tomas Ostatnicky, M. Nerodilova, F. Johnson, O. Faiman, T. Trejtnar, D. Boldrin, F. Rendell-Bhatti, J. Zemen, B. Zou, A. P. Mihai, X. Sun, F. Yu, E. Schmoranzerova, L. Nadvornik, L. F. Cohen, P. Nemec📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在反钙钛矿非共线反铁磁体中实现磁性与非磁性光学贡献的定量解耦，揭示反常霍尔效应对超快磁光信号的调控机制，为全光探测反铁磁序及开发超快自旋电子器件提供了关键实验方法与物理基础。
该工作采用泵浦-探测实验研究反钙钛矿非共线反铁磁金属Mn₃NiN与Mn₃GaN薄膜。发现两种材料中飞秒激光诱导的动力学均强烈依赖于样品法向与探测传播方向的夹角，且与泵浦偏振无关。在具有显著反常霍尔效应（Γ₄g相）的Mn₃NiN中，斜入射探测时磁光信号呈现额外的强磁场依赖性；而无反常霍尔效应（Γ₅g相）的Mn₃GaN中信号不依赖磁场。基于Yeh形式体系的完整光学建模与偏振分辨测量，定量分离了磁性与非磁性贡献。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用泵浦-探测实验研究反钙钛矿非共线反铁磁金属Mn₃NiN与Mn₃GaN薄膜。发现两种材料中飞秒激光诱导的动力学均强烈依赖于样品法向与探测传播方向的夹角，且与泵浦偏振无关。在具有显著反常霍尔效应（Γ₄g相）的Mn₃NiN中，斜入射探测时磁光信号呈现额外的强磁场依赖性；而无反常霍尔效应（Γ₅g相）的Mn₃GaN中信号不依赖磁场。基于Yeh形式体系的完整光学建模与偏振分辨测量，定量分离了磁性与非磁性贡献。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.06233v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Non-collinear antiferromagnets are a class of spin-polarized antiferromagnets in which chiral spin textures give rise to Berry-curvature-driven phenomena, such as the anomalous Hall effect (AHE), without net magnetization. We investigate the properties of thin films of antiperovskite non-collinear antiferromagnetic metals Mn3NiN and Mn3GaN using pump-probe experiments. In both materials, we observe a strong dependence of pump-polarization-independent dynamics, induced by femtosecond laser pulses, on the angle between the sample normal and the direction of probe propagation. In Mn3NiN, where the presence of a sizable AHE indicates the Γ4g phase, the measured magnetooptical (MO) signals acquire an additional, strong dependence on the external magnetic field when the probe pulses are incident at nonzero angles. In contrast, in Mn3GaN, where the absence of AHE indicates the Γ5g phase, the measured signals do not depend on the magnetic field. Using probe-polarization-resolved measurements combined with full optical modeling based on Yeh's formalism, we quantitatively separate magnetic and non-magnetic contributions to the measured signals. We show that in Mn3NiN, the observed magnetic field dependence results from field-controlled redistribution of magnetic domain populations, enabled by their piezomagnetic moments and detected by a Kerr-like MO effect, while this effect is absent in Mn3GaN. Temperature-dependent measurements reveal a change from single-step to two-step quenching dynamics with increasing temperature in Mn3NiN. This behavior contrasts with the nearly temperature-independent quenching dynamics reported for the non-collinear antiferromagnetic Heusler compound Mn3Sn, but resembles the crossover from type-I to type-II demagnetization dynamics in metallic ferromagnets.

13

CrI₃中狄拉克磁子的缠绕特征与热演化#

Winding feature and thermal evolution of the Dirac magnons in CrI₃
📚 arXiv👤 Weiliang Yao, Matthew B. Stone, Colin L. Sarkis, Yi Li, Ruixian Liu, Xingye Lu, Pengcheng Dai📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本研究通过改进样品质量的高分辨非弹性中子散射，首次在CrI₃中直接观测到狄拉克磁子的缠绕特征，为拓扑磁子激发提供了决定性实验证据；同时揭示T²能量重正化规律，澄清了磁子-磁子相互作用机制，奠定了该体系
该工作利用非弹性中子散射并结合改进样品质量，研究二维蜂窝晶格铁磁体CrI₃的拓扑磁子激发。揭示了六角布里渊区K点周围磁子的缠绕特征——狄拉克磁子的关键标志；同时发现高温下磁子能量遵循T²重正化行为，与磁子-磁子相互作用一致。这些结果为CrI₃磁子谱提供了此前缺失的信息，进一步巩固了其自旋激发的拓扑本质。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用非弹性中子散射并结合改进样品质量，研究二维蜂窝晶格铁磁体CrI₃的拓扑磁子激发。揭示了六角布里渊区K点周围磁子的缠绕特征——狄拉克磁子的关键标志；同时发现高温下磁子能量遵循T²重正化行为，与磁子-磁子相互作用一致。这些结果为CrI₃磁子谱提供了此前缺失的信息，进一步巩固了其自旋激发的拓扑本质。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.06291v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Two-dimensional honeycomb lattice ferromagnet chromium tri-iodide (CrI₃₎ has attracted tremendous interest because it retains ferromagnetism down to the monolayer limit and hosts intriguing topological magnons. As a prototypical van der Waals magnet, CrI₃ provides an ideal platform for exploring the interplay between reduced dimensionality, magnetic order, and nontrivial spin excitations. Here, using inelastic neutron scattering together with improved sample quality, we uncover the magnon winding feature around the K-point of the hexagonal Brillouin zone, a key signature of Dirac magnons. In addition, we find that the magnon energy follows a T²⁻renormalization behavior at elevated temperatures, consistent with magnon-magnon interactions. These results provide previously missing information on the magnon spectrum of CrI₃ and further consolidate the topological nature of its spin excitations.

14

一级量子相变旋节点附近的临界性#

Criticality around the Spinodal Point of First-Order Quantum Phase Transitions
📚 arXiv👤 Fan Zhang, Chiao Wang, H. T. Quan📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地揭示一级量子相变旋节点处隐藏的二级量子相变临界性，通过共振局域激发动态解耦构建涌现对称性子空间，建立FOQPT与SOQPT动力学的理论桥梁，为理解量子相变分类及非平衡动力学标度行为提供新
该工作提出微观理论证明一级量子相变（FOQPT）旋节点（亚稳性消失处）可出现量子临界性。在该失稳点，共振局域激发动态解耦具有涌现离散平移对称性的希尔伯特子空间；将原哈密顿量投影至该子空间得到有效哈密顿量，呈现真实的二级量子相变（SOQPT）与Kibble-Zurek标度。该框架在破缺Z₂对称性的倾斜伊辛链中得到验证，并预测交错场PXP模型中不存在此类临界性，为FOQPT与SOQPT动力学建立桥梁。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出微观理论证明一级量子相变（FOQPT）旋节点（亚稳性消失处）可出现量子临界性。在该失稳点，共振局域激发动态解耦具有涌现离散平移对称性的希尔伯特子空间；将原哈密顿量投影至该子空间得到有效哈密顿量，呈现真实的二级量子相变（SOQPT）与Kibble-Zurek标度。该框架在破缺Z₂对称性的倾斜伊辛链中得到验证，并预测交错场PXP模型中不存在此类临界性，为FOQPT与SOQPT动力学建立桥梁。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.06436v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Universality and scaling are hallmarks of second-order phase transitions but are generally unexpected in first-order quantum phase transitions (FOQPTs). We present a microscopic theory showing that quantum criticality can emerge around the quantum spinodal point of FOQPTs where metastability disappears. We demonstrate that, at this instability, resonant local excitations dynamically decouple a Hilbert subspace characterized by an emergent discrete translational symmetry. Projecting the original Hamiltonian onto this subspace yields an effective Hamiltonian that exhibits a genuine second-order quantum phase transition (SOQPT) and the Kibble-Zurek scaling. We validate this framework in the tilted Ising chain which breaks Z₂ symmetry, and predict the absence of criticality in the staggered-field PXP model. This work indicates that the FOQPT dynamics is usually governed by an emergent critical point around the quantum spinodal point. Our study establishes a bridge between the dynamics of the FOQPT and SOQPT, and thus sheds new light on the long-standing conundrum of the dynamics of the FOQPT.

15

利用交错磁性量子磁子构建驱动-耗散型热浴以调控自旋波、畴壁和斯格明子的经典动力学#

Engineering a driven-dissipative bath of altermagnetic quantum magnons for controlling classical dynamics of spins hosting spin waves, domain walls, or skyrmions
📚 arXiv👤 Felipe Reyes-Osorio, Branislav K. Nikolic📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将交错磁性量子磁子热浴与经典自旋动力学桥接，核心创新在于通过非平衡场论导出含时空非局域、各向异性阻尼的扩展LLG方程，突破了传统局域阻尼近似。其意义在于为自旋波耗散工程、畴壁/斯格明子定向驱
该工作基于Schwinger-Keldysh场论，在交错磁性绝缘体层中设计了一个非平衡的量子磁子热浴，用以调控相邻铁磁绝缘体层中经典局域自旋的Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert动力学。推导出的扩展LLG方程包含两个空间非局域且各向异性的阻尼项，其中一项还具有时间非局域的非马尔可夫特性。研究展示了如何利用这些特性来调控自旋电子学和磁子学效应。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于Schwinger-Keldysh场论，在交错磁性绝缘体层中设计了一个非平衡的量子磁子热浴，用以调控相邻铁磁绝缘体层中经典局域自旋的Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert动力学。推导出的扩展LLG方程包含两个空间非局域且各向异性的阻尼项，其中一项还具有时间非局域的非马尔可夫特性。研究展示了如何利用这些特性来调控自旋电子学和磁子学效应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.06473v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Using Schwinger-Keldysh field theory (SKFT), we engineer a dissipative and driven (i.e., out of equilibrium) bosonic bath acting on classical localized spins within a ferromagnetic insulator (FI) layer whose dynamics is governed by the Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert equation, as is usually assumed in spintronics and magnonics. The bosonic bath is comprised of quantum magnons within a layer of altermagnetic insulator (AMI) that is attached to a conventional FI layer, often one of the key ingredients within spintronic and magnonic multilayers, so that interaction between slow classical (in the FI layer) and fast quantum (in the AMI layer) localized spins ensues. Such a bath, including its driving to produce a nonequilibrium distribution of altermagnetic magnons, generates a rich structure of the SKFT-derived extended LLG equation for classical spins within the FI layer. Our LLG equation contains two damping terms, both of which are spatially nonlocal and anisotropic, while one of them is also intrinsically non-Markovian, i.e., nonlocal in time. We demonstrate how to exploit these terms for tuning spintronic and magnonic effects within the FI layer of AMI/FI bilayers that involve spin wave or domain wall propagation, as well as skyrmion annihilation.

16

插层二维磁体中的电控热辅助磁记录#

Electrically controlled Heat Assisted Magnetic Recording in Intercalated 2D Magnets
📚 arXiv👤 Josue Rodriguez, Ruishi Qi, Catherine Xu, Feng Wang, James G. Analytis, Hossein Taghinejad📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究以焦耳热替代激光实现电控热辅助磁记录，在插层二维磁体Ni₁/₄TaSe₂中仅需~2 mT超小磁场即可完成写入，为超高密度存储提供了全电子学、可集成的新方案，突破了传统HAMR对复杂光学系统的依赖
该研究提出了一种电子学方案实现热辅助磁记录（HAMR），利用低电流密度脉冲的焦耳热进行数据写入，并通过反常霍尔效应实现电子学读出。在插层二维磁体Ni₁/₄TaSe₂中，实验证实电流脉冲可将材料加热至居里温度以上，此时仅需约2 mT的小磁场（为矫顽力的1/100）即可完成写入，突破了传统HAMR对激光光学和等离激元换能器的依赖。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出了一种电子学方案实现热辅助磁记录（HAMR），利用低电流密度脉冲的焦耳热进行数据写入，并通过反常霍尔效应实现电子学读出。在插层二维磁体Ni₁/₄TaSe₂中，实验证实电流脉冲可将材料加热至居里温度以上，此时仅需约2 mT的小磁场（为矫顽力的1/100）即可完成写入，突破了传统HAMR对激光光学和等离激元换能器的依赖。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.06645v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The ever-increasing demand for fast, reliable, and energy-efficient information storage continues to push magnetic memory technologies toward their fundamental limits. Conventional scaling strategies, which rely on reducing bit size, inevitably run into the "magnetic recording trilemma," where signal-to-noise ratio, thermal stability, and writability cannot all be optimized simultaneously. Heat-assisted magnetic recording (HAMR) has emerged as the leading solution, enabling high-density storage by transiently heating the medium during the write cycle. However, the reliance on laser optics and plasmonic transducers restricts HAMR primarily to hard-disk drives, limiting its integration with on-chip or embedded architectures. Here, we demonstrate an electronic variant of HAMR in which Joule heating from low-current density current pulses facilitates data writing, while the anomalous Hall effect provides electronic readout. Employing intercalated 2D magnet Ni₁/₄TaSe₂, we show direct evidence that current pulses heat the material above its Curie temperature, during which a small magnetic field of ~2mT (100 times smaller than the coercive field) enables efficient data writing. The all-electronic approach combined with the 2D magnetic medium creates timely opportunities to revisit the energy-assisted magnetization recording, enabling new recording schemes that combine fundamental novelty with technological impact.

17

Eu₅Sn₂As₆中的庞磁电阻与声子驱动的交换动力学#

Colossal Magnetoresistance and Phonon Driven Exchange Dynamics in Eu₅Sn₂As₆
📚 arXiv👤 Luke Pritchard Cairns, Kohtaro Yamakawa, Shengzhi Zhang, Youzhe Chen, Bernard Field, Rainer Reczek, Ryan P. Day, Joel E. Moore, Marcelo Jaime, Sinead M. Griffin, Robert J. Birgeneau, James G. Analytis📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示Eu₅Sn₂As₆中庞磁电阻的晶格起源机制：强磁场通过解除自旋构型简并增强声子热导，而磁致应变猝灭导致高场饱和。核心创新在于将声子-自旋耦合确认为电子退局域化的驱动力而非伴随效应，为设计
该研究测量了Eu₅Sn₂As₆的热导率和磁致伸缩，以理解晶格在产生庞磁电阻中的作用。两种性质均呈现强场依赖且与磁化行为镜像，在Eu²⁺矩极化后饱和。场增强的声子主导热导率被解释为自旋构型简并的解除，高场下的饱和则归因于磁致应变的猝灭。与自旋玻璃绝缘体的比较表明，这一现象是电子退局域化的驱动力，而非副产物。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究测量了Eu₅Sn₂As₆的热导率和磁致伸缩，以理解晶格在产生庞磁电阻中的作用。两种性质均呈现强场依赖且与磁化行为镜像，在Eu²⁺矩极化后饱和。场增强的声子主导热导率被解释为自旋构型简并的解除，高场下的饱和则归因于磁致应变的猝灭。与自旋玻璃绝缘体的比较表明，这一现象是电子退局域化的驱动力，而非副产物。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.06649v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The emergence of colossal magnetoresistance in a new generation of Eu²⁺-based antiferromagnets is intriguing given stark contrasts to the archetypal perovskite manganites and doped Eu-chalcogenides. In this study the thermal conductivity and magnetostriction of Eu₅Sn₂As₆ -- one such representative -- have been measured to better understand the role of the crystal lattice. Both properties are strongly field-dependent and mirror the magnetization, saturating once the Eu²⁺ moments are polarized. The field-enhancement of the phonon-dominated thermal conductivity is interpreted through the lifting of a degeneracy of spin configurations, and the subsequent saturation due to quenched magnetostrain in high field. Comparison with spin-glass insulators suggests that this phenomenon is not a byproduct but rather the driver of electron delocalization due to the suppression of strong phonon scattering arising from exchange frustration.

自旋-1/2四聚体链的自旋序、自旋激发与RIXS谱#

Spin order, spin excitations, and RIXS spectra of spin-1/2 tetramer chains
📚 arXiv👤 Junli Li, Jun-Qing Cheng, Trinanjan Datta, Dao-Xin Yao📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统揭示了一维自旋-1/2四聚体链中隐藏的Z₂×Z₂对称性破缺与Haldane相的对应关系，阐明了退禁闭量子临界态的中介机制。其RIXS谱计算为实验探测分数化自旋子及高阶集体激发（三重子、五
该工作结合密度矩阵重正化群、量子重正化群和微扰理论，研究了一维自旋-1/2海森堡四聚体链的自旋动力学。计算了能级、量子相图，分析了相变，并评估了分数化和集体（单粒子和多粒子）激发的L边和K边共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）谱。发现该链可在隐藏Z₂×Z₂离散对称性保持的四聚体相与具有非零弦序、破坏隐藏对称性的Haldane相之间转变，两能隙相之间由包含自由自旋和三格点双重态的退禁闭量子临界态介入。该链支持分数化自旋子激发和集体三重子、五…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合密度矩阵重正化群、量子重正化群和微扰理论，研究了一维自旋-1/2海森堡四聚体链的自旋动力学。计算了能级、量子相图，分析了相变，并评估了分数化和集体（单粒子和多粒子）激发的L边和K边共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）谱。发现该链可在隐藏Z₂×Z₂离散对称性保持的四聚体相与具有非零弦序、破坏隐藏对称性的Haldane相之间转变，两能隙相之间由包含自由自旋和三格点双重态的退禁闭量子临界态介入。该链支持分数化自旋子激发和集体三重子、五重子激发，在铁磁极限下五重子激发具有五重简并激发态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2504.00095v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We investigate the spin dynamics of a 1D spin-1/2 Heisenberg tetramer chain. Employing a combination of Density Matrix Renormalization Group, quantum renormalization group, and perturbation theory techniques, we compute the energy levels and the quantum phase diagram, analyze the phase transitions, and evaluate the L and K -edge resonant inelastic x-ray scattering (RIXS) spectrum of fractionalized and collective (single and multi-particle) excitations. Our calculations suggest that the chain can transition between a hidden Z₂× Z₂ discrete symmetry preserving tetramer phase and a Haldane phase with non-vanishing string order that breaks the hidden symmetry. These two gapped phases are intervened by an intermediate deconfined quantum critical state comprising of free spins and three-site doublets, which is a gapless critical phase with deconfined spinons. We find that the tetramer chain can support fractionalized (spinon) and collective (triplon and quinton) excitations. In the ferromagnetic intra-tetramer limit, the chain can support a quinton excitation which has a five-fold degenerate excited state. String order parameter calculations suggest CuInVO₅ to be in a Haldane-like phase whose L -edge RIXS spectrum can support observable triplon and quinton excitations. We also identify possible two-particle excitations (two-singlon, two-triplon, triplon-quinton, and two-quinton excitations) resulting from the double spin-flip effect in the K -edge RIXS spectrum.

19

内禀非线性霍尔效应的量子几何起源#

Quantum Geometric Origin of the Intrinsic Nonlinear Hall Effect
📚 arXiv👤 Yannis Ulrich, Johannes Mitscherling, Laura Classen, Andreas P. Schnyder📅 2026-05-08⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作建立完全量子力学投影算符框架，首次揭示τ⁰阶内禀非线性霍尔效应中存在带内量子度规矩偶极（intraQMD）这一全新几何贡献，源于虚带间跃迁的量子力学效应。该发现统一了此前理论分歧，为时间反演对称
该工作在完全量子力学的投影算符形式体系中，将通用多带系统的内禀二阶非线性霍尔效应（NLHE）分解为其量子几何贡献。通过将非线性电导率按准粒子寿命τ的幂次展开，在τ¹阶恢复了已建立的Berry曲率偶极，并澄清了此前文献中关于τ⁰阶（带间）量子度规矩偶极（或Berry曲率极化率）贡献的分歧。关键发现是τ⁰阶存在一个由带内量子度规矩偶极（intraQMD）决定的额外贡献，源于完全量子力学处理中捕获的附加虚带间跃迁。intraQMD贡献在破坏…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在完全量子力学的投影算符形式体系中，将通用多带系统的内禀二阶非线性霍尔效应（NLHE）分解为其量子几何贡献。通过将非线性电导率按准粒子寿命τ的幂次展开，在τ¹阶恢复了已建立的Berry曲率偶极，并澄清了此前文献中关于τ⁰阶（带间）量子度规矩偶极（或Berry曲率极化率）贡献的分歧。关键发现是τ⁰阶存在一个由带内量子度规矩偶极（intraQMD）决定的额外贡献，源于完全量子力学处理中捕获的附加虚带间跃迁。intraQMD贡献在破坏时间反演对称性的系统中普遍非零，可通过对称性与其他几何贡献区分。对拓扑能带交叉低能模型的解析结果展示了能带拓扑如何影响各项贡献。

English Abstract

arXiv:2506.17386v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We decompose the intrinsic second-order nonlinear Hall effect (NLHE) of a generic multiband system into its quantum-geometric contributions within a fully quantum-mechanical, projector-based formalism. By expanding the nonlinear conductivity in powers of the quasiparticle lifetime τ, we recover the established Berry curvature dipole at order τ and clarify discrepancies in previous literature concerning the (interband) quantum metric dipole (or Berry curvature polarizability) contribution at order τ⁰. Crucially, our method reveals an additional contribution at order τ⁰, determined by the it intraband quantum metric dipole (intraQMD), arising from additional virtual interband transitions captured within the fully quantum-mechanical treatment. The intraQMD contribution is generically nonzero in systems with broken time-reversal symmetry and can be distinguished from other geometric contributions by symmetry. Analytical results for low-energy models of topological band crossings, which are hotspots of quantum geometry, demonstrate how band topology influences each contribution. In particular, the intraQMD contribution is especially large in gapped Dirac cones in antiferromagnets. Through a comprehensive symmetry classification of all magnetic space groups, we identify several candidate materials that are expected to exhibit large intrinsic NLHE, including the topological antiferromagnets Yb₃Pt₄, CuMnAs, and CoNb₃S₆, as well as the nodal-plane material MnNb₃S₆.
