强自旋-轨道与交换相互作用Ni/Bi双层超导体中的涡旋输运#

Vortex Transport in Ni/Bi Bilayer Superconductor with Strong Spin-Orbit and Exchange Interaction
📚 arXiv👤 Laxmipriya Nanda, Sohini Guin, Yasen Hou, Rajib Sarkar, Naresh Shyaga, Souvik Banerjee, A. Sundaresan, N. S. Vidhyadhiraja, Jagadeesh S. Moodera, Dhavala Suri📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地在强自旋-轨道耦合与交换相互作用共存的Ni/Bi双层中实现高温超导（3-4 K），远超单层Bi的10 mK临界温度。通过涡旋输运实验揭示Magnus力与粘滞力竞争机制，并以铁磁绝缘体对照
该工作以Ni/Bi双层为研究平台，探索强自旋轨道耦合磁性环境中的Cooper配对。铁磁Ni与仅在约10 mK以下超导的强自旋轨道金属Bi耦合形成的双层在3-4 K表现出超导性。近Tc区的磁输运研究揭示了涡旋动力学和交换近邻效应：孤立涡旋对垂直外场敏感响应，产生可归因于Magnus力与粘滞力竞争的反对称横向电阻峰。以铁磁绝缘体为对照实验确认超导性贯穿整个双层而非仅局限于界面，结果表明观测可由常规s波序参量统一解释，非常规贡献较为细微。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作以Ni/Bi双层为研究平台，探索强自旋轨道耦合磁性环境中的Cooper配对。铁磁Ni与仅在约10 mK以下超导的强自旋轨道金属Bi耦合形成的双层在3-4 K表现出超导性。近Tc区的磁输运研究揭示了涡旋动力学和交换近邻效应：孤立涡旋对垂直外场敏感响应，产生可归因于Magnus力与粘滞力竞争的反对称横向电阻峰。以铁磁绝缘体为对照实验确认超导性贯穿整个双层而非仅局限于界面，结果表明观测可由常规s波序参量统一解释，非常规贡献较为细微。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02677v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Nickel/bismuth (Ni/Bi) bilayers are a promising platform for exploring unconventional superconductivity. Ferromagnetic Ni is coupled to Bi, a strong spin orbit metal that only becomes superconducting below approx 10 mK, forming a bilayer exhibits superconductivity at a much higher temperatures, a Tc of 3 to 4 K. Such a bilayer thus makes an ideal system to probe Cooper pairing in strong spin orbit coupled magnetic environments. Magneto transport studies near Tc reveal the behavior of vortex dynamics and exchange proximity effects. It is seen that isolated vortices of the bilayers respond sensitively to out of plane fields, producing antisymmetric transverse resistance peaks attributable to competing Magnus and viscous forces. Control experiments using a ferromagnetic insulator confirm that superconductivity extends throughout the bilayer, not just confined at the interface. Overall, the results provide a unified picture of transport dominated by vortex dynamics and show that a conventional s wave order parameter accounts for the observations, with any likely unconventional contributions being only subtle.

91

受挫蜂窝晶格反铁磁体中的奇异磁性与持续短程自旋关联#

Exotic magnetism and persistent short-range spin correlations in a frustrated honeycomb lattice antiferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 M. Barik, Q. Faure, F. Damay, J. P. Embs, S. Petit, P. Khuntia📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在S=5/2高自旋受挫蜂窝晶格中发现了经典与量子磁性交织的奇异激发谱，揭示场诱导自旋倾斜态及持续短程关联，为理解强受挫磁体的量子临界行为与新奇物态提供了关键实验体系。
该工作报道了S=5/2畸变蜂窝磁体CaZn₂Fe(PO₄)₃的晶体结构、磁化、比热和非弹性中子散射测量结果。磁化测量揭示Fe³⁺ (S=5/2)矩之间的主导反铁磁相互作用，外场下磁化率中的凹陷及其场演化表明非常规场诱导相变，零场比热显示T_N≈1.67 K的反铁磁相变并随磁场演化，暗示场诱导自旋倾斜态的稳定化。热力学测量揭示转变温度以上的短程自旋关联，非弹性中子散射进一步表征了该高自旋受挫蜂窝体系中经典与量子磁性交织导致的奇异激发行为。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道了S=5/2畸变蜂窝磁体CaZn₂Fe(PO₄)₃的晶体结构、磁化、比热和非弹性中子散射测量结果。磁化测量揭示Fe³⁺ (S=5/2)矩之间的主导反铁磁相互作用，外场下磁化率中的凹陷及其场演化表明非常规场诱导相变，零场比热显示T_N≈1.67 K的反铁磁相变并随磁场演化，暗示场诱导自旋倾斜态的稳定化。热力学测量揭示转变温度以上的短程自旋关联，非弹性中子散射进一步表征了该高自旋受挫蜂窝体系中经典与量子磁性交织导致的奇异激发行为。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02683v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Two-dimensional high-spin bipartite honeycomb networks, where anisotropy, competing exchange interactions, and spin fluctuations interplay, provide an alternative platform to test theoretical models that distinguish between classical and quantum magnetism in the context of emergent many-body phenomena and exotic excitations. Here, we report the crystal structure, magnetization, specific heat, and inelastic neutron scattering measurements of the S = 5/2 distorted honeycomb magnet CaZn₂Fe(PO₄₎₃. Magnetization measurements reveal dominant antiferromagnetic interactions between the mathrmFe³⁺ (S = 5/2) moments. The development and field evolution of a dip in the magnetic susceptibility under an external magnetic field indicate an unconventional field-induced transition, further supported by anomalies observed in magnetization isotherms. Zero-field specific heat measurements show an antiferromagnetic transition at T_N approx 1.67 K, which evolves under applied magnetic field, suggesting stabilization of a field-induced spin-canted state. Thermodynamic measurements reveal short-range spin correlations above the transition temperature. Inelastic neutron scattering results further corroborate antiferromagnetic ordering, consistent with specific heat data. Spin-wave calculations indicate competing exchange interactions that introduce magnetic frustration, along with weak Ising-like anisotropy. The interplay of competing interactions and anisotropy gives rise to exotic field-induced behavior and places the system in close proximity to a mean-field tricritical point in the J₂/J₁₋₋J₃/J₁ phase diagram, opening a route to unconventional states in high-spin frustrated honeycomb magnets.

92

超导双层镍酸盐中的层间五自旋极化子#

Interlayer Five-Spin Polaron in Superconducting Bilayer Nickelates
📚 arXiv👤 Jiarui Li, Christopher T. Parzyck, Eder G. Lomeli, Yidi Liu, Taehun Kim, Heemin Lee, Zengqing Zhuo, Eun Kyo Ko, Yaoju Tarn, Cheng-Tai Kuo, Ronny Sutarto, Chunjing Jia, Vivek Thampy, Brian Moritz, Yijun Yu, Jun-Sik Lee, Valentina Bisogni, Thomas P. Devereaux, Harold Y. Hwang, Wei-Sheng Lee📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在超导双层镍酸盐中揭示层间五自旋极化子驱动的自旋密度波序，阐明氧化学计量与缺陷分别稳定超导相和SDW相的相分离机制，为镍基高温超导的微观配对机制提供了决定性实验判据。
该工作利用共振X射线散射研究超导双层镍酸盐薄膜La₂PrNi₂O₇中的自旋密度波(SDW)序，发现超导性出现在无SDW的氧化学计量区域，而氧缺陷促进SDW有序，表明SDW与超导性存在相分离。Ni-L₃和O-K边光谱揭示两种畴在c轴方向具有不同的电子结构，为理解镍酸盐超导微观机制提供了关键实验依据。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用共振X射线散射研究超导双层镍酸盐薄膜La₂PrNi₂O₇中的自旋密度波(SDW)序，发现超导性出现在无SDW的氧化学计量区域，而氧缺陷促进SDW有序，表明SDW与超导性存在相分离。Ni-L₃和O-K边光谱揭示两种畴在c轴方向具有不同的电子结构，为理解镍酸盐超导微观机制提供了关键实验依据。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02891v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The discovery of high-T_c superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates has sparked substantial effort towards understanding unconventional electronic states beyond a traditional cuprate-like d⁹ configurational ground state. An understanding of the interplay between magnetic ground states and multi-orbital physics is key for establishing a microscopic mechanism for superconductivity. In the bilayer nickelates, spin density wave (SDW) order is a prominent feature in the non-superconducting regime. However, its relation to superconducting pairing remains an open question. Here, we use resonant x-ray scattering to examine the existence of SDW order in superconducting bilayer nickelate thin films La₂PrNi₂O₇ (LPNO). Comparing superconducting and oxygen-deficient LPNO thin films, we find that superconductivity occurs in SDW-free, oxygen-stoichiometric regions, whereas oxygen-deficiency promotes SDW order, indicating phase segregation of SDW and superconductivity. Furthermore, Ni-L₃ and O-K edge spectroscopy reveals distinct electronic structures - particularly along the c-axis - between the two domains. Our results identify oxygen stoichiometry as a key parameter controlling interlayer coupling and thus the electronic structure of bilayer nickelates. In concert with theory, we propose that a ligand hole primarily resides at the inter-bilayer apical oxygen, forming a robust interlayer five-spin polaron state, which serves as the ground state for superconducting bilayer nickelates.

93

长程相互作用与非厄米性协同增强的量子传感#

Quantum-enhanced sensing from the interplay of long-range interactions and non-Hermiticity
📚 arXiv👤 Keshav Das Agarwal, Tanoy Kanti Konar, Leela Ganesh Chandra Lakkaraju, Aditi Sen De📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示长程相互作用与非厄米性的协同增强机制，突破传统短程厄米体系的计量极限，为设计超越标准量子极限的量子传感器提供了新范式，并澄清了非厄米计量优势的适用边界。
该研究探讨长程XX自旋模型与环境耦合产生的有效长程RT对称非厄米iXY哈密顿量中的参数估计问题。通过分析动力学量子Fisher信息(QFI)，发现适当调参下长程体系在时间标度和系统尺寸标度上均优于短程对应物，且非厄米长程模型可超越相应厄米模型的动力学QFI，证明长程相互作用与非厄米效应协同诱导真正的计量学优势。该工作同时建立了特定条件下的不可能性结果。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究探讨长程XX自旋模型与环境耦合产生的有效长程RT对称非厄米iXY哈密顿量中的参数估计问题。通过分析动力学量子Fisher信息(QFI)，发现适当调参下长程体系在时间标度和系统尺寸标度上均优于短程对应物，且非厄米长程模型可超越相应厄米模型的动力学QFI，证明长程相互作用与非厄米效应协同诱导真正的计量学优势。该工作同时建立了特定条件下的不可能性结果。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.01912v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Long-range (LR) quantum spin systems offer promising advantages for quantum information processing and sensing. Here, we investigate parameter estimation in an long-range XX spin model coupled to a reservoir, which gives rise to an effective long-range RT-symmetric non-Hermitian iXY Hamiltonian. The interactions extend up to a tunable coordination range and decay algebraically with distance, enabling a direct comparison between long-range and short-range (SR) regimes. Focusing on the estimation of the transverse magnetic field and anisotropy parameter, we initialize the system in a fully polarized state and analyze the resulting dynamical quantum Fisher information (QFI). We show that, with suitable tuning of the system parameters, both the time and system-size scaling of the QFI are enhanced in the LR regime relative to their SR counterparts. Moreover, the non-Hermitian LR model can exhibit superior dynamical QFI compared with the corresponding Hermitian model, demonstrating a genuine metrological advantage induced by the interplay of long-range interactions and non-Hermitian effects. In contrast, we establish a no-go result at the critical magnetic field: when the probe is prepared in the lowest-energy eigenstate, the QFI scaling remains identical for the Hermitian and non-Hermitian cases.

94

自旋电子学与磁子学讲义#

Lectures on spintronics and magnonics
📚 arXiv👤 M. Mazanov, V. A. Shklovskij📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该讲义以Landauer散射矩阵方法统一推导自旋转移力矩与自旋泵浦效应，建立量子-经典衔接框架；通过对比反铁磁与铁磁动力学，揭示反铁磁材料在高频、无杂散场器件中的独特优势，为低能耗自旋电子学器件设计提
该系列讲义系统阐述磁子学与自旋电子学的核心理论概念。内容涵盖量子力学、连续介质电动力学及磁学基础，继而讨论磁动力学经典理论（铁磁/反铁磁共振、动态磁化率、自旋波），重点分析自旋流、交换自旋流、自旋力矩、自旋霍尔效应及相关磁电阻现象。特别详述自旋转移力矩与自旋泵浦效应的Landauer量子多通道散射矩阵推导，并对比反铁磁与铁磁动力学的关键差异，指出反铁磁材料在自旋电子学与磁子学中的独特应用前景。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该系列讲义系统阐述磁子学与自旋电子学的核心理论概念。内容涵盖量子力学、连续介质电动力学及磁学基础，继而讨论磁动力学经典理论（铁磁/反铁磁共振、动态磁化率、自旋波），重点分析自旋流、交换自旋流、自旋力矩、自旋霍尔效应及相关磁电阻现象。特别详述自旋转移力矩与自旋泵浦效应的Landauer量子多通道散射矩阵推导，并对比反铁磁与铁磁动力学的关键差异，指出反铁磁材料在自旋电子学与磁子学中的独特应用前景。

English Abstract

arXiv:2305.04385v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this series of lectures, we discuss the basic theoretical concepts of magnonics and spintronics. We first briefly recall the relevant topics from quantum mechanics, electrodynamics of continuous media, and basic theory of magnetism. We then discuss the classical theory of magnetic dynamics: ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic resonance, dynamic susceptibilities, and spin waves. We open the main discussion with phenomena of spin and exchange spin currents, spin torques, the spin Hall effect, and the spin Hall and Hanle magnetoresistance. Special emphasis is given to the effects of spin transfer torque and spin pumping, where we follow the celebrated derivation utilizing Landauer quantum multi-channel scattering matrix approach. Finally, we outline the most important features distinguishing antiferromagnetic dynamics from ferromagnetic one, which make antiferromagnets particularly promising material candidates for spintronics and magnonics.

95

基于凝聚基态的位移型铁电体自洽计算框架#

A Self-Consistent Computational Framework for Displacive Ferroelectrics from the Condensed Ground State
📚 arXiv👤 F. Yang, L. Q. Chen📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该框架以量子统计自洽处理极化涨落，突破Landau-Ginzburg理论依赖先验临界知识的局限，仅通过基态计算即可预测全温区介电与铁电响应，为位移型铁电体的有限温度热力学和相变行为提供首性原理级预测工
该工作发展了一种基于量子统计描述极化涨落的自洽微观计算框架，用于预测位移型铁电体的有限温度热力学性质与相变临界行为。该方法仅需基态性质即可预测全温区介电/铁电响应，无需Landau-Ginzburg理论所需的先验临界知识或温度依赖参数拟合。应用于经典铁电体PbTiO₃、量子顺电体SrTiO₃和KTaO₃，以及应变铁电SrTiO₃，与实验测量在全温区取得显著定量一致。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展了一种基于量子统计描述极化涨落的自洽微观计算框架，用于预测位移型铁电体的有限温度热力学性质与相变临界行为。该方法仅需基态性质即可预测全温区介电/铁电响应，无需Landau-Ginzburg理论所需的先验临界知识或温度依赖参数拟合。应用于经典铁电体PbTiO₃、量子顺电体SrTiO₃和KTaO₃，以及应变铁电SrTiO₃，与实验测量在全温区取得显著定量一致。

English Abstract

arXiv:2412.04308v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Quantitative description of finite-temperature properties of displacive ferroelectrics, and in particular the critical behavior, is of fundamental importance to both theory and device design, going beyond the Landau-Ginzburg approach, which requires known knowledge of critical behaviors and temperature-dependent parameter fitting. Here within quantum statistic description of polarization fluctuations, we develop a self-consistent, microscopically based computationalframework for finite-temperature thermodynamics and phase transitions in displacive ferroelectrics. It enables one to use only the ground-state properties to predict the finite-temperature properties and in particular, the criticality of phase transitions of various displacive ferroelectrics. Its applications to the classical ferroelectric PbTiO₃, quantum paraelectrics SrTiO₃ and KTaO₃, and recently fabricated ferroelectric strained SrTiO₃, demonstrate remarkable quantitative agreements with the experimentally measured dielectric/ferroelectric properties throughout the entire temperature ranges of the phases, including the critical behaviors of phase transitions. The proposed computational framework offers a tractable quantitative basis for bridging microscopic ground-state modeling and macroscopic device-level design in a broad range of ferroelectric systems under diverse thermodynamic and external conditions.

96

Z₂自旋液体结中的可调任意子穿透性#

Tunable anyonic permeability across Z₂ spin liquid junctions
📚 arXiv👤 Sayak Bhattacharjee, Soumya Sur, Adhip Agarwala📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地设计了两类拓扑结结构，首次实现了对任意子输运的选择性调控：势垒结可令电荷完全透明而磁单极子受阈值控制，非对易缝合结则通过赝自旋涨落动态调制透射。为拓扑量子计算中任意子编织与门操控提供了可
该工作研究toric code模型（Z₂量子自旋液体原型）中两类结结构的任意子输运性质。第一类势垒结中，电荷感受有效静态势和能带质量变化，特定实现下电荷载流子完全透明而磁单极子仅在超过临界场强后透射。第二类结通过非对易算符缝合两个toric code，任意子透射受结处有效赝自旋涨落调控。利用精确解析映射和数值模拟计算电荷分辨透射概率，为拓扑有序系统中缺陷结构工程化实现任意子可调输运提供理论依据。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究toric code模型（Z₂量子自旋液体原型）中两类结结构的任意子输运性质。第一类势垒结中，电荷感受有效静态势和能带质量变化，特定实现下电荷载流子完全透明而磁单极子仅在超过临界场强后透射。第二类结通过非对易算符缝合两个toric code，任意子透射受结处有效赝自旋涨落调控。利用精确解析映射和数值模拟计算电荷分辨透射概率，为拓扑有序系统中缺陷结构工程化实现任意子可调输运提供理论依据。

English Abstract

arXiv:2506.17394v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce two classes of junctions in a toric code, a prototypical model of a Z₂ quantum spin liquid, and study the nature of anyonic transport across them mediated by Zeeman fields. In the first class of junctions, termed potential barrier junctions, the charges sense effective static potentials and a change in the band mass. In a particular realization, while the junction is completely transparent to the electric charge, magnetic charge transmission is allowed only after a critical field strength. In the second class of junctions we stitch two toric codes with operators which do not commute at the junction. We show that the anyonic transmission gets tuned by effective pseudospin fluctuations at the junction. Using exact analytical mappings and numerical simulations, we compute charge-specific transmission probabilities. Our work, apart from uncovering the rich physical mechanisms at play in such junctions, can motivate experimental work to engineer defect structures in topologically ordered systems for tunable transport of anyonic particles.

97

YCl电子化物作为多轨道关联拓扑骰子晶格体系#

YCl Electride as a Multi-Orbital Correlated Topological Dice Lattice System
📚 arXiv👤 Jianqi Zhong, Songyuan Geng, Teng-Fei Ying, Haoxiang Li, Benjamin T. Zhou📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统单轨道骰子晶格框架，首次在YCl电子化物中建立多轨道Hubbard模型，揭示层-轨道-谷耦合对平带物理的支配作用；预言了单轨道模型无法描述的电控关联量子反常霍尔相，为关联拓扑材料设计提供
该工作揭示二维层状电子化物YCl中独特的层-轨道-谷耦合阻碍简单三带骰子晶格模型描述其平带，需采用多轨道Hubbard模型忠实表征首例骰子金属的对称性、拓扑与关联物理。基于第一性原理的多轨道模型预测多轨道平带支持稳健铁磁基态和电控关联量子反常霍尔相，这些现象在单轨道骰子晶格中不存在，为电子化物体系中关联与拓扑研究开辟新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作揭示二维层状电子化物YCl中独特的层-轨道-谷耦合阻碍简单三带骰子晶格模型描述其平带，需采用多轨道Hubbard模型忠实表征首例骰子金属的对称性、拓扑与关联物理。基于第一性原理的多轨道模型预测多轨道平带支持稳健铁磁基态和电控关联量子反常霍尔相，这些现象在单轨道骰子晶格中不存在，为电子化物体系中关联与拓扑研究开辟新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.05958v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The long-sought dice lattice flat band has recently been discovered for the first time in two-dimensional layered electride yttrium monochloride (YCl) [Nature Communications 17, 2213 (2026)]. While essential flat band features of YCl were captured by an idealized simple dice lattice model, we reveal in this Letter that a unique layer-orbital-valley coupling in YCl puts up a fundamental obstruction against a simple three-band dice lattice description of the flat band, and necessitates a multi-orbital description that faithfully represents the symmetry, topology, and correlation physics in the first-ever dice metal. Using an ab initio based multi-orbital Hubbard model with local interactions, we predict that the multi-orbital flat band supports a robust ferromagnetic ground state and electrically tunable correlated quantum anomalous Hall phases that are absent in an interacting single-orbital dice lattice. Our findings open a new avenue for exploring correlation and topology in electride systems.

98

平面畴壁环的几何流#

Geometric flow of planar domain-wall loops
📚 arXiv👤 Pablo Domenichini, German Salazar, Alejandro B. Kolton📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作建立畴壁环几何演化的闭合动力学方程，将复杂场论约化为低维拓扑变量描述，发现无外驱动时自发磁化弛豫率呈量子化跳变规律；外场下界面稀疏相互作用破坏非交叉约束，为理解拓扑缺陷动力学与磁化弛豫机制提供了
该工作研究二维弹性畴壁环的几何演化，假设畴壁对外部压力和局域有符号曲率的响应为瞬时、各向同性和均匀的弧速度响应，推导闭合动力学方程关联包围面积与环周长。该约化描述可预测含时Ginzburg-Landau标量φ⁴模型中自发与外加驱动畴的动力学。线性响应区（无外驱动时满足非交叉原理）获得精确结果：任意初始条件（含多环嵌套）下总自发磁化弛豫率量子化，离散跳变对应单个环塌缩事件。外驱动下规避原理因界面稀疏相互作用而失效。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究二维弹性畴壁环的几何演化，假设畴壁对外部压力和局域有符号曲率的响应为瞬时、各向同性和均匀的弧速度响应，推导闭合动力学方程关联包围面积与环周长。该约化描述可预测含时Ginzburg-Landau标量φ⁴模型中自发与外加驱动畴的动力学。线性响应区（无外驱动时满足非交叉原理）获得精确结果：任意初始条件（含多环嵌套）下总自发磁化弛豫率量子化，离散跳变对应单个环塌缩事件。外驱动下规避原理因界面稀疏相互作用而失效。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.24883v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We investigate the geometric evolution of elastic domain-wall loops in two dimensions. Assuming an instantaneous, isotropic, and homogeneous arc-velocity response of the domain wall to external pressure and local signed curvature, we derive closed dynamical equations linking the enclosed area and loop perimeter for both linear and nonlinear arc-velocity response functions. This reduced description enables predictions for the dynamics of both spontaneous and externally driven domains-subjected to constant or alternating fields-within the time-dependent Ginzburg-Landau scalar φ ⁴ model. In the linear response regime, where a non-crossing principle holds in the absence of external driving, we obtain exact results. In particular, we demonstrate that the relaxation rate of the total spontaneous magnetization becomes quantized for arbitrary initial conditions involving multiple, possibly nested, loops, with discrete jumps corresponding to individual loop collapse events. Under external driving, the avoidance principle breaks down due to sparse interactions between interfaces-either within a single loop or between multiple loops-leading to coalescence or splitting events that change the number of loops. A quantized geometrical observable involving the total area and perimeter is identified in this case as well, exhibiting discrete jumps both at interface interaction events and at individual loop collapses. We further use approximate area-perimeter relations to estimate the spontaneous collapse lifetimes of compact magnetic domains, as well as their dynamics under alternating-field-assisted collapse in disordered ultrathin magnetic films. Our predictions are compared with experimental observations in such systems.

99

全入全出烧绿石Nd₂Sn₂O₇中的动态矩分裂#

Dynamical moment fragmentation in the all-in all-out pyrochlore Nd2Sn2O7
📚 arXiv👤 Yi Luo, Matthew S. Powell, Joseph A. M. Paddison, Brenden R. Ortiz, J. Ross Stewart, Joseph W. Kolis, Adam A. Aczel📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在全入全出有序态的Nd₂Sn₂O₇单晶中观测到动态矩分裂，以偶极-八极自旋哈密顿量定量解释了独特的半月形色散与平坦能带特征，排除了无能隙光子激发，为库仑反铁磁理论提供了关键约束，确立了该材料
该工作通过单晶中子谱学和体表征在水热法生长的Nd₂Sn₂O₇中揭示嵌入全入全出有序态的动态矩分裂。谱学显示近平坦能带与 pinch-point 型动量依赖，伴随色散支在多布里渊区产生半月形特征。最小偶极-八极自旋哈密顿量定量捕捉这些特征，实验与理论高度一致。较高平坦模能量解释先前μSR研究未观测到动态干涉的原因，无能隙光子型激发的缺失对提出的库仑反铁磁方案施加严格约束，将动态矩分裂拓展至Nd₂Sn₂O₇并确立其为涌现规范场物理和多极自…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过单晶中子谱学和体表征在水热法生长的Nd₂Sn₂O₇中揭示嵌入全入全出有序态的动态矩分裂。谱学显示近平坦能带与 pinch-point 型动量依赖，伴随色散支在多布里渊区产生半月形特征。最小偶极-八极自旋哈密顿量定量捕捉这些特征，实验与理论高度一致。较高平坦模能量解释先前μSR研究未观测到动态干涉的原因，无能隙光子型激发的缺失对提出的库仑反铁磁方案施加严格约束，将动态矩分裂拓展至Nd₂Sn₂O₇并确立其为涌现规范场物理和多极自旋波动力学研究的理想平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.04845v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We report single-crystal neutron spectroscopy and bulk characterization on hydrothermally grown Nd2Sn2O7, revealing a dynamical moment fragmentation embedded within the all-in-all-out ordered state. The spectra show a nearly flat band with pinch-point-like momentum dependence, accompanied by dispersive branches that generate half-moon features across multiple Brillouin zones. These defining signatures are captured quantitatively by a minimal dipolar-octupolar spin Hamiltonian, demonstrating excellent agreement between experiment and theory. The higher flat-mode energy helps account for the absence of dynamical interference in prior muon spin relaxation (muSR) studies, while the lack of any photon-like excitation imposes strict constraints on the proposed Coulombic antiferromagnet scenario. Our results extend dynamical moment fragmentation to Nd2Sn2O7 and identify it as a clean, tractable platform for quantitative exploration of emergent gauge-field physics and multipolar spin-wave dynamics in frustrated magnets.

100

交换交替自旋-1纳米石墨烯链中的两种拓扑相#

Two topological phases in exchange alternating spin-1 nanographene chains
📚 arXiv👤 João C. G. Henriques, Yelko del Castillo, Ricardo Segundo, Jan Phillips, Joaquín Fernández-Rossier📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破Haldane相的传统框架，在自旋-1纳米石墨烯链中发现新型二聚化拓扑相及其涌现边缘自旋-1，首次将键交替机制引入纳米石墨烯量子磁体；通过多尺度计算锁定实验可合成的具体分子体系，为拓扑量子材
该工作提出利用自旋-1纳米石墨烯构建键交替链，探索Haldane相之外的二聚化相（具有涌现的边缘自旋-1）。结合DMRG、多组态和第一性原理计算，确定了两个实验候选材料（扩展Clar高脚杯和钝化[4]-三角烯），并分析了双二次交换对相边界的决定作用及实验区分方法。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出利用自旋-1纳米石墨烯构建键交替链，探索Haldane相之外的二聚化相（具有涌现的边缘自旋-1）。结合DMRG、多组态和第一性原理计算，确定了两个实验候选材料（扩展Clar高脚杯和钝化[4]-三角烯），并分析了双二次交换对相边界的决定作用及实验区分方法。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.23555v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Magnetic nanographenes are emerging as versatile building blocks for artificial spin lattices, enabling the exploration of flagship one-dimensional quantum-magnetism models with unprecedented control. The spin-1 Heisenberg model, including bilinear and biquadratic exchange, was first realized using [3]-triangulenes, revealing the Haldane phase. More recently, Clar's goblets enabled the spin-1/2 Heisenberg model with exchange alternation, uncovering additional topological phases. Here we show that spin-1 nanographenes can be used to explore bond-alternating chains both in the Haldane phase and beyond it, in a dimerized phase with emergent edge spin-1. We use density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) to analyze how biquadratic exchange, which is known to be large in spin-1 nanographenes, determines the phase transition boundary. Combining multiconfigurational and first-principles calculations, we identify two realistic candidates to realize these two different phases: the recently synthesized extended Clar's goblet and a passivated [4]-triangulene. We demonstrate how to distinguish these phases experimentally using inelastic electron tunneling spectroscopy, paving the way for their observation.

101

含晶体学缺陷Kitaev蜂窝模型中的手征自旋液体不稳定性#

Chiral spin liquid instability of the Kitaev honeycomb model with crystallographic defects
📚 arXiv👤 Arnab Seth, Fay Borhani, Itamar Kimchi📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示了一种"缺陷工程"调控量子自旋液体的新范式：极低密度的拓扑晶格缺陷即可破坏无隙自旋液体的稳定性，通过涌现的长程铁磁相互作用驱动系统进入非阿贝尔手征自旋液体相。这为在真实材料中实现可观测的拓扑
该工作研究含Stone-Wales型奇数边局域晶格缺陷的Kitaev蜂窝无隙自旋液体，发现缺陷密度n_d≈10⁻⁴–10⁻²可诱导真正的有限温相变（T_c≈2n_d），形成非阿贝尔手征量子自旋液体。缺陷手征性通过近无能隙费米子介导涌现长程铁磁相互作用（r⁻ᵞ，γ≈2.7），导致标量自旋手征性和电子轨道磁化在缺陷附近峰值。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究含Stone-Wales型奇数边局域晶格缺陷的Kitaev蜂窝无隙自旋液体，发现缺陷密度n_d≈10⁻⁴–10⁻²可诱导真正的有限温相变（T_c≈2n_d），形成非阿贝尔手征量子自旋液体。缺陷手征性通过近无能隙费米子介导涌现长程铁磁相互作用（r⁻ᵞ，γ≈2.7），导致标量自旋手征性和电子轨道磁化在缺陷附近峰值。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.19409v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study the spin-1/2 Kitaev honeycomb gapless spin liquid in the presence of Stone-Wales-type local lattice defects with odd-sided plaquettes. While the clean Kitaev model has no finite-temperature phase transitions, we find that introducing a finite defect density n_dapprox 10⁻⁴--10⁻² produces a true phase transition with a sizeable T_c approx 2 n_d in units of the Kitaev exchange. The resulting non-Abelian chiral quantum spin liquid exhibits scalar spin chirality and electron orbital magnetization which peak near lattice defects. This disorder-driven instability relies on an emergent long range ferromagnetic interaction r⁻γ (γ approx 2.7) between defect chiralities, mediated by the nearly-gapless fermions, with implications for topology generation in Dirac cones with fluctuating mass terms.

102

无序材料和异质结构中超导性与交替磁性的相互作用#

Interplay between Superconductivity and Altermagnetism in Disordered Materials and Heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Rodrigo de las Heras, Tim Kokkeler, Stefan Ilić, Ilya V. Tokatly, F. Sebastian Bergeret📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示超导序参量空间梯度与交替磁性的直接耦合机制，突破传统仅考虑相位效应的框架。发现两种新奇磁电效应在涡旋中竞争，并为超导-交替磁体异质结构中的邻近磁化提供全新理论解释，对拓扑超导器件设计具有
该工作基于量子动力学输运方程研究无序系统中超导性与交替磁性的耦合，导出Ginzburg-Landau自由能并发现自旋与超导序参量空间变化的耦合项。由此产生两种效应：超流诱导自旋纹理的非线性磁电效应，以及序参量幅度空间变化导致的磁化；二者在Abrikosov涡旋中竞争。幅度变化效应还在超导体-交替磁体异质结构中产生邻近诱导磁化。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于量子动力学输运方程研究无序系统中超导性与交替磁性的耦合，导出Ginzburg-Landau自由能并发现自旋与超导序参量空间变化的耦合项。由此产生两种效应：超流诱导自旋纹理的非线性磁电效应，以及序参量幅度空间变化导致的磁化；二者在Abrikosov涡旋中竞争。幅度变化效应还在超导体-交替磁体异质结构中产生邻近诱导磁化。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.04819v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study the interplay between superconductivity and altermagnetism in disordered systems using recently derived quantum kinetic transport equations. Starting from this framework, we derive the Ginzburg-Landau free energy and identify, in addition to the conventional pair-breaking term, a coupling between the spin and the spatial variation of the superconducting order parameter. Two distinct effects emerge from this coupling. The first is a nonlinear magnetoelectric effect, in which a supercurrent (i.e., a phase gradient) induces a spin texture; this contribution is quadratic in the phase gradient. The second effect arises when the magnitude, rather than the phase, of the superconducting order parameter varies in space, likewise leading to a finite magnetization. We show that these two contributions compete in the case of an Abrikosov vortex, where both the amplitude and phase of the order parameter vary spatially. The effect associated with amplitude variations also gives rise to a proximity-induced magnetization (PIM) in hybrid structures composed of a superconductor (S) and an altermagnet (AM). Using quasiclassical theory, we analyze the PIM in diffusive S/AM bilayers and S/AM/S Josephson junctions, and determine the induced magnetization profiles. In Josephson junctions, where both the PIM and the nonlinear magnetoelectric effect coexist, we further predict the occurrence of 0-π transitions.

103

铁磁AT6X6笼目化合物的计算预测#

Computational prediction of ferromagnetic AT6X6 kagome compounds
📚 arXiv👤 Shiya Chen, Zhen Zhang, Vladimir Antropov, Yang Sun📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作通过高通量计算系统探索了笼目晶格中磁序-结构-电子态的构效关系，突破性地揭示Mn基体系可实现铁磁基态与拓扑金属性的耦合，为量子反常霍尔效应等拓扑量子物态的材料设计提供了可化学调控的新平台。
该工作对磁性笼目AT6X6家族312种替代化合物进行高通量密度泛函理论筛选，确认多种已知结构稳定性并预测新候选材料。Fe基体系主要呈反铁磁基态，Mn基体系铁磁与反铁磁序分布更均衡。对近简并体系分析非共线序涌现可能性，新预测的铁磁笼目体系显示拓扑金属特征，磁构型可通过化学替代调控。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对磁性笼目AT6X6家族312种替代化合物进行高通量密度泛函理论筛选，确认多种已知结构稳定性并预测新候选材料。Fe基体系主要呈反铁磁基态，Mn基体系铁磁与反铁磁序分布更均衡。对近简并体系分析非共线序涌现可能性，新预测的铁磁笼目体系显示拓扑金属特征，磁构型可通过化学替代调控。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.13431v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present a systematic high-throughput density-functional-theory investigation of the structural and magnetic stability of 312 substitutional compounds in the magnetic kagome AT6X6 family. Our screening confirms the stability of many previously reported structures and predicts several additional stable candidates. Within collinear spin configurations, we find that Fe-based systems predominantly adopt antiferromagnetic ground states, whereas Mn-based analogues exhibit a more balanced distribution between ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic order. For compounds exhibiting several nearly degenerate collinear configurations, we analyze the nature of their magnetic ground states, assess the possible emergence of non-collinear order, and discuss the limitations and uncertainties inherent to standard density-functional approaches. Our electronic-structure analysis further reveals that newly predicted ferromagnetic kagome systems display characteristic features of topological metals, with rich magnetic configurations that can be tuned by chemical substitution. Overall, these ferromagnetic kagome compounds constitute a broad and still largely unexplored materials platform for the emergence of exciting magneto-transport phenomena.

104

Kitaev自旋液体中Stone-Wales型晶格缺陷产生的手征性与轨道磁化#

Generation of chirality and orbital magnetization by Stone-Wales-type lattice defects in the Kitaev spin liquid
📚 arXiv👤 Arnab Seth, Fay Borhani, Itamar Kimchi📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示Kitaev自旋液体中Stone-Wales晶格缺陷可自发产生时间反演对称破缺的手征基态，通过Majorana局域Chern标记与轨道磁化表征。核心创新在于证明缺陷手征性可诱导拓扑能隙并稳定
该工作研究Kitaev蜂窝自旋液体无隙相中Stone-Wales型局域缺陷（90°键旋转，保持Kitaev键标签），涉及奇数边 plaquette 和±π/2磁通。孤立缺陷承载具有大净手征性的时间反演对基态，手征性体现在Majorana局域Chern标记和标量自旋手征性中，产生电子轨道磁化。有限缺陷密度下T矩阵分析和数值计算显示缺陷手征性打开拓扑能隙（11n_d），保护Chern数C=±1，涌现长程Ising相互作用导致有限温相变进入…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究Kitaev蜂窝自旋液体无隙相中Stone-Wales型局域缺陷（90°键旋转，保持Kitaev键标签），涉及奇数边 plaquette 和±π/2磁通。孤立缺陷承载具有大净手征性的时间反演对基态，手征性体现在Majorana局域Chern标记和标量自旋手征性中，产生电子轨道磁化。有限缺陷密度下T矩阵分析和数值计算显示缺陷手征性打开拓扑能隙（11n_d），保护Chern数C=±1，涌现长程Ising相互作用导致有限温相变进入手征自旋液体。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.13490v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this work we extend our study of the effect of certain crystallographic defects on the spin-1/2 Kitaev honeycomb spin liquid (arXiv:2511.19409), focusing on its gapless phase and contrasting with the gapped phase. We identify a Stone-Wales (SW) local defect consisting of a 90ⁱ̧rc bond rotation that preserves Kitaev bond labels for edge-sharing octahedra and thereby enables exact solvability. These SW-type defects involve odd-sided plaquettes with ± π/2 fluxes, but can be created locally. An isolated defect hosts a time-reversal pair of ground-state flux configurations with large net chirality. Certain excitations are also chiral. The chirality manifests in Majorana local Chern marker and in scalar spin chirality, producing electronic orbital magnetization. T-matrix analysis and numerics at finite defect density n_d show that defect chiralities generate a topological gap of 11 n_d protecting a Chern number C=± 1. Emergent ferromagnetic long range Ising interactions r⁻γ with 2<γ < 3 between defect chiralities lead to a finite temperature T_c phase transition into the chiral spin liquid. The T_c is proportional to n_d and diverges when γi̊ghtarrow 2. We also consider additional solvable impurity potentials and find that γ can be reduced to below 2.3 and correspondingly enhance T_c. Our results offer applications to 2D Dirac cone systems with a finite density of fluctuating Ising magnetic impurities and to identifying spin liquids with lattice defects.

105

铌掺杂调控范德华铁磁体CrTe₂的自旋动力学#

Spin Dynamics in the van der Waals Ferromagnet CrTe2 Engineered by Niobium Doping
📚 arXiv👤 Dhan Raj Lawati, Prem Bahadur Karki, Jitender Kumar, Karishma Prasad, Mohamed A. Elekhtiar, Kai Huang, Bibek Tiwari, Suvechhya Lamichhane, Rupak Timalsina, Zane Hubble, Ayodimeji E. Aregbesola, John Watt, Sy-Hwang Liou, Evgeny Y. Tsymbal, Jian Wang, Kapildeb Ambal, Abdelghani Laraoui📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在二维范德华铁磁体中实现Nb掺杂对自旋动力学的大范围调控，将共振频率从40 GHz降至几GHz，同时保持室温铁磁性。为低功耗、高频自旋电子器件（如可调微波振荡器、磁存储）提供了兼具宽频可调性
该工作通过Nb替代Cr₁₋ₓNbₓTe₂（x=0–0.2）系统调控二维范德华铁磁体1T-CrTe₂的自旋动力学。铁磁共振谱学显示Nb掺杂可将共振频率从40 GHz宽范围调至几GHz，Gilbert阻尼常数从~0.066适度增至~0.14，同时保持室温铁磁性。磁测量显示居里温度和饱和磁化强度随Nb含量降低，DFT计算归因于磁各向异性和交换相互作用的Nb诱导修饰。~80 nm薄片比块体具有更低共振频率和阻尼。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过Nb替代Cr₁₋ₓNbₓTe₂（x=0–0.2）系统调控二维范德华铁磁体1T-CrTe₂的自旋动力学。铁磁共振谱学显示Nb掺杂可将共振频率从40 GHz宽范围调至几GHz，Gilbert阻尼常数从~0.066适度增至~0.14，同时保持室温铁磁性。磁测量显示居里温度和饱和磁化强度随Nb含量降低，DFT计算归因于磁各向异性和交换相互作用的Nb诱导修饰。~80 nm薄片比块体具有更低共振频率和阻尼。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.22058v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Understanding and controlling spin dynamics in two-dimensional (2D) van der Waals (vdW) ferromagnets is essential for their application in magnonics and hybrid quantum platforms. Here, we investigate the spin dynamics of the vdW ferromagnet 1T-CrTe₂ and demonstrate their systematic tunability via niobium (Nb) substitution in Cr₁₋ₓNbₓTe₂(x=0-0.2). Ferromagnetic resonance (FMR) spectroscopy reveals that Nb doping enables wide-band tuning of the resonance frequency from 40 GHz down to the few-GHz regime, accompanied by a moderate increase in the Gilbert damping constant from ~0.066 to ~0.14, while preserving robust room-temperature ferromagnetism. Complementary magnetometry shows a concurrent reduction of the Curie temperature and saturation magnetization with increasing Nb content. Density functional theory calculations attribute the observed spin-dynamic trends to Nb-induced modifications of magnetic anisotropy and magnetic exchange interactions. Furthermore, CrTe₂ flakes (~80 nm thick) exhibit lower resonance frequencies and damping than bulk crystals, consistent with thickness, surface/interface, and shape-dependent magnetic anisotropy. These results establish Nb-doped CrTe₂ as a tunable vdW ferromagnet with controllable spin dynamics, extending its functionality from spintronics to broadband magnonics and quantum magnonics.

106

扭曲偶极子团簇中的手性与时钟相#

Chiral and Clock phases in Twisted Dipolar Clusters
📚 arXiv👤 Paula Mellado, Xavier Cazor, Andres Concha📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次将几何扭转与磁偶极相互作用结合，揭示扭曲团簇中手性作为涌现伊辛自由度的物理图像，并创新性地引入时钟指标序参量刻画C_N对称性下的磁纹理分类。其意义在于为纳米磁体阵列、自旋电子器件中的拓扑态调
该研究探讨了扭曲多边形团簇上磁棒的偶极模型，发现多边形间相对扭转诱导非共线手性相，从磁通涡旋闭合组态到类刺猬径向构型。手性作为涌现的伊辛变量，可通过手性序参量和时钟指标序参量表征；随扭转角演化，磁纹理发生不连续切换。时钟指标基于多边形的C_N对称性，在固定手性 sector 内区分共享手性的纹理；N重各向异性导致倾斜的N重能量景观，其全局最小值在不同时钟 sector 间不连续跃迁。位点数增加时，响应呈现从刚性伊辛式到非线性交叉的转变。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究探讨了扭曲多边形团簇上磁棒的偶极模型，发现多边形间相对扭转诱导非共线手性相，从磁通涡旋闭合组态到类刺猬径向构型。手性作为涌现的伊辛变量，可通过手性序参量和时钟指标序参量表征；随扭转角演化，磁纹理发生不连续切换。时钟指标基于多边形的C_N对称性，在固定手性 sector 内区分共享手性的纹理；N重各向异性导致倾斜的N重能量景观，其全局最小值在不同时钟 sector 间不连续跃迁。位点数增加时，响应呈现从刚性伊辛式到非线性交叉的转变。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.22325v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study samples and a dipolar model of magnetic rods arranged on twisted polygonal clusters in terms of the twist angle. We find that the relative twist between polygons induces noncollinear chiral phases, ranging from flux vortex closure to hedgehog like radial configurations. Chirality, quantified in terms of a bond order parameter, is an emergent property that behaves here as an Ising variable. The chiral configurations of the systems can be understood in terms of chirality and clock index order parameters, whose evolution with twist occurs through discontinuous switching of the magnetic textures. Within a fixed Ising chiral sector, the clock index, rooted in the C_N invariance of the polygons, distinguishes chiral textures that share chirality. As the twist increases, it continuously shifts the preferred relative clock phase, but the N-fold anisotropy only allows discrete orientations; the competition produces a tilted N-fold energy landscape whose global minimum hops discontinuously between clock sectors. As the number of sites in the polygon grows, the resulting response displays a nonlinear crossover from rigid, Ising-like behavior to an almost m̊ U(1)-invariant regime, governed by a twist-induced suppression of the emergent Z_N clock anisotropy. Guided by symmetry considerations and the outcomes of the numerical minimization, we developed a Landau phenomenological description that is compatible with both the Ising-type chirality and the Z_N clock anisotropy.

107

螺旋反铁磁体中场诱导的非公度-公度相变#

Field-induced transitions from incommensurate to commensurate phases in helical antiferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 P. T. Bolokhova, A. V. Syromyatnikov📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次解析推导出螺旋反铁磁体在高阶公度点（n=2,3,4）的场致非公度-公度相变临界场公式，突破了以往仅研究n=2的局限；成功应用于RbFe(MoO₄)₂并优化模型参数，为实验探测高阶磁相变提供了
该工作解析研究了具有易平面各向异性的海森堡反铁磁体，其中磁螺旋由Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用和/或交换耦合阻挫诱导。小面内磁场可逐渐改变磁结构波矢k₀，当k₀接近倒格矢g/n（n为整数）时，可产生非公度与公度磁有序相之间的转变。推导了n=2,3,4的临界场解析表达式，并将其应用于三角晶格化合物RbFe(MoO₄)₂，同时确定了更精确描述该材料全部实验数据的模型参数。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作解析研究了具有易平面各向异性的海森堡反铁磁体，其中磁螺旋由Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用和/或交换耦合阻挫诱导。小面内磁场可逐渐改变磁结构波矢k₀，当k₀接近倒格矢g/n（n为整数）时，可产生非公度与公度磁有序相之间的转变。推导了n=2,3,4的临界场解析表达式，并将其应用于三角晶格化合物RbFe(MoO₄)₂，同时确定了更精确描述该材料全部实验数据的模型参数。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.22343v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Heisenberg antiferromagnet with an easy-plane anisotropy is discussed in which a magnetic spiral is induced by Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction and/or frustration of the exchange coupling. The distortion of the spiral by small in-plane magnetic field is described analytically. It is found that the field can gradually change the vector of the magnetic structure bf k₀ and can produce transitions between phases with incommensurate and commensurate magnetic orderings when bf k₀ is close to bf g/n, where bf g is a reciprocal lattice vector and n is integer. Analytical expressions for critical fields are derived for n=2, 3, and 4. Application of the theory to the triangular-lattice compound m̊ RbFe(MoO₄₎₂ is discussed alongside its potential applicability to other materials. As a by-product of the main consideration, model parameters are found which describe more accurately the full set of available experimental data suggested before for m̊ RbFe(MoO₄₎₂.

108

流体动力学显著影响磁流体的诱导结构形成#

Hydrodynamics substantially affects induced structure formation in magnetic fluids
📚 arXiv👤 Henning Reinken, Markus Heiber, Takeaki Araki, Andreas M. Menzel📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统磁偶极相互作用主导的认知，揭示流体动力学耦合在磁流变液结构形成中的关键作用——诱导流动促进细长链状聚集体而非紧凑团簇的生成。这一发现为精准调控磁流变材料的力学响应与智能结构设计提供了新机
磁流变液由微米级磁性颗粒和载液组成，强外磁场导致颗粒形成链状聚集体。该研究表明，流体动力学相互作用（即通过诱导流动的相互耦合）在结构形成过程中起重要作用：它们促进细长链的形成，而非无流体动力学相互作用时的更紧凑团簇。这一基础认识对结构化磁流变材料的技术应用具有重要意义。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

磁流变液由微米级磁性颗粒和载液组成，强外磁场导致颗粒形成链状聚集体。该研究表明，流体动力学相互作用（即通过诱导流动的相互耦合）在结构形成过程中起重要作用：它们促进细长链的形成，而非无流体动力学相互作用时的更紧凑团簇。这一基础认识对结构化磁流变材料的技术应用具有重要意义。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.04754v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Magnetorheological fluids consist of micrometer-sized magnetic particles in a carrier liquid. Sufficiently strong external magnetic fields lead to the formation of string-like particle aggregates. We demonstrate that hydrodynamic interactions, that is, mutual couplings via induced flows, play a substantial role during the structuring process. They support the formation of slender chains instead of more compact clusters in the absence of mutual hydrodynamic interactions between the particles. This fundamental insight is substantial from an application perspective, due to the enormous technical importance and potential of structured magnetorheological materials.

109

自旋补偿磁体中贝里曲率向列态的直接成像#

Direct imaging of a Berry curvature nematic state in a spin-compensated magnet
📚 arXiv👤 Weihang Lu, Camron Farhang, Yuchuan Yao, Pratap Pal, Hao Zhang, Shaofeng Han, Shi-Zeng Lin, Chang-Beom Eom, Jing Xia📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在自旋补偿反铁磁体中直接观测到贝里曲率向列态，突破传统认为贝里曲率仅存在于净磁化体系的认知。其核心创新在于揭示波函数几何相位可驱动新型集体有序，且该有序具有脱离晶格的独立取向自由度，为设计可
该研究在非共线反铁磁体Mn₃NiN中报道了磁光克尔信号的微米级空间调制，与磁场诱导的贝里曲率密度波一致。这些贝里曲率调制呈现脱离晶格钉扎的取向，形成自发破缺旋转对称性的向列态。该空间不稳定性归因于竞争磁相互作用驱动的场诱导自旋纹理空间变化。这一发现揭示了由波函数几何相位介导的自旋补偿磁体中新型集体有序，其波长可通过化学掺杂调控、振幅可通过磁场调控。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在非共线反铁磁体Mn₃NiN中报道了磁光克尔信号的微米级空间调制，与磁场诱导的贝里曲率密度波一致。这些贝里曲率调制呈现脱离晶格钉扎的取向，形成自发破缺旋转对称性的向列态。该空间不稳定性归因于竞争磁相互作用驱动的场诱导自旋纹理空间变化。这一发现揭示了由波函数几何相位介导的自旋补偿磁体中新型集体有序，其波长可通过化学掺杂调控、振幅可通过磁场调控。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.17872v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Density waves conventionally describe the periodic modulation of charge or spin, yet the spatial modulation of electronic geometry has remained elusive. Here, we report subtle micrometer-scale spatial modulations of the magneto-optical Kerr signal in the noncollinear antiferromagnet Mn3NiN with compensated spins, consistent with a magnetic-field-induced Berry curvature density wave . These Berry curvature modulations exhibit orientations unpinned from the crystal lattice, forming a nematic state that spontaneously breaks rotational symmetry. We attribute this spatial instability to field-induced spatial variations of the spin texture driven by competing magnetic interactions. This discovery unveils a new class of collective order in spin-compensated magnets mediated by the geometric phase of the wavefunction itself. Its wavelength is controlled by chemical doping and its amplitude by magnetic field, providing concrete tuning knobs for antiferromagnetic and altermagnetic spintronics.

110

谷光子晶体波导中的谷锁定光学自旋斯格明子#

Valley-locked Optical Spin Skyrmions in Valley Photonic Crystal Waveguides
📚 arXiv👤 Lvjin He, Shanshan Chen, Ziyang Chen, Lan Zhang, Lipeng Wan, Weimin Deng, Tianbao Yu📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在谷光子晶体波导中实现拓扑保护的光学自旋斯格明子，通过谷边缘态的本征自旋-轨道耦合机制，兼具鲁棒单向传输与谷锁定极性调控双重优势，为片上集成拓扑光信息处理与量子器件提供了新范式。
光学斯格明子因其在超精密计量、光学信息处理和量子技术中的应用前景而受到广泛关注。本研究展示了一种光子平台，利用拓扑保护的谷边缘态实现光学自旋斯格明子的片上鲁棒定向传输。这些斯格明子源于谷光子晶体表面倏逝场中的自旋-轨道耦合，作为拓扑保护边缘态的本征态存在，确保其鲁棒单向传播。利用拓扑边缘态的谷自由度，研究者进一步实现了谷锁定的自旋斯格明子，实现了对自旋斯格明子极性的灵活调控。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

光学斯格明子因其在超精密计量、光学信息处理和量子技术中的应用前景而受到广泛关注。本研究展示了一种光子平台，利用拓扑保护的谷边缘态实现光学自旋斯格明子的片上鲁棒定向传输。这些斯格明子源于谷光子晶体表面倏逝场中的自旋-轨道耦合，作为拓扑保护边缘态的本征态存在，确保其鲁棒单向传播。利用拓扑边缘态的谷自由度，研究者进一步实现了谷锁定的自旋斯格明子，实现了对自旋斯格明子极性的灵活调控。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02676v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Optical skyrmions have attracted significant attention across diverse physical systems for their promising scenarios in ultra-precise metrology, optical information processing, and quantum technologies. However, the lack of effective method for their on-chip directional transport and manipulation impedes their applications in photonic integrated devices. Here, we demonstrate a photonic platform that utilizes topologically protected valley edge state to achieve robust on-chip directional transport of optical spin skyrmions. These skyrmions originate from spin-orbit coupling within the evanescent field at the valley photonic crystal surface and exist as eigenstates of the topologically protected edge state, ensuring their robust unidirectional propagation. Leveraging the valley degree of freedom of topological edge states, we further achieve valley-locked spin skyrmions, enabling flexible control over the polarity of spin skyrmions. By endowing spin skyrmions with topological protection in momentum space, our work provides an approach for robust on-chip transport and manipulation of spin skyrmions, thereby paving the way for expanding their application potential in photonic systems.

111

氧空位在稳定Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂纳米颗粒正交相中的作用#

Role of Oxygen Vacancies in Stabilizing the Orthorhombic Phases of Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 Nanoparticles
📚 arXiv👤 Yuriy O. Zagorodniy, Eugene A. Eliseev, Valentin V. Laguta, Petr Jiricek, Jana Houdkova, Lesya D. Demchenko, Oksana V. Leshchenko, Victor N. Pavlikov, Lesya P. Yurchenko, Anna O. Diachenko, Michail D. Volnyanskii, Oleksandr S. Pylypchuk, Myroslav V. Karpets, Mikhail P. Trubitsyn, Dean R. Evans, Anna N. Morozovska📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次定量揭示氧空位浓度与Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂纳米颗粒正交相分数的关联，提出化学应变稳定铁电o-III相的新机制，为纳米尺度铁电氧化物的可控设计提供理论指导，推动高密度存储器件的小型化发展。
该工作研究不同氧分压退火条件下小尺寸Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂纳米颗粒（~7 nm）中正交相的稳定化。通过电子顺磁共振与X射线光电子能谱估算氧空位浓度，结合X射线衍射与核磁共振确定正交相分数，发现其依赖于氧空位浓度。基于Landau-Ginzburg-Devonshire理论的现象学计算表明，氧空位诱导的化学应变可稳定具有铁电长程有序的正交相o-III，并确认富空位纳米颗粒中铁电极化的稳定性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究不同氧分压退火条件下小尺寸Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂纳米颗粒（~7 nm）中正交相的稳定化。通过电子顺磁共振与X射线光电子能谱估算氧空位浓度，结合X射线衍射与核磁共振确定正交相分数，发现其依赖于氧空位浓度。基于Landau-Ginzburg-Devonshire理论的现象学计算表明，氧空位诱导的化学应变可稳定具有铁电长程有序的正交相o-III，并确认富空位纳米颗粒中铁电极化的稳定性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.14642v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this work we study the stabilization of the orthorhombic phases in small Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 nanoparticles (average size ~ 7 nm) annealed under different oxygen partial pressures. Concentration of the oxygen vacancies, which is determined by annealing conditions, was estimated from the electron paramagnetic resonance spectra and X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy. The fraction of the orthorhombic phases, that is determined by the X-ray diffraction and nuclear magnetic resonance, depends on the concentration of oxygen vacancies. Phenomenological calculations based on Landau-Ginzburg-Devonshire theory considering trilinear coupling between nonpolar, antipolar and polar phonon modes, indicate that chemical strain induced by oxygen vacancies can stabilize the orthorhombic phase o-III with the ferroelectric long-range ordering in small Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 nanoparticles. The theory confirms the stability of ferroelectric polarization in the vacancy-enriched Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 nanoparticles. The increase in the intensity of the dielectric permittivity maximum, observed near 350 - 380 K in the PVDF matrix with the Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 nanoparticles annealed in the CO+CO2 atmosphere, is clearly associated with the increase in oxygen vacancies concentration. The vacancies lead to the defect-induced elastic dipole formation and to the increase in ionic conductivity, which decreases the depolarization field and may induce the ferroelectric-like phase transition in the vacancy-enriched Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 nanoparticles. Due to the interfacial effects the negative capacitance states may be realized in weakly screened and spatially isolated Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 nanoparticles embedded in the PVDF matrix.

112

金属-有机框架中的非线性霍尔效应#

Nonlinear Hall Effect in Metal-Organic Frameworks
📚 arXiv👤 Sarbajit Mazumdar, Jagadish N S, Awadhesh Narayan, Giorgio Sangiovanni, Ronny Thomale, Arka Bandyopadhyay📅 2026-05-05⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将MOFs引入非线性霍尔效应研究，通过解析下折叠方案建立低能有效模型，揭示自旋-轨道耦合与反演对称性破缺协同诱导贝里曲率热点的微观机制，为拓扑量子材料的本征化、可设计合成开辟了超越传统外
该工作提出金属-有机框架（MOFs）作为非线性霍尔响应的可调平台。通用解析下折叠方案将C₃对称框架映射为星形和蜂窝格点模型，复现第一性原理的狄拉克特征。自旋-轨道耦合与破缺反演对称性打开狄拉克锥能隙，产生贝里曲率热点。对称性分析识别了包括连接体设计在内的定制合成路径，作为超越应变和衬底调控的本征工程化非线性霍尔输运途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出金属-有机框架（MOFs）作为非线性霍尔响应的可调平台。通用解析下折叠方案将C₃对称框架映射为星形和蜂窝格点模型，复现第一性原理的狄拉克特征。自旋-轨道耦合与破缺反演对称性打开狄拉克锥能隙，产生贝里曲率热点。对称性分析识别了包括连接体设计在内的定制合成路径，作为超越应变和衬底调控的本征工程化非线性霍尔输运途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.09612v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We propose metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) as tunable platforms for nonlinear Hall responses. A universal analytical downfolding scheme maps C₃₋ₛymmetric frameworks onto star- and honeycomb-lattice models, reproducing first-principles Dirac features. Spin-orbit coupling and broken inversion symmetry gap the Dirac cones, generating Berry-curvature hot spots. Symmetry analysis identifies tailored synthetic pathways, including linker design, as intrinsic routes to engineer nonlinear Hall transport beyond strain and substrate control.

113

自旋-1/2 Kitaev体系α-RuCl₃隧穿晶体管中单反铁磁磁振子模式的观测#

Observation of single antiferromagnetic magnon modes in the tunnelling transistors of spin-1/2 Kitaev system a-RuCl3
📚 arXiv👤 Servet Ozdemir, Mikhail Kashchenko, Kostya S. Novoselov📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在少层α-RuCl₃隧穿晶体管中通过电学输运观测到单磁振子激发，突破了传统光学手段的限制；证实原子级厚度下块体之字形反铁磁序及磁振子模式仍稳定存在，为Kitaev量子自旋液体的电学探测与量子
α-RuCl₃是室温下的小带隙半导体，低温下经历莫特-哈伯德转变，被认为是实现量子自旋液体这一奇异物态的最有前景候选材料之一。该研究系统表征了少层（三层及以下）α-RuCl₃薄膜的平面和隧穿电子学性质：室温下呈n型半导体特性，120K以下显现莫特绝缘体行为；在奈尔温度（7-14.5 K）以下观测到非弹性散射特征，部分可归因于单磁振子模式。该工作首次通过电学测量证实了块体之字形反铁磁有序及其单磁振子模式在原子级薄膜中的保留，为Kitae…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

α-RuCl₃是室温下的小带隙半导体，低温下经历莫特-哈伯德转变，被认为是实现量子自旋液体这一奇异物态的最有前景候选材料之一。该研究系统表征了少层（三层及以下）α-RuCl₃薄膜的平面和隧穿电子学性质：室温下呈n型半导体特性，120K以下显现莫特绝缘体行为；在奈尔温度（7-14.5 K）以下观测到非弹性散射特征，部分可归因于单磁振子模式。该工作首次通过电学测量证实了块体之字形反铁磁有序及其单磁振子模式在原子级薄膜中的保留，为Kitaev量子自旋液体的器件化研究奠定基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00202v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The small gap room temperature semiconductor a-RuCl3 which is known to undergo a Mott-Hubbard transition at low temperatures, is one of the most promising candidates for realisation of an exotic matter form, the quantum spin liquid state, which may have applications in quantum computing. Although being extensively investigated by neutron scattering techniques, electronic study of this system in form of van der Waals heterostructures has been limited to mainly graphene proximity. Here we report a systematic study of planar and tunnelling electronic properties of a -RuCl3 films, where we observe an n-type semiconducting property of a -RuCl3 films at room temperature, with a Mott insulator nature onset below 120K. In constant some of the previous studies, we focus on films of three-layer thickness and below and we find inelastic scattering features, below the Neel temperature of 7-14.5 K, some of which we attribute to single magnon modes. We believe our study electrically confirms preserved low temperature signatures of the bulk zigzag antiferromagnetic order and its single magnon modes within the previously observed continuum in atomically thin film limit. The experimental progress could be a step for future electronic characterisation of quantum spin liquid state in the vicinity of the zigzag antiferromagnetic order as well as the Majorona excitations in a-RuCl3 in tunnelling transistors.

114

金属/Na₅Co₁₅.₅Te₆O₃₆异质结构中自旋翻转跃迁的电学探测#

Electrical detection of spin-flip transition in metal/Na5Co15.5Te6O36 heterostructure
📚 arXiv👤 Hirotsugu Tagami, Takuya Kawada, Yuki Shiomi📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地利用金属薄膜磁电阻探测伊辛反铁磁绝缘体自旋翻转跃迁，揭示磁致伸缩应变与界面自旋积累的双重机制，为反铁磁自旋电子学器件的电学读取提供了新途径。
该工作报道了伊辛型反铁磁绝缘体Na₅Co₁₅.₅Te₆O₃₆（NCTO）上金属薄膜的纵向磁电阻（MR）特性。在沿NCTO晶体易轴施加磁场驱动的自旋翻转跃迁处，观测到具有滞回特性的MR谱陡峭变化。MR跃变几乎跟随自旋翻转跃迁处磁化的台阶式变化。在极低温度下Co磁矩部分冻结时，MR异常呈现类隧穿磁电阻形状。由于Pt/NCTO和Cu/NCTO均出现类似MR跃变，该现象归因于NCTO中Co网格磁结构变化时磁致伸缩产生的应变效应。有趣的是，低温…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道了伊辛型反铁磁绝缘体Na₅Co₁₅.₅Te₆O₃₆（NCTO）上金属薄膜的纵向磁电阻（MR）特性。在沿NCTO晶体易轴施加磁场驱动的自旋翻转跃迁处，观测到具有滞回特性的MR谱陡峭变化。MR跃变几乎跟随自旋翻转跃迁处磁化的台阶式变化。在极低温度下Co磁矩部分冻结时，MR异常呈现类隧穿磁电阻形状。由于Pt/NCTO和Cu/NCTO均出现类似MR跃变，该现象归因于NCTO中Co网格磁结构变化时磁致伸缩产生的应变效应。有趣的是，低温下Pt/NCTO与Cu/NCTO的MR谱高场斜率符号相反，该相反符号在NCTO反铁磁转变温度以下显著，表明界面自旋积累与磁化之间的相互作用可能对诱导铁磁态中的MR效应有贡献。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00491v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report on the longitudinal magnetoresistance (MR) in thin metal films on an Ising-type antiferromagnetic insulator, Na5Co15.5Te6O36 (NCTO). Steep changes in the MR spectra with hysteresis were observed at spin-flip transitions driven by magnetic fields applied along the easy axis of the NCTO crystal. The MR jumps almost follow step-like changes in magnetization at the spin-flip transition. At very low temperatures where Co moments are partially frozen, the MR anomalies exhibit a tunnel-magnetoresistance-like shape. The observed MR anomalies at the spin-flip transition are attributed to strain effects via magnetostriction upon the magnetic-structure change of the Co nets in NCTO, because similar MR jumps are observed in both Pt/NCTO and Cu/NCTO. Interestingly, we found that the high-field slopes of the MR spectra show opposite signs between Pt/NCTO and Cu/NCTO at low temperatures. Because the opposite signs of the high-field MR are prominent below the antiferromagnetic transition temperature of NCTO, the interaction between the interface spin accumulation and magnetization is likely to contribute to the MR effect in the induced ferromagnetic state.

115

Griffiths相中铁磁、反铁磁与亚铁磁系统的磁性行为：理论研究#

Magnetic Behavior of Ferro-, Antiferro-, and Ferrimagnetic Systems in the Griffiths Phase: A Theoretical Study
📚 arXiv👤 Sumanta Mukherjee📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将Griffiths相理论从铁磁拓展至反铁磁与亚铁磁系统，发现后两者呈现更反常的磁性行为，为实验识别复杂磁性材料中的Griffiths相提供了统一理论框架，对量子磁性材料设计具有指导意义
该工作为Griffiths相的磁性行为提供了理论框架，除三维自旋-1/2伊辛铁磁系统外，还可扩展至反铁磁和亚铁磁系统。研究发现，三维反铁磁和亚铁磁系统Griffiths相中的磁性行为比常规铁磁系统更为反常。该研究为识别三维反铁磁和亚铁磁系统中的Griffiths相行为提供了可能的理论框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作为Griffiths相的磁性行为提供了理论框架，除三维自旋-1/2伊辛铁磁系统外，还可扩展至反铁磁和亚铁磁系统。研究发现，三维反铁磁和亚铁磁系统Griffiths相中的磁性行为比常规铁磁系统更为反常。该研究为识别三维反铁磁和亚铁磁系统中的Griffiths相行为提供了可能的理论框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00537v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this report, we provide a theoretical framework for the magnetic behavior of the Griffiths phase, which, along with three-dimensional spin-1/2 Ising ferromagnetic systems, can be extended to antiferromagnetic as well as ferrimagnetic systems. We find that the magnetic behavior in the Griffiths phase of three-dimensional antiferromagnetic and ferrimagnetic systems is more unusual than that of conventional ferromagnetic systems. However, this study offers a possible framework for the identification of Griffiths phase behavior in three-dimensional antiferromagnetic and ferrimagnetic systems.

116

SmAu₃Al₇中具有增强低温磁比热的不公度磁有序相#

Incommensurate Magnetic Ordered Phase with Enhanced Low-Temperature Magnetic Specific Heat in SmAu₃Al₇
📚 arXiv👤 Ryuji Higashinaka, Takuma Iwami, Kohsuke Saitou, Takashi U. Ito, Chihiro Tabata, Koji Kaneko, Takashi Ohhara, Ryoji Kiyanagi, Akiko Nakao, Jumpei G. Nakamura, Wataru Higemoto, Akihiro Koda, Shinsaku Kambe, Yuji Aoki, Tatsuma D. Matsuda📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过中子散射与μSR技术澄清了SmAu₃Al₇的磁有序本质，首次实验证实其为非公度长程有序而非部分无序态，并建立该磁结构增强低温磁比热的物理关联，为理解重稀土金属间化合物中复杂磁性与热力学性质的
该工作通过中子散射和μ子自旋旋转（μSR）测量，在单晶SmAu₃Al₇中揭示了与2.8 K和0.9 K相继转变相关的磁有序态。T_N以下出现具有非公度传播矢量q=(0.30, 0, 1.33)的磁布拉格峰。μSR在T_N以下探测到自发内场，其谱形与不公度磁有序一致。T^*处未观测到异常，表明T^*上下磁结构基本不变。磁有序为空间均匀的长程有序态，而非早期研究提出的部分无序态。该工作还讨论了非公度磁有序与增强的低温磁比热之间的可能关联。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过中子散射和μ子自旋旋转（μSR）测量，在单晶SmAu₃Al₇中揭示了与2.8 K和0.9 K相继转变相关的磁有序态。T_N以下出现具有非公度传播矢量q=(0.30, 0, 1.33)的磁布拉格峰。μSR在T_N以下探测到自发内场，其谱形与不公度磁有序一致。T^*处未观测到异常，表明T^*上下磁结构基本不变。磁有序为空间均匀的长程有序态，而非早期研究提出的部分无序态。该工作还讨论了非公度磁有序与增强的低温磁比热之间的可能关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00540v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Neutron scattering and muon spin rotation (μSR) measurements on single-crystal SmAu₃Al₇ reveal magnetically ordered states associated with successive transitions at Tₘ̊ N = 2.8 K and T^* = 0.9 K. Magnetic Bragg peaks appear below Tₘ̊ N with an incommensurate (IC) propagation vector bf q = (0.30, 0, 1.33). μSR detects spontaneous internal fields below Tₘ̊ N, and the spectral shape is consistent with the IC magnetic ordering. No anomalies are observed at T^*, indicating that the magnetic structure remains essentially unchanged below and above T^*. The magnetic order is revealed to be a spatially homogeneous long-range ordered state, rather than a partially disordered state proposed in earlier studies. The possible connection between the IC magnetic order and the enhanced low-temperature magnetic specific heat is discussed.

117

动态磁致扭转磁化率作为Kitaev材料及更广泛体系的新探针#

Dynamical magnetotropic susceptibility as a new probe of Kitaev materials and beyond
📚 arXiv👤 João C. Inácio, J. Schwab, G. Rakhmanova, S. Safari, V. Zambra, H. Nasir, S. Paschen, K. A. Modic, Fakher F. Assaad, Toshihiro Sato📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：提出磁致扭转磁化率κ(ω)作为探测超低频均匀涨落的新实验探针，统一处理绝缘体与金属体系；针对Kitaev材料发展辅助场量子蒙特卡洛结合机器学习优化方法，为量子自旋液体等关联电子态的实验识别提供高灵敏度
该工作提出磁致扭转磁化率κ(ω)作为探测超低频均匀涨落的新手段，其定义为磁场中振荡悬臂上晶体的扭矩与角位移振幅之比。通过线性响应理论，在包含电荷与自旋自由度的通用关联电子哈密顿量框架下推导了κ(ω)，其实部和虚部分别决定振荡频移和晶体诱导阻尼。对于绝缘自旋系统，κ(0)对磁各向异性敏感，有限频率虚部可探测均匀动态自旋磁化率；对于金属系统，识别了涡流导致低频阻尼的条件。数值计算聚焦于Kitaev材料的磁致扭转响应，采用辅助场量子蒙特卡洛…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出磁致扭转磁化率κ(ω)作为探测超低频均匀涨落的新手段，其定义为磁场中振荡悬臂上晶体的扭矩与角位移振幅之比。通过线性响应理论，在包含电荷与自旋自由度的通用关联电子哈密顿量框架下推导了κ(ω)，其实部和虚部分别决定振荡频移和晶体诱导阻尼。对于绝缘自旋系统，κ(0)对磁各向异性敏感，有限频率虚部可探测均匀动态自旋磁化率；对于金属系统，识别了涡流导致低频阻尼的条件。数值计算聚焦于Kitaev材料的磁致扭转响应，采用辅助场量子蒙特卡洛结合基于机器学习的符号问题优化方法。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00568v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The magnetotropic susceptibility k(ømega) probes ultra-low-frequency uniform fluctuations. For a crystal mounted on an oscillating cantilever in a magnetic field, it is defined as the ratio of torque to angular-displacement amplitude. Its real and imaginary parts determine the oscillation-frequency shift and crystal-induced damping. It is a low-energy probe of uniform q=0 spin and charge degrees of freedom. We demonstrate this by deriving k(ømega) within linear response theory for a generic correlated-electron Hamiltonian with charge and spin degrees of freedom. Although it covers metallic and insulating magnets, correlated paramagnets, and exotic quantum critical points, we focus on limiting cases. For insulating spin systems k(0) is sensitive to magnetic anisotropy whereas its finite-frequency imaginary part probes uniform dynamical spin susceptibility even in spin-symmetric models. For metallic systems we identify when eddy currents cause low-frequency damping. Our numerical results focus on Kitaev-material magnetotropic response. Using auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo with machine-learning-based sign-problem optimization we compute k(ømega) for several models proposed for α-RuCl₃. The observed low-temperature scaling of k(0)/T with B/T results from dominant Kitaev couplings: parameter sets without dominant Kitaev coupling do not exhibit this scaling. It remains robust upon inclusion of optical phonons. Beyond the static response, k''(ømega) for the α-RuCl₃ parameter set reproducing the experimental k(0) data shows local-moment features at high and low T, with a single peak at the Larmor frequency. Beyond Kitaev systems we highlight broader applications. Probing ultra-low-energy uniform charge fluctuations is pertinent to Kondo destruction quantum criticality, of broad interest in strange metallicity and unconventional superconductivity.

118

半金属铁磁体La₀.₇Sr₀.₃MnO₃与Pt插层平面结构中的长程近邻效应#

Long range proximity effects in planar structures involving the halfmetal ferromagnet La0.7Sr0.3MnO3 and Pt interlayers
📚 arXiv👤 Junxiang Yao, Julian van Doorn, Mariona Cabero, Jan Aarts📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地引入Pt插层调控LSMO/NbTi界面，系统探究三重态超导配对的长程输运机制。通过临界电流与纳米带几何尺寸的依赖关系，揭示制备工艺对三重态产生效率的关键影响，为优化半金属超导异质结器件、
该工作研究了以半金属铁磁体La₀.₇Sr₀.₃MnO₃（LSMO）为弱连接的超导结中的三重态关联输运。在NbTi超导接触的LSMO纳米带Josephson结中，此前已发现高超导电流和长达1.3 μm的结长度。本工作进一步研究了临界电流Ic对纳米带长度和宽度的依赖关系，所有结均显示强超导电流，但未观察到简单规律，表明制备工艺对某些参数缺乏足够控制。为深入理解LSMO/NbTi界面三重态产生机制，还研究了Pt作为LSMO与NbTi之间插层…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了以半金属铁磁体La₀.₇Sr₀.₃MnO₃（LSMO）为弱连接的超导结中的三重态关联输运。在NbTi超导接触的LSMO纳米带Josephson结中，此前已发现高超导电流和长达1.3 μm的结长度。本工作进一步研究了临界电流Ic对纳米带长度和宽度的依赖关系，所有结均显示强超导电流，但未观察到简单规律，表明制备工艺对某些参数缺乏足够控制。为深入理解LSMO/NbTi界面三重态产生机制，还研究了Pt作为LSMO与NbTi之间插层的影响。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00577v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Over the last decade, there has been steady research on superconducting junctions with a ferromagnet as the weak link, and where triplet correlations can transport supercurrents over a substantial distances. Of particular interest are halfmetallic ferromagnets, in which only one spin band is present, so that, presumably, the induced supercurrent is fully spin-polarized. We have earlier reported on a study of triplet transport in planar La0.7Sr0.3MnO3(LSMO) nanostrip Josephson junctions with NbTi superconducting contacts, where we found high values for the supercurrents, and large junction lengths (up to 1.3 μm). Here, we extend that work by studying the dependence of the critical current Ic on the length of the nanostrip between the contacts and the width of the strip. All junctions show strong supercurrents, but we do not observe simple systematics. Apparently, the fabrication process does not allow sufficient control over some of its parameters. To gain more insight in the mechanism for triplet generation at the LSMO/NbTi interface, we also studied the effect of Pt as an interlayer between the LSMO and the NbTi. For this, we etched a NbTi/Pt electrode structure on a full film of LSMO. The results are highly promising, showing sharp superconducting transitions and zero-resistance states being reached at an electrode distance of 2 μm, with indications that larger distances should be feasible.

119

非互易磁性导致关联电子系统中的超导二极管效应#

Superconducting diode effect in correlated electron systems by nonreciprocal magnetism
📚 arXiv👤 Kyohei Nakamura, Youichi Yanase📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地发现电子关联可完全抑制常规超导二极管效应，同时揭示了一种全新机制：超导电流非互易地诱导反铁磁有序，进而调控临界电流实现完美二极管效率。这为强关联超导体作为高性能超导二极管平台奠定了理论基
该工作在Rashba-Zeeman-Hubbard模型中研究了超导二极管效应（SDE），该模型描述反铁磁量子临界区中的d波超导电性，采用Dyson-Gor'kov方程和涨落交换近似。研究表明电子关联抑制了来自拆对电流的常规本征SDE。更重要的是，超导电流非互易地诱导反铁磁有序，这一效应从根本上调控临界电流并实现了完美二极管效率。该结果揭示了SDE此前未被认识的关联驱动机制，确立了强关联超导体作为超导二极管物理的新平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在Rashba-Zeeman-Hubbard模型中研究了超导二极管效应（SDE），该模型描述反铁磁量子临界区中的d波超导电性，采用Dyson-Gor'kov方程和涨落交换近似。研究表明电子关联抑制了来自拆对电流的常规本征SDE。更重要的是，超导电流非互易地诱导反铁磁有序，这一效应从根本上调控临界电流并实现了完美二极管效率。该结果揭示了SDE此前未被认识的关联驱动机制，确立了强关联超导体作为超导二极管物理的新平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00601v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The superconducting diode effect (SDE), characterized by a nonreciprocal critical current in superconductors, has recently been observed in strongly correlated electron systems and near quantum criticality, pointing to unconventional mechanisms beyond weak-coupling theories. Here we investigate the SDE in the Rashba-Zeeman-Hubbard model, which captures d-wave superconductivity in an antiferromagnetic quantum critical regime, using the Dyson-Gor'kov equation with the fluctuation exchange approximation. We show that electron correlations suppress the conventional intrinsic SDE arising from depairing currents. More importantly, a supercurrent nonreciprocally induces antiferromagnetic order, which fundamentally governs the critical current and enables perfect diode efficiency. Our results reveal a previously unrecognized correlation-driven mechanism of the SDE and establish strongly correlated superconductors as a platform for superconducting diode physics.

120

通过限域调制抑制自旋量子比特输运过程中的退相干#

Suppressing spin qubit decoherence during shuttling via confinement modulation
📚 arXiv👤 Daniel Q. L. Nguyen, Maximilian Rimbach-Russ, Stefano Bosco📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将限域势调制与呼吸输运协议相结合，为移动自旋量子比特提供连续动力学解耦，突破了静态量子比特难以长程相干传输的瓶颈。通过自旋-轨道耦合电驱动与缀饰态工程，实现了对磁噪声和电噪声的同时抑制，
该工作提出利用限域势调制对移动中的自旋量子比特进行连续动力学解耦，以提升其相干性的策略。研究者在空穴自旋体系中引入时域与空域呼吸输运协议，利用自旋-轨道相互作用电驱动量子比特运动，实现高效的缀饰态输运。基于滤波函数形式理论，该工作识别出能有效抑制全局与局域磁噪声及电噪声的驱动参数区间，并以锗空穴自旋量子比特为例验证了该方案在构建噪声鲁棒的长程相干量子链路中的实用性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出利用限域势调制对移动中的自旋量子比特进行连续动力学解耦，以提升其相干性的策略。研究者在空穴自旋体系中引入时域与空域呼吸输运协议，利用自旋-轨道相互作用电驱动量子比特运动，实现高效的缀饰态输运。基于滤波函数形式理论，该工作识别出能有效抑制全局与局域磁噪声及电噪声的驱动参数区间，并以锗空穴自旋量子比特为例验证了该方案在构建噪声鲁棒的长程相干量子链路中的实用性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00611v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reliable long-range qubit shuttling is a powerful tool for scalable quantum computing architectures. We investigate strategies to improve the coherence of moving spin qubits by performing continuous dynamical decoupling by modulating their confinement potential. Specifically, we introduce temporal and spatial breathing shuttling protocols that leverage spin-orbit interactions in hole-spin systems to electrically drive the qubit while moving. This enables efficient dressed-state shuttling, where the spin is continuously rotated during transport, suppressing the effect of low-frequency noise. Using the filter function formalism, we identify driving regimes that efficiently mitigate both global and local magnetic and electric noise sources. We find that confinement-modulated shuttling can significantly enhance coherence during transport, while revealing distinct limitations depending on the correlation length of the noise. Applying our framework to germanium hole-spin qubits, we show that these protocols provide a practical route toward noise-resilient long-range coherent quantum links.

121

通过三维自旋操控揭示交错磁体中XMCD的起源#

Revealing the origin of XMCD in an altermagnet via three-dimensional control of spins
📚 arXiv👤 Daire Mallon, Zixuan Wu, Jheng-Cyuan Lin, Ruiwen Xie, Bo Zhao, Charles Godfrey, Qing He, Lucia Iglesias, Pierluigi Gargiani, Manuel Valvidares, Peter Bencok, Francesco Maccherozzi, Larissa S. I. Veiga, Paul Steadman, Manuel Bibes, Hongbin Zhang, Paolo G. Radaelli, Hariom Jani📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究颠覆了XMCD作为交错磁性直接判据的传统认知，揭示其源于自旋取向导致的对称性破缺而非本征自旋劈裂；提出的局域法拉第张量框架突破了XMCD与磁结构简单对应的局限，实现了三维矢量磁结构的全重构，为交
该工作以g波交错磁体α-Fe₂O₃为研究对象，质疑X射线磁圆二色(XMCD)作为交错磁性直接实验判据的有效性。研究表明XMCD由自旋方向诱导的对称性破缺主导，而非交错磁自旋劈裂本身；XMCD呈现高度各向异性且与弱磁倾斜解耦。作者提出用局域法拉第张量描述这种反常XMCD，并据此重构完整矢量磁结构，该框架可推广至其他交错磁体体系。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作以g波交错磁体α-Fe₂O₃为研究对象，质疑X射线磁圆二色(XMCD)作为交错磁性直接实验判据的有效性。研究表明XMCD由自旋方向诱导的对称性破缺主导，而非交错磁自旋劈裂本身；XMCD呈现高度各向异性且与弱磁倾斜解耦。作者提出用局域法拉第张量描述这种反常XMCD，并据此重构完整矢量磁结构，该框架可推广至其他交错磁体体系。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00815v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets are an emerging class of collinear antiferromagnets that exhibit unconventional spin-polarised electronic bands, potentially unlocking new functionalities that do not rely on spin-orbit coupling (SOC). Experimental signatures traditionally associated with spin polarisation, like X-ray magnetic circular dichroism (XMCD), are thus being used as a validation of altermagnetism. However, unlike altermagnetic spin-splitting, these responses require SOC and are not invariant under spin-space rotations. This brings into question the extent to which they can be considered direct signatures of altermagnetism. Here, we exploit the g-wave altermagnet α-Fe₂O₃ to demonstrate that XMCD is governed precisely by the spin-direction-induced symmetry breaking that altermagnetic spin groups are designed to ignore. Strikingly, the XMCD is highly anisotropic and is decoupled from the weak magnetic canting. We show that this anomalous XMCD can be described by on-site Faraday tensors capturing the locally uncompensated spin-orbital anisotropies - a scenario that can be applied to other altermagnets. Leveraging this, we reconstruct complete vectorial maps of nanoscale textures in α-Fe₂O₃ thin films, including domain walls and topological solitons, which are promising for building future spintronics and magnonics devices.

122

可编程集成磁振子网格#

Programmable Integrated Magnonic Meshes
📚 arXiv👤 Piero Florio, Matteo Vitali, Valerio Levati, Rasheed M. Ishola, Luca Ciaccarini Mavilla, Nora Lecis, Carsten Dubs, Riccardo Bertacco, Marco Madami, Silvia Tacchi, Daniela Petti, Edoardo Albisetti📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作以单步激光直写技术在钇铁石榴石单片集成磁振子波导、耦合器与移相器等核心元件，突破传统磁振子器件离散拼接的局限；通过多级级联实现可编程光网络功能的磁振子类比，为超低功耗、可重构自旋波信息处理芯片奠
该工作利用钇铁石榴石单步直接激光写入工艺，实现了通用磁振子电路关键元件的单片集成与多级级联。通过磁光克尔效应显微术，证实了波导结构中自旋波数百波长距离的高效传播与相位相干保持；在耦合波导中观测到多个耦合长度上的完全周期性功率转移；在移相器中实现任意可调相位延迟。通过级联这些元件，成功演示了可编程分束器、频率解复用器及相位控制2×2路由器等网络功能。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用钇铁石榴石单步直接激光写入工艺，实现了通用磁振子电路关键元件的单片集成与多级级联。通过磁光克尔效应显微术，证实了波导结构中自旋波数百波长距离的高效传播与相位相干保持；在耦合波导中观测到多个耦合长度上的完全周期性功率转移；在移相器中实现任意可调相位延迟。通过级联这些元件，成功演示了可编程分束器、频率解复用器及相位控制2×2路由器等网络功能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00290v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Integrated circuits are a cornerstone of modern information technology, and analog wave-based architectures could enable fast and efficient processing beyond conventional charge electronics. In magnonics, spin waves provide a highly tunable, compact and energy-efficient medium for on-chip microwave signal transport and processing. However, progress has been limited to isolated elements or short devices, severely limiting the overall functional complexity and scalability. Here we realize the key elements of universal magnonic circuitry, using a single-step direct laser writing process in yttrium iron garnet, and monolithically cascade them in multi-stage programmable devices and networks. Using magneto-optical Kerr effect microscopy, we show efficient spin-wave propagation and preserved phase coherence in waveguide structures for hundreds of wavelengths. In coupled waveguides, we observe complete and periodic power transfer over several coupling lengths, and in phase shifters we achieve arbitrary, tunable phase delays. By cascading these elements, we realize programmable splitters, frequency demultiplexers, and phase-controlled 2x2 routers, where output power and relative phase can be programmed on demand via external fields. Finally, we realize programmable magnonic interferometric meshes for on-chip radio-frequency signal routing, with up to six magnonic inputs and outputs and seven cascaded stages, without the need for intermediate amplification. These direct-write cascaded networks bridge a long-standing gap in magnonic scalability, offering a viable pathway toward integrated, large-scale architectures for both classical and quantum processing.

123

基于金刚石量子传感的高压下铁磁相变观测#

High-pressure magnetic transition in iron observed via diamond quantum sensing
📚 arXiv👤 Kouki Yamamoto, Kenshin Uriu, Ryotaro Suda, Misaki Sasaki, Mari Einaga, Katsuya Shimizu, Kento Sasaki, Kensuke Kobayashi📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究将NV色心系综集成于金刚石压砧表面，突破了高压磁测量的技术瓶颈，首次实现30 GPa下铁磁相变的原位成像，为极端条件下凝聚态磁性研究开辟了新途径。
该工作将NV色心系综直接制备于金刚石压砧表面，实现了高压条件下的精密磁测量。利用该NV系综对高达30 GPa压力下铁的杂散磁场进行成像，成功观测到铁的α-ε磁相变，为极端高压环境下的磁测量提供了新的技术手段。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作将NV色心系综直接制备于金刚石压砧表面，实现了高压条件下的精密磁测量。利用该NV系综对高达30 GPa压力下铁的杂散磁场进行成像，成功观测到铁的α-ε磁相变，为极端高压环境下的磁测量提供了新的技术手段。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00576v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Diamond quantum sensors offer high precision and spatial resolution as magnetic probes, making them promising for a wide range of applications. While diamond anvil cells (DACs) can generate extremely high pressures, techniques for magnetometry under such conditions remain limited. By fabricating an ensemble of NV centers directly on the anvil diamond surface, we enable precise magnetic measurements under high pressure. In this work, we employ this NV ensemble to image the stray magnetic field of iron up to 30 GPa, enabling the observation of the magnetic transition (α-ǎrepsilon transition) in iron.

124

共振非弹性X射线散射中子晶格特异性圆二色性揭示双交替磁性#

Bi-altermagnetism unveiled by sublattice-specific circular dichroism in resonant inelastic X-ray scattering
📚 arXiv👤 G. Channagowdra, A. Singh, H. Y. Huang, M. Furo, Bin Gao, Pengcheng Dai, C. T. Chen, J. Kunes, A. Fujimori, S-W. Cheong, A. Hariki, D. J. Huang📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文创新性地将共振非弹性X射线散射圆二色性技术拓展至交替磁体研究领域，首次在Fe₂Mo₃O₈中揭示"双交替磁性"新物态——两套由不同配位环境Fe构成的交替磁子晶格共存。该工作突破了传统交替磁理论的单子
交替磁体是净磁矩为零但联合破缺宇称-时间反演对称性的新型磁体类别，通常由单胞内旋转关联的两个反向自旋磁位点组成。本文利用共振非弹性X射线散射中的圆二色性，在关联绝缘体Fe₂Mo₃O₈中识别出新型的双交替磁性：该材料包含两套交替磁子晶格（准八面体Fe环境与四面体Fe环境交替排列）。实验在无手性、零磁化系统中观测到圆二色性，且信号出现在两套子晶格各自的特征激发处，证实了双交替磁序的存在。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

交替磁体是净磁矩为零但联合破缺宇称-时间反演对称性的新型磁体类别，通常由单胞内旋转关联的两个反向自旋磁位点组成。本文利用共振非弹性X射线散射中的圆二色性，在关联绝缘体Fe₂Mo₃O₈中识别出新型的双交替磁性：该材料包含两套交替磁子晶格（准八面体Fe环境与四面体Fe环境交替排列）。实验在无手性、零磁化系统中观测到圆二色性，且信号出现在两套子晶格各自的特征激发处，证实了双交替磁序的存在。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.00737v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: An altermagnet is a recently identified class of magnets that exhibit a zero net magnetic moment but break symmetry under the combined operations of parity and time reversal. It typically consists of two magnetic sites of opposite spins related by rotation within the unit cell. Here, we use circular dichroism (CD) in resonant inelastic X-ray scattering (RIXS) to identify a new form of altermagnetism, namely bi-altermagnetism, in the correlated insulator Fe2Mo3O8, which comprises two altermagnetic sublattices: one with alternating quasi-octahedral Fe environments and the other with alternating tetrahedral Fe environments. We experimentally revealed the emergence of CD in an achiral, zero-magnetization system, thereby probing mirror-symmetry breaking associated with altermagnetic order. Notably, the CD appeared at sublattice-specific excitations of the octahedral and tetrahedral sites, indicating symmetry breaking in both altermagnetic sublattices. Calculations based on a model with the bi-altermagnetic order along the c axis successfully reproduce the observed CD. Our findings provide compelling evidence for bi-altermagnetism in Fe2Mo3O8, and showcase the use of RIXS-CD as a probe of magnetic sublattices in systems with zero net magnetization.

125

修饰方-kagome反铁磁体KCu₇TeO₄(SO₄)₅Cl的单晶生长、结构表征与物性研究#

Single-crystal growth, structural characterization, and physical properties of a decorated square-kagome antiferromagnet KCu₇TeO₄₍SO₄₎₅Cl
📚 arXiv👤 Jingjing Jing, Andreas Eich, Yiqiu Liu, Lunhua He, Aifeng Wang, Yisheng Chai, Young Sun, Yi Cui, Weiqiang Yu, Xinrun Mi, Michael Merz, Mingquan He📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：首次在nabokoite化合物中实现修饰方-kagome晶格的单晶材料，揭示其兼具长程反铁磁序与两步铁电极化的磁电耦合特性，为探索阻挫量子磁性中的多铁效应提供了新平台。
方-kagome晶格由二维共角三角形构成，是研究阻挫磁性的新颖平台，但材料实现稀少。本文报道nabokoite化合物KCu₇TeO₄(SO₄)₅Cl的单晶生长与表征，其具有畸变且修饰的方-kagome晶格。磁化率与比热在~4 K出现弱反常，³⁵Cl核磁共振证实4.5 K以下形成长程反铁磁序；近各同性的居里-外斯温度（~−145 K）与g因子（~2.4）。此外观测到T_FE1~30 K与T_FE2~27 K的两步铁电相变，由反演对称性破…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

方-kagome晶格由二维共角三角形构成，是研究阻挫磁性的新颖平台，但材料实现稀少。本文报道nabokoite化合物KCu₇TeO₄(SO₄)₅Cl的单晶生长与表征，其具有畸变且修饰的方-kagome晶格。磁化率与比热在~4 K出现弱反常，³⁵Cl核磁共振证实4.5 K以下形成长程反铁磁序；近各同性的居里-外斯温度（~−145 K）与g因子（~2.4）。此外观测到T_FE1~30 K与T_FE2~27 K的两步铁电相变，由反演对称性破缺驱动，可能与Cu₂O₄Cl金字塔及邻近SO₄四面体畸变相关。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.09584v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The square-kagome lattice, composed of two-dimensional corner-sharing triangles, provides a novel platform for studying frustrated magnetism. However, material realizations of the square-kagome lattice remain scarce. Here, we report the single-crystal growth, structural characterization, magnetic and electric properties of KCu₇TeO₄₍SO₄₎₅Cl, a nabokoite compound featuring a distorted and decorated square-kagome lattice. Weak anomalies near 4 K are observed in both magnetization and specific heat, indicating the onset of a magnetic transition.The formation of a long-range antiferromagnetic state below 4.5 K is further confirmed by ³⁵Cl nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) measurements. Magnetic susceptibility data reveal nearly isotropic Curie-Weiss temperatures (sim-145 K) and g-factors (sim2.4) for both in-plane and out-of-plane magnetic fields. Moreover, we observe two successive ferroelectric transitions at T_FE1sim30 K and T_FE2sim27 K, driven by inversion-symmetry breaking, most likely associated with distortions in the Cu2O₄Cl₁ pyramids and the adjacent SO₄ tetrahedra. These results suggest that a three-dimensional model incorporating interlayer couplings via decorating Cu2 sites is essential for capturing the magnetic and electric behaviors in KCu₇TeO₄₍SO₄₎₅Cl.

126

杂化量子系统中囚禁电子与磁振子的非线性三方耦合#

Nonlinear Tripartite Coupling of Trapped Electrons with Magnons in a Hybrid Quantum System
📚 arXiv👤 Xue-Feng Pan, Peng-Bo Li📅 2026-05-04⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文提出一种全新的非线性三方耦合机制，利用囚禁电子的零点运动展宽同时桥接其自旋与微磁体磁振子，突破传统双线性耦合限制。该方案仅需成熟技术即可实现单量子水平的强耦合与少体纠缠态快速制备，为杂化量子计算与
相干非线性三方相互作用对杂化量子系统的量子模拟与信息处理至关重要，但实验实现仍具挑战。本文预测了单囚禁电子与附近微磁体杂化体系中的非线性三方耦合机制：利用电子内禀电荷（运动）与自旋自由度同微磁体磁振子模式的相互作用，凭借电子零点运动的大空间展宽，在单量子水平获得可调谐的强自旋-磁振子-运动耦合，实现两个声子同时与单自旋和单磁振子激发相互作用。该机制可用于快速制备少体纠缠态，可通过成熟的电子阱与量子磁振子技术实现。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

相干非线性三方相互作用对杂化量子系统的量子模拟与信息处理至关重要，但实验实现仍具挑战。本文预测了单囚禁电子与附近微磁体杂化体系中的非线性三方耦合机制：利用电子内禀电荷（运动）与自旋自由度同微磁体磁振子模式的相互作用，凭借电子零点运动的大空间展宽，在单量子水平获得可调谐的强自旋-磁振子-运动耦合，实现两个声子同时与单自旋和单磁振子激发相互作用。该机制可用于快速制备少体纠缠态，可通过成熟的电子阱与量子磁振子技术实现。

English Abstract

arXiv:2503.08587v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Coherent nonlinear tripartite interactions are critical for advancing quantum simulation and information processing in hybrid quantum systems, yet they remain experimentally challenging and still evade comprehensive exploration. Here, we predict a nonlinear tripartite coupling mechanism in a hybrid setup comprising a single trapped electron and a nearby micromagnet. The tripartite coupling here leverages the electron's intrinsic charge (motional) and spin degrees of freedom interacting with the magnon modes of the micromagnet. Thanks to the large spatial extent of the electron zero-point motion, we show that it is possible to obtain a tunable and strong spin-magnon-motion coupling at the single quantum level, with two phonons simultaneously interacting with a single spin and magnon excitation. This enables, for example, magnons to mediate coupling among distinct degrees of freedom of two electrons, which can be used for the rapid preparation of few-body entangled states. This protocol can be readily implemented with the well-developed techniques in electron traps and quantum magnonics, and may open new avenues for quantum simulations and hybrid quantum information processing by introducing a versatile platform for exploring multipartite interactions and nonclassical state generation.

04

AI / 机器学习专题#

覆盖模型、方法与 AI for Science 应用工作。

01

HaM-World：面向规划的软哈密顿世界模型与选择性记忆#

HaM-World: Soft-Hamiltonian World Models with Selective Memory for Planning
📚 arXiv👤 Haoyun Tang, Haodong Cui, Keyao Xu, Kun Wang, Zhandong Mei📅 2026-05-09🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文创新性地将经典哈密顿力学引入世界模型，通过潜态解耦为保守动力学(q,p)与耗散语义(c)子空间，结合Mamba选择性记忆机制，从根本上解决了长程规划中的误差累积与历史信息过载难题。该框架为物理启发
针对世界模型在长程规划中的不稳定问题，本文提出HaM-World（HMW），将潜态分解为规范(q,p)子空间与语义上下文子空间c，并以Mamba选择性状态空间记忆实现历史条件化输入。(q,p)由能量导出的哈密顿向量场演化，c捕获耗散与非保守因素。在DeepMind Control Suite四项任务上达到最高平均AUC（117.9，提升9.5%），长程推演误差降至45%。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对世界模型在长程规划中的不稳定问题，本文提出HaM-World（HMW），将潜态分解为规范(q,p)子空间与语义上下文子空间c，并以Mamba选择性状态空间记忆实现历史条件化输入。(q,p)由能量导出的哈密顿向量场演化，c捕获耗散与非保守因素。在DeepMind Control Suite四项任务上达到最高平均AUC（117.9，提升9.5%），长程推演误差降至45%。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05951v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: World models enable model-based planning through learned latent dynamics, but imagined rollouts become unstable as the planning horizon grows or the dynamics distribution shifts. We argue that this instability reflects two missing structures in planner-facing latents: history-conditioned memory for approximate Markov completeness, and geometric organization that separates configuration, momentum, and task semantics. We propose HaM-World (HMW), a structured world model that decomposes the latent state into a canonical (q, p) subspace and a context subspace c, while using Mamba selective state-space memory as the history-conditioned input to the same latent dynamics. Within this interface, (q, p) evolves through an energy-derived Hamiltonian vector field plus learnable residual/control dynamics, while c captures semantic, dissipative, and non-conservative factors. This gives the planner a single latent state shared by dynamics prediction, reward/value estimation, imagined rollouts, and CEM action search. On four DeepMind Control Suite tasks, HaM-World reaches the highest Avg. AUC (117.9, +9.5%), reduces long-horizon rollout error to 45% of a strong baseline model, and wins 11/12 k in 3,5,7 MSE cells. Under 12 OOD perturbations spanning dynamics shifts, action delay, and observation masking, HaM-World achieves the highest return in every condition, with average OOD-return gains of 10.2% on Finger Spin and 13.6% on Reacher Easy. Mechanism diagnostics further show bounded action-free Hamiltonian-energy drift, structured energy variation under policy rollouts, and coherent control-induced energy transfer, supporting the intended Soft-Hamiltonian dynamics design.

02

GlazyBench：陶瓷釉料性质预测与图像生成基准数据集#

GlazyBench: A Benchmark for Ceramic Glaze Property Prediction and Image Generation
📚 arXiv👤 Ziyu Zhai, Siyou Li, Juexi Shao, Juntao Yu📅 2026-05-09🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：GlazyBench填补了陶瓷材料AI化研究的空白，其独特价值在于将离散配方-连续性质-视觉外观三者关联，为材料逆向设计提供闭环验证框架。该基准有望加速非遗工艺数字化传承，并推动科学智能（AI4Sci
本文发布首个AI辅助釉料设计数据集GlazyBench，包含23,148组真实釉料配方，支持从原料预测烧制后表面性质（颜色、透明度等）及基于性质的视觉生成两项任务。实验建立了传统机器学习、大语言模型用于性质预测，以及深度生成模型、大多模态模型用于图像生成的基线，结果显示出潜力但仍具挑战性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文发布首个AI辅助釉料设计数据集GlazyBench，包含23,148组真实釉料配方，支持从原料预测烧制后表面性质（颜色、透明度等）及基于性质的视觉生成两项任务。实验建立了传统机器学习、大语言模型用于性质预测，以及深度生成模型、大多模态模型用于图像生成的基线，结果显示出潜力但仍具挑战性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.06641v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Developing ceramic glazes is a costly, time-consuming process of trial and error due to complex chemistry, placing a significant burden on independent artists. While recent advances in multimodal AI offer a modern solution, the field lacks the large-scale datasets required to train these models. We propose GlazyBench, the first dataset for AI-assisted glaze design. Comprising 23,148 real glaze formulations, GlazyBench supports two primary tasks: predicting post-firing surface properties, such as color and transparency, from raw materials, and generating accurate visual representations of the glaze based on these properties. We establish comprehensive baselines for property prediction using traditional machine learning and large language models, alongside image generation benchmarks using deep generative and large multimodal models. Our experiments demonstrate promising yet challenging results. GlazyBench pioneers a new research direction in AI-assisted material design, providing a standardized benchmark for systematic evaluation.

03

面向软体机器人的拓扑驱动抗纠缠控制#

Topology-Driven Anti-Entanglement Control for Soft Robots
📚 arXiv👤 Haoyang Le, Shengxuan Wang, Mohan Chen, Shuo Feng📅 2026-05-09🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文针对软体机器人在密集障碍环境中易纠缠的痛点，创新性地将代数拓扑与多智能体强化学习深度融合，提出TD-MARL框架。其核心突破在于：以拓扑状态替代传统几何观测，解决局部感知下的全局协调难题；集中学习
针对高密度障碍与不稳定环境下多智能体强化学习的可观测性挑战，本文提出拓扑驱动的多智能体强化学习（TD-MARL）框架协调多机器人系统避免纠缠。关键网络采用集中学习使各智能体通过共享拓扑状态感知他者策略，分布式执行消除机器人间通信需求，集成拓扑安全层保障系统可靠性。详情需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要
