We show that diffusion models better preserve key rainfall statistics compared to censored Gaussian processes. Framing rainfall estimation as a Bayesian inverse problem with a DM prior enables training-free posterior sampling using a broad family of methods, including Plug-and-Play, Sequential Monte Carlo, and Replica Exchange methods. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over established CML-based reconstruction baselines.

40

Platonic representation of foundation machine learning interatomic potentials#

📚 Nature Machine Intelligence👤 Zhenzhu Li, Aron Walsh📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：基于柏拉图表征假说，该研究突破不同机器学习原子间势隐空间互不兼容的瓶颈，首创原子锚点投影法统一七种异构模型的表征空间，实现跨模型最优传输与可解释嵌入运算，并建立无需真值参考的异常结构检测指标，为基础模
基础机器学习原子间势（MLIP）已成为原子模拟的有力工具，然而不同模型在互不兼容的隐空间中对化学环境进行编码，限制了直接比较和互操作性。柏拉图表征假说认为，足够能力的模型会收敛于对现实的共享统计表征。在此，受该假说启发，我们展示了独立发展的MLIP在原子环境的几何组织上表现出统计一致性。通过将嵌入投影到一组原子锚点所定义的参考系中，我们将七种MLIP——涵盖等变、非等变、保守和非保守架构——的隐空间统一为一个共同隐空间，该空间保持了化…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

基础机器学习原子间势（MLIP）已成为原子模拟的有力工具，然而不同模型在互不兼容的隐空间中对化学环境进行编码，限制了直接比较和互操作性。柏拉图表征假说认为，足够能力的模型会收敛于对现实的共享统计表征。在此，受该假说启发，我们展示了独立发展的MLIP在原子环境的几何组织上表现出统计一致性。通过将嵌入投影到一组原子锚点所定义的参考系中，我们将七种MLIP——涵盖等变、非等变、保守和非保守架构——的隐空间统一为一个共同隐空间，该空间保持了化学周期性和结构不变性。这一统一框架实现了跨模型最优传输、可解释的嵌入代数运算以及表征偏差的检测。此外，我们表明该空间中的偏离度为异常结构提供了一种无需真值参考的度量，并能指示物理预测失效。我们的结果表明，柏拉图表征为材料科学中可互操作、可比较且可解释的基础模型提供了一条实用路径。

English Abstract

Foundation machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have emerged as powerful tools for atomistic simulation, yet different models encode chemical environments in incompatible latent spaces, limiting direct comparison and interoperability. The platonic representation hypothesis suggests that sufficiently capable models converge towards a shared statistical representation of reality. Here, motivated by this hypothesis, we show that independently developed MLIPs exhibit statistically consistent geometric organization of atomic environments. By projecting embeddings relative to a set of atomic anchors, we unify the latent spaces of seven MLIPs—spanning equivariant, non-equivariant, conservative and non-conservative architectures—into a common latent space that preserves chemical periodicity and structural invariants. This unified framework enables cross-model optimal transport, interpretable embedding arithmetic and the detection of representational biases. Furthermore, we show that deviation in this space provides a ground-truth-free measure for atypical structures, and signals physical prediction failures. Our results suggest that the platonic representation offers a practical route towards interoperable, comparable and interpretable foundation models for materials science.

41

深度学习赋能的可编程拓扑电路#

Deep-learning-empowered programmable topolectrical circuits
📚 Nature Communications👤 Hao Jia, Shanglin Yang, Jiajun He, Shuo Liu 等12位作者📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出深度学习驱动的可编程拓扑电路平台，核心创新在于实现哈密顿量项的独立连续调谐与物理图启发的逆向态设计，突破了传统方法的可编程性瓶颈。研究意义在于首次在无全局对称性高阶拓扑系统中观测边界态与绝热相
拓扑电路为探索现代物理模型提供了一个多功能平台，然而现有方法缺乏完全可编程性以及逆向态设计的有效机制。在此，我们提出一种深度学习赋能的可编程拓扑电路平台，用于物理建模与分析。我们的系统集成了在位和离位哈密顿量项的完全独立连续调谐、物理图启发的逆向态设计以及即时硬件验证，从而架起了理论建模与实际实现之间的桥梁。通过灵活控制和绝热路径工程，我们在无全局对称性的高阶拓扑系统中实验观测到了边界态、相关的绝热相变，以及对应于朗道能级的平带特征。…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

拓扑电路为探索现代物理模型提供了一个多功能平台，然而现有方法缺乏完全可编程性以及逆向态设计的有效机制。在此，我们提出一种深度学习赋能的可编程拓扑电路平台，用于物理建模与分析。我们的系统集成了在位和离位哈密顿量项的完全独立连续调谐、物理图启发的逆向态设计以及即时硬件验证，从而架起了理论建模与实际实现之间的桥梁。通过灵活控制和绝热路径工程，我们在无全局对称性的高阶拓扑系统中实验观测到了边界态、相关的绝热相变，以及对应于朗道能级的平带特征。结合物理图启发的生成模型，我们实现了任意位置可控的安德森局域化，超越了传统的随机方法。利用这一能力，我们展示了物理机制驱动的概率信息加密和产品防伪。我们的工作确立了一种范式，其中深度学习与可编程硬件协同实现按需逆向设计，架起了物理学与信息技术之间的桥梁。

English Abstract

Topolectrical circuits provide a versatile platform for exploring modern physical models, yet existing approaches lack full programmability and effective mechanisms for inverse state design. Here, we present a deep-learning-empowered programmable topolectrical circuit platform for physical modeling and analysis. Our system integrating fully independent, continuous tuning of on-site and off-site Hamiltonian terms, physics-graph-informed inverse state design, and immediate hardware verification, thereby bridges theoretical modeling and practical realization. Through flexible control and adiabatic path engineering, we experimentally observe boundary states in higher-order topological systems without global symmetry, the associated adiabatic phase transitions, and flat-band characteristics corresponding to Landau levels. Incorporating a physics-graph-informed generative model, we achieve arbitrary, position-controllable Anderson localization surpassing conventional random approaches. Leveraging this capability, we demonstrate physics-mechanism-driven probabilistic information encryption and product anti-counterfeiting. Our work establishes a paradigm where deep learning and programmable hardware synergistically enable on-demand inverse design, bridging physics and information technologies.

42

Meta-LegNet：基于自定义吸附环境学习的可迁移可解释表面吸附预测框架#

Meta-LegNet: A Transferable and Interpretable Framework for Surface Adsorption Prediction via Self-Defined Adsorption-Environment Learning
📚 arXiv👤 Yifan Li, Arravind Subramanian, Xiaoqing Liu, Qiujie Lyu, Sergey Kozlov, Lei Shen📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：Meta-LegNet创新性地融合SE(3)等变消息传递、体素多尺度聚合与元学习，实现跨表面可迁移的局部吸附环境表征学习。该框架绕过DFT迭代优化，直接预测低能量吸附构型，显著提升了复杂催化表面高通量
作者提出Meta-LegNet图学习框架，结合SE(3)等变原子级消息传递、体素多尺度聚合与跨域元学习，以学习可迁移的局部吸附环境表征。该方法通过不变径向特征与等变方向信息编码局部化学环境，并借助坐标框架体素池化整合更广结构上下文，旨在高效识别低能量化学合理吸附构型，突破传统DFT迭代优化在复杂表面的可扩展性瓶颈。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

作者提出Meta-LegNet图学习框架，结合SE(3)等变原子级消息传递、体素多尺度聚合与跨域元学习，以学习可迁移的局部吸附环境表征。该方法通过不变径向特征与等变方向信息编码局部化学环境，并借助坐标框架体素池化整合更广结构上下文，旨在高效识别低能量化学合理吸附构型，突破传统DFT迭代优化在复杂表面的可扩展性瓶颈。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04102v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A central challenge in computational catalysis is the identification of low-energy and chemically plausible adsorption configurations, as these directly affect adsorption energies, reaction pathways, and catalytic performance. Existing approaches generally rely on enumerating candidate adsorption sites followed by iterative refinement through density functional theory calculations or machine-learning-based relaxations. However, such workflows remain computationally expensive and are difficult to scale to complex surfaces or multi-adsorbate systems. Here, we introduce Meta-LegNet, a graph learning framework that combines SE(3)-equivariant atom-level message passing with voxel-based multiscale aggregation and cross-domain meta-learning to learn transferable representations of local adsorption environments across diverse catalyst--adsorbate systems. Rather than following a conventional regression-only paradigm, Meta-LegNet encodes local chemical environments using invariant radial features and equivariant directional information, and further incorporates broader structural context through coordinate-frame voxel pooling, assignment-based upsampling, and gated feature fusion. The resulting local-global decomposition produces atom-resolved attribution maps, which are processed to identify adsorption-relevant local environments in an interpretable manner. Based on the learned representations, we further construct an adsorption-environment database and develop a template-matching strategy to propose likely adsorption sites on previously unexplored surfaces without exhaustive site enumeration. Overall, our results suggest that learning transferable adsorption environments provides an accurate, interpretable, and practical route for accelerating catalyst screening.

43

原子级量子模拟的自旋动力学#

Spin Dynamics from Atomistic Quantum Simulations
📚 arXiv👤 Enrico Drigo, Marquis M. McMillan, Benjamin Pingault, Yinan Dong, F. Joseph Heremans, David D. Awschalom, Giulia Galli📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：基于Kubo线性响应理论建立自旋弛豫统一计算框架，创新性地将机器学习势与从头算分子动力学相结合，实现高温下金刚石NV中心T₁时间的精准预测，为固态自旋量子器件的材料设计与性能优化提供高效理论工具。
作者基于Kubo线性响应理论，推导出自旋-晶格弛豫时间T₁与退相干时间T₂的关联函数表达式，并利用机器学习势结合从头算数据生成的分子动力学轨迹计算自旋-晶格耦合的时间序列。该方法成功预测了金刚石NV中心在高温下的T₁时间，与实验结果高度吻合，为固态自旋缺陷的量子应用提供了统一的理论预测框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

作者基于Kubo线性响应理论，推导出自旋-晶格弛豫时间T₁与退相干时间T₂的关联函数表达式，并利用机器学习势结合从头算数据生成的分子动力学轨迹计算自旋-晶格耦合的时间序列。该方法成功预测了金刚石NV中心在高温下的T₁时间，与实验结果高度吻合，为固态自旋缺陷的量子应用提供了统一的理论预测框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04294v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Optically active solid-state spin defects are promising candidates for quantum applications, however a unified theoretical framework to predict their spin dynamics at high temperatures is not yet available. Here, using Kubo linear--response theory, we derive expressions of spin-lattice and decoherence times (T₁) and (T₂) in terms of correlation functions of spin--lattice couplings. We then evaluate (T₁) and (T₂) from molecular dynamics and spin--lattice interaction time--series generated by state--of--the--art machine learning models trained on it ab--initio data. Finally we measure (T₁) times for the NV center in diamond and compare experimental and theoretical results, showing excellent agreement.

44

高压下非晶硅剪切诱导LDA↔HDA转变与剪切带化的原子机制#

Unveiling the Atomistic Mechanisms of Shear-Induced LDAłeftrightarrowHDA Transformations and Shear Banding in Amorphous Silicon under High Pressures
📚 arXiv👤 Hao Chen, Valery I. Levitas, Tengyi Liu, Jingyu Lu, Rui Zhu, Zhongqiang Zhang📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究通过机器学习势实现大规模模拟，首次建立剪切应变控制的LDA-HDA相变解析模型，定量揭示剪切降低相变压力的机制；发现剪切带内HDA分数骤降的反常现象，提出局域剪切变换区触发HDA团簇形核的新机制
该工作采用高斯近似势进行大规模分子动力学模拟，研究了非晶硅在恒定压力下的剪切变形、LDA-HDA相变及剪切带形成。发现剪切诱导的LDA↔HDA相变同时发生直至稳态，所发展的机制型解析模型良好描述了剪切应变控制的相变动力学；剪切使相变启动和完成压力分别降低4.36和5.10 GPa。意外发现剪切带内HDA原子分数急剧下降，揭示了局域剪切变换区触发HDA团簇形核的原子机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用高斯近似势进行大规模分子动力学模拟，研究了非晶硅在恒定压力下的剪切变形、LDA-HDA相变及剪切带形成。发现剪切诱导的LDA↔HDA相变同时发生直至稳态，所发展的机制型解析模型良好描述了剪切应变控制的相变动力学；剪切使相变启动和完成压力分别降低4.36和5.10 GPa。意外发现剪切带内HDA原子分数急剧下降，揭示了局域剪切变换区触发HDA团簇形核的原子机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04521v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large-scale molecular dynamics simulations of shear deformation under constant pressures of amorphous silicon, PT from low-density-amorphous (LDA) to high-density-amorphous (HDA) Si, and formation of shear bands (SBs) are performed using the state-of-the-art Gaussian Approximation Potential. The simulations reveal that LDAłeftrightarrowHDA shear-induced PTs occur simultaneously until reaching steady state. The developed mechanism-based analytical model well describes shear-strain-governed kinetics and steady states at all pressures, independent of shear stresses. Shear reduces the pressure for initiation and completion of LDAi̊ghtarrowHDA PT by 4.36 and 5.10 GPa, respectively. Without PT at low pressure, shear-banding occurs, which is partially suppressed by PT at higher pressure with uniform deformation-PT at 9.8 GPa. Despite the much larger shear and expected fraction of HDA, surprising sharp drop in the HDA atomic fraction within the SB was discovered. In bulk, Si deforms by atomic rearrangement in localized shear transformation zones with high nonaffine displacements, which trigger nucleation of HDA clusters within LDA and, concurrently, of LDA clusters within HDA, without growth and coalescence. In SB, a turbulent-like flow with swirls is revealed, which promotes reverse PT from HDAi̊ghtarrowLDA more effectively. Transformation-induced plasticity in amorphous Si is revealed. The findings open up basic research into the mechanisms and kinetics of plastic strain-induced PTs in amorphous materials under high pressure, with numerous important applications.

45

超越目标导向构建高信息量的材料数据集#

Building informative materials datasets beyond targeted objectives
📚 arXiv👤 Rafael Espinosa Castañeda, Ashley Dale, Hongchen Wang, Yonatan Kurniawan, Hao Wan, Runze Zhang, Adji Bousso Dieng, Kangming Li, Jason Hattrick-Simpers📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统目标导向的数据集构建范式，创新性地提出"多样性感知选择"框架，在优化目标属性信息量的同时保留非目标属性的预测能力。其核心在于平衡信息密度与空间覆盖度，解决了窄化采样导致的模型泛化失效问题
该工作提出在最大化目标属性信息量的同时保留非目标属性性能的数据集构建框架，采用多样性感知选择确保材料空间的广泛覆盖。在噪声实验数据集构建中，无多样性框架时非目标属性预测性能相对随机采样可下降40%，而应用该框架可提升10%；目标属性无多样性时性能下降12.5%，该框架可实现25%增益。研究表明将多样性纳入数据集构建不仅保持信息量，且增强数据集的长期复用价值。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出在最大化目标属性信息量的同时保留非目标属性性能的数据集构建框架，采用多样性感知选择确保材料空间的广泛覆盖。在噪声实验数据集构建中，无多样性框架时非目标属性预测性能相对随机采样可下降40%，而应用该框架可提升10%；目标属性无多样性时性能下降12.5%，该框架可实现25%增益。研究表明将多样性纳入数据集构建不仅保持信息量，且增强数据集的长期复用价值。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05104v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Materials science data collection can be expensive, making the reuse and long-term utility of datasets critical important for future discovery campaigns. In practice, researchers prioritize a subset of properties due to research interests. However, ignoring a subset of outcomes in data collection campaigns potentially generate datasets poorly suited for future learning tasks. Here, we present a framework for dataset construction that maximizes informativeness for target properties of interest while preserving performance on untargeted ones. Our approach uses diversity-aware selection to ensure broad coverage of the materials space. In noisy experimental dataset construction, we find that without our diversity-aware framework, prediction performance on untargeted properties can degrade by up to 40% relative to random sampling, whereas applying our framework yields improvements of up to 10% . For targeted properties, performance can degrade with respect to random sampling by up to 12.5% without diversity, while our framework achieves gains of up to 25%. Incorporating diversity into dataset construction not only preserves informativeness for the targeted properties, but also improves materials coverage for potential future objectives. As a result, the constructed datasets remain broadly informative across considered and unconsidered outcomes, ensuring unbiased quality entries and mitigating cold-start limitations in subsequent modeling and discovery campaigns.

46

SemiConLens：二维半导体发现的视觉分析工具#

SemiConLens: Visual Analytics for 2D Semiconductor Discovery
📚 arXiv👤 Kavinda Athapaththu, Shiwei Chen, Yuan Fang, Sanchali Mitra, Yee Sin Ang, Yong Wang📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：SemiConLens通过融合专家知识与机器学习，创新性地提出相关性感知多变量插补方法解决稀疏数据难题，以不确定性量化增强预测可靠性；其多视图交互可视化框架显著提升了二维半导体材料筛选的效率与可解释性
该工作提出SemiConLens视觉分析方法，结合人类专家知识与机器学习实现高效可靠的二维半导体材料发现。针对半导体预测中的稀疏数据挑战，开发了相关性感知多变量插补（CAMI）方法，并利用自编码器等模型学习有限数据并揭示不确定性。可视化模块包含三个关联交互视图，支持材料研究人员对二维半导体进行交互式筛选、发现与比较。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出SemiConLens视觉分析方法，结合人类专家知识与机器学习实现高效可靠的二维半导体材料发现。针对半导体预测中的稀疏数据挑战，开发了相关性感知多变量插补（CAMI）方法，并利用自编码器等模型学习有限数据并揭示不确定性。可视化模块包含三个关联交互视图，支持材料研究人员对二维半导体进行交互式筛选、发现与比较。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04067v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The past few years have witnessed vibrant efforts in discovering new two-dimensional (2D) semiconductor materials from both academia and the industry, due to their promising potential in resolving the severe performance deterioration of traditional semiconductors resulting from condensed silicon thickness. However, existing methods (e.g., Density Functional Theory (DFT) or machine-learning-based approaches) suffer from various challenges such as small datasets, and reliability and trustworthiness issues. To bridge this gap, we propose SemiConLens, a visual analytics approach to combine human expertise with the power of ML to enable effective and reliable 2D semiconductor discovery. Specifically, we first develop a new Correlation Aware Multivariate Imputation (CAMI) method and use ML models like autoencoder, which can better learn from limited data and reveal uncertainty, to address the challenge of sparse data in semiconductivity prediction. Built upon this, our visualization module, consisting of three visualization views with linked interactions, allows material researchers to interactively filter, discover and compare 2D semiconductor candidates. A novel circular glyph design and a new cluster-aware layout optimization approach are proposed to effectively display all the user-configurable key attributes and possible prediction uncertainties of each semiconductor candidate, ensuring a reliable and trustable 2D semiconductor discovery. We assess SemiConLens through quantitative evaluations, expert interviews, and use cases. The results demonstrate SemiConLens's capability to help material researchers conduct effective discovery of desirable 2D semiconductors.

47

神经网络建模多体超辐射与亚辐射动力学#

Neural network modeling of many-body super- and sub-radiant dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Gianluca Lagnese, Laurin Brunner, Lorenzo Rossi, Darrick Chang, Markus Schmitt, Zala Lenarčič📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破神经量子态的应用边界，将其拓展至含结构耗散与长程相互作用的光-物质耦合系统，解决了传统方法无法处理的多体耗散动力学难题；为冷原子平台实现亚辐射态的量子模拟提供了可扩展的理论工具，对量子信息存
该工作首次将神经量子态应用于超越精确计算与张量网络可及范围的光-物质耦合系统耗散动力学模拟。针对一维和二维稠密阵列中约40个原子的多体发射动力学进行模拟，这些系统因结构耗散与长程相互作用组合可在晚期支持显著的亚辐射动力学，且可用冷原子量子模拟器实现。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作首次将神经量子态应用于超越精确计算与张量网络可及范围的光-物质耦合系统耗散动力学模拟。针对一维和二维稠密阵列中约40个原子的多体发射动力学进行模拟，这些系统因结构耗散与长程相互作用组合可在晚期支持显著的亚辐射动力学，且可用冷原子量子模拟器实现。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04640v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: There is significant interest in exploring novel phenomena in quantum light-matter interfaces, which are driven by the combination of structured dissipation and long-range interactions that are typical in such systems. To this end, it is important to develop new general numerical simulation techniques, which can access large system sizes and are not based on semi-classical approaches. Here, we report the first application of neural quantum states to obtain the dissipative dynamics of light-matter-coupled systems beyond what is accessible with exact and tensor-network calculations. We specifically apply this method to simulate the many-body emission dynamics of approximately 40 atoms, arranged in dense arrays in one and two dimensions. These systems have been chosen because they can support prominent subradiant dynamics at late times and could be realized with cold atomic quantum simulators.

48

比采样更高效地估计宽随机MLP的期望输出#

Estimating the expected output of wide random MLPs more efficiently than sampling
📚 arXiv👤 Wilson Wu, Victor Lecomte, Michael Winer, George Robinson, Jacob Hilton, Paul Christiano📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破蒙特卡洛采样范式，首创基于累积量展开与Hermite多项式的逐层解析估计框架，实现宽MLP期望输出的确定性高效计算；其核心意义在于将稀有事件概率估计的复杂度从采样依赖降至解析逼近，为神经网络
该工作提出不通过网络采样的方法估计初始化MLP对高斯输入的期望输出，转而利用累积量与Hermite展开等工具逐层近似激活分布。理论与实验表明，对足够宽的网络，该估计器以显著少于蒙特卡洛采样的浮点运算达到目标均方误差，在估计稀有事件概率时表现尤为突出，并可应用于模型训练以降低灾难性尾部风险。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出不通过网络采样的方法估计初始化MLP对高斯输入的期望输出，转而利用累积量与Hermite展开等工具逐层近似激活分布。理论与实验表明，对足够宽的网络，该估计器以显著少于蒙特卡洛采样的浮点运算达到目标均方误差，在估计稀有事件概率时表现尤为突出，并可应用于模型训练以降低灾难性尾部风险。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05179v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: By far the most common way to estimate an expected loss in machine learning is to draw samples, compute the loss on each one, and take the empirical average. However, sampling is not necessarily optimal. Given an MLP at initialization, we show how to estimate its expected output over Gaussian inputs without running samples through the network at all. Instead, we produce approximate representations of the distributions of activations at each layer, leveraging tools such as cumulants and Hermite expansions. We show both theoretically and empirically that for sufficiently wide networks, our estimator achieves a target mean squared error using substantially fewer FLOPs than Monte Carlo sampling. We find moreover that our methods perform particularly well at estimating the probabilities of rare events, and additionally demonstrate how they can be used for model training. Together, these findings suggest a path to producing models with a greatly reduced probability of catastrophic tail risks.

49

PdNeuRAM：无需forming的多值Pd/HfO2阻变存储器用于高能效神经形态计算#

PdNeuRAM: forming-free, multi-bit Pd/HfO2 ReRAM for energy-efficient neuromorphic computing
📚 arXiv👤 Erbing Hua, Theofilos Spyrou, Majid Ahmadi, Abdul Momin Syed, Hanzhi Xun, Laurentiu Braic, Ewout van der Veer, Nazek Elatab, Anteneh Gebregiorgis, Georgi Gaydadjiev, Beatriz Noheda, Said Hamdioui, Ryoichi Ishihara, Heba Abunahla📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作通过Pd-O-Hf界面工程重构氧离子迁移路径，从材料本征机制层面消除了HfO₂基忆阻器必需的电forming工艺，突破了传统器件高能耗、高变异性的瓶颈；其多值低功耗特性与CMOS后端兼容，为存算
该工作提出基于HfO2的无forming阻变存储器PdNeuRAM，利用Pd-O-Hf构型在室温下主动促进电荷重分布从而消除电forming需求。器件具有低工作电压、多值功能与降低的变异性，在脉冲神经网络中编程与读取能耗分别降低43%和73%，适用于高密度存储与高能效神经形态计算。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出基于HfO2的无forming阻变存储器PdNeuRAM，利用Pd-O-Hf构型在室温下主动促进电荷重分布从而消除电forming需求。器件具有低工作电压、多值功能与降低的变异性，在脉冲神经网络中编程与读取能耗分别降低43%和73%，适用于高密度存储与高能效神经形态计算。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.22789v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Memristor technology shows great promise for energy-efficient computing, yet it grapples with challenges like resistance drift and inherent variability. For filamentary Resistive RAM (ReRAM), one of the most investigated types of memristive devices, the expensive electroforming step required to create conductive pathways results in increased power and area overheads and reduced endurance. In this study, we present novel HfO2-based forming-free ReRAM devices, PdNeuRAM, that operate at low voltages, support multi-bit functionality, and display reduced variability. Through a deep understanding and comprehensive material characterization, we discover the key process that allows this unique behavior: a Pd-O-Hf configuration that capitalizes on Pd innate affinity for integrating into HfO2. This structure actively facilitates charge redistribution at room temperature, effectively eliminating the need for electroforming. Moreover, the fabricated ReRAM device provides tunable resistance states for dense memory and reduces programming and reading energy by 43% and 73%, respectively, using spiking neural networks (SNN). This study reveals novel mechanistic insights and delineates a strategic roadmap for the realization of power-efficient and cost-effective ReRAM devices.

50

从纽结到晶体：液晶自组装拓扑孤子的机器学习势#

From Knots to Crystals: Machine-Learned Potentials for Self-Assembling Topological Solitons in Liquid Crystals
📚 arXiv👤 Arunkumar Bupathy, Darian Hall, Ivan I. Smalyukh, Gerardo Campos-Villalobos, Rodolfo Subert, Marjolein Dijkstra📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究的核心创新在于将机器学习与单点粗粒化相结合，突破了传统连续介质模型在时空尺度上的计算瓶颈。其意义在于建立了可迁移的拓扑孤子模拟框架，不仅为heliknoton的集体行为预测提供高效工具，更为液晶
该工作针对手性液晶中稳定纽结孤子（heliknoton）的自组装行为，开发机器学习单点粗粒化势函数。所得势函数准确复现实验观测的heliknoton组装结构，并将模拟时空尺度远超精细连续介质模型。该框架可推广至其他拓扑孤子，为理解、预测和控制其集体行为与动力学提供有力工具。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对手性液晶中稳定纽结孤子（heliknoton）的自组装行为，开发机器学习单点粗粒化势函数。所得势函数准确复现实验观测的heliknoton组装结构，并将模拟时空尺度远超精细连续介质模型。该框架可推广至其他拓扑孤子，为理解、预测和控制其集体行为与动力学提供有力工具。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.23265v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Knotted fields in classical and quantum systems have long been recognized for their non-trivial topologies and particle-like behavior, but practical applications have been limited by the difficulty of stabilizing them. Recently, stable knotted solitonic textures--heliknotons--were discovered in chiral liquid crystals, forming adaptive crystal assemblies via elastic distortion-mediated interactions. We use machine learning to develop single-site coarse-grained potentials that accurately capture these chiral anisotropic effective interactions. The resulting potentials accurately reproduce experimentally observed heliknoton assemblies and enable simulations at length and time scales far beyond the range of fine-grained continuum models. This general framework is readily transferable to other topological solitons, providing a powerful route to understand, predict, and ultimately control their collective behavior and dynamics.

51

求解空间非均匀电子玻尔兹曼方程的物理信息神经网络方法#

A physics-informed neural network approach to solve the spatially inhomogeneous electron Boltzmann equation
📚 arXiv👤 Ihda Chaerony Siffa, Detlef Loffhagen, Markus M. Becker, Jan Trieschmann📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次将PINN直接应用于动能空间的一维非均匀电子玻尔兹曼方程求解，绕过传统总能量变换的复杂处理。核心创新在于针对动理学方程特有的收敛难题，设计了融合傅里叶特征嵌入、自适应激活与门控缩放的专用网络
该工作探索物理信息神经网络（PINN）求解一维空间非均匀电子玻尔兹曼方程（EBE），在动能空间直接求解各向同性分布函数的两项近似方程，无需常规的总能量变换。针对该类动理学方程的收敛困难，提出包含傅里叶特征输入层、自适应激活函数及缩放乘法门控机制的新型网络架构，确保全网络鲁棒的梯度流。与参考数据的基准测试验证了该方法的有效性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作探索物理信息神经网络（PINN）求解一维空间非均匀电子玻尔兹曼方程（EBE），在动能空间直接求解各向同性分布函数的两项近似方程，无需常规的总能量变换。针对该类动理学方程的收敛困难，提出包含傅里叶特征输入层、自适应激活函数及缩放乘法门控机制的新型网络架构，确保全网络鲁棒的梯度流。与参考数据的基准测试验证了该方法的有效性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04307v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The accurate determination of electron properties is fundamental to low-temperature plasma simulations, necessitating precise solutions to the spatially inhomogeneous electron Boltzmann equation (EBE). This work explores the use of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) for obtaining solutions to the spatially one-dimensional (1D) EBE subject to a uniform electric field in atomic gases. Employing the two-term approximation, the resulting equation for the isotropic distribution is solved directly in kinetic energy space without the conventional transformation to total energy. This approach demonstrates the flexibility of the PINN framework in handling diverse equation formulations. To address the convergence difficulties associated with this class of kinetic equations, a new neural network architecture is introduced. It features a Fourier-feature input layer, adaptive activation functions, and a scaled multiplicative gating mechanism. It is demonstrated that this formulation preserves robust gradient flow throughout the network, which is critical for learning physically correct solutions. Benchmarking against reference data reveals that the present architecture achieves excellent agreement across both microscopic and macroscopic properties of the electrons. Furthermore, the architecture exhibits strong generalization across different gas types and a defined range of electric field strengths without requiring case-specific hyperparameter tuning. Ultimately, the excellent accuracy achieved here validates the applicability of the present PINN method.

52

基于机器学习的极低当量核试验裂变产额推断：γ能谱验证方法#

Machine learning inference of fission yields from gamma spectroscopy for very low-yield nuclear test verification
📚 arXiv👤 Julien de Troullioud de Lanversin, Jiehui Li, Christopher Fichtlscherer, Dongdong She, Moritz Kutt📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对核禁试核查中极低当量试验难以识别的挑战，该研究创新性地将XGBoost机器学习与高保真蒙特卡罗模拟相结合，突破传统方法对实验条件先验知识的依赖，通过γ能谱特征直接推断裂变产额，为区分超临界与次临界
该工作针对《全面禁止核试验条约》零当量标准下极低当量核试验的核查难题，提出用机器学习模型从模拟γ能谱数据中推断裂变产额的新方法。通过高保真三维蒙特卡罗粒子输运模拟生成6600万种代表性场景的γ能谱，提取82种裂变产物与钚-239的峰面积比，训练XGBoost模型进行产额阈值二分类与实际产额回归。该方法旨在降低传统分析对实验条件先验知识的依赖，为区分超临界与次临界试验提供数据驱动途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对《全面禁止核试验条约》零当量标准下极低当量核试验的核查难题，提出用机器学习模型从模拟γ能谱数据中推断裂变产额的新方法。通过高保真三维蒙特卡罗粒子输运模拟生成6600万种代表性场景的γ能谱，提取82种裂变产物与钚-239的峰面积比，训练XGBoost模型进行产额阈值二分类与实际产额回归。该方法旨在降低传统分析对实验条件先验知识的依赖，为区分超临界与次临界试验提供数据驱动途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04674v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Very low-yield nuclear tests pose a major verification challenge for the zero-yield standard of the Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty (CTBT). The zero-yield standard prohibits any explosive experiment that produces a self-sustaining fission chain reaction while allowing subcritical experiments. Previous research shows that on-site gamma spectroscopy of post-test debris provides useful insight into the criticality level, although it remains heavily dependent on knowledge of certain experimental settings. Here, we adopt a new approach whereby machine learning models are trained on simulated gamma spectroscopy data to infer the fission yield of a nuclear very low-yield test. Using high-fidelity 3D Monte Carlo particle transport simulations, we generated gamma spectra measured outside containment vessels after very low-yield tests for 66 million representative scenarios. From these spectra, we extracted 82 fission-product-to-plutonium-239 peak ratios, then trained ML models for two tasks: (1) binary classification of whether a test exceeded a chosen yield threshold, and (2) regression to estimate the actual yield. We find that XGBoost performs best on the classification task across the most policy-relevant yield range. The classifier achieves high accuracy even for yields near the chosen threshold (e.g., >95% for yields +-100 g around a threshold at 1 kg TNT), and the regressor presents a mean absolute relative error of 12.4% for measurements taken a month to a year after the test. These results demonstrate that using machine learning to infer the yield of a past very low-yield nuclear test from gamma spectroscopy data is feasible and accurate. This approach can support efforts to establish a robust verification protocol for the zero-yield standard and could pave the way for a future yield threshold-based verification regime that is both technically feasible and politically viable.

53

CH₂⁺远紫外光解离的多态耦合 diabatic 神经网络势#

Multistate Coupled Diabatic Neural Network potential for the quantum non-adiabatic Photofragmentation of CH₂⁺
📚 arXiv👤 Pablo del Mazo-Sevillano, Susana Gomez-Carrasco, Alfredo Aguado, Octavio Roncero📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将物理驱动的零阶模型与神经网络修正相结合，通过对称性约束实现全自动化diabatization，突破了传统方法需人工干预的瓶颈。所构建的 diabatic 势能矩阵精确描述CH₂⁺多激发
该工作提出一种全自动化diabatization方法，利用人工神经网络拟合多激发态的diabatic势能矩阵（PEM）。方法将PEM分解为物理基础的零阶对角项与神经网络修正矩阵，通过对称性约束实现完全自动化。以CH₂⁺光解离为验证体系，含时波包计算涵盖至约13.6 eV的相关电子态，得到各碎裂通道（CH⁺、CH、H₂、H₂⁺）的分截面，发现CH自由基形成截面显著偏高。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出一种全自动化diabatization方法，利用人工神经网络拟合多激发态的diabatic势能矩阵（PEM）。方法将PEM分解为物理基础的零阶对角项与神经网络修正矩阵，通过对称性约束实现完全自动化。以CH₂⁺光解离为验证体系，含时波包计算涵盖至约13.6 eV的相关电子态，得到各碎裂通道（CH⁺、CH、H₂、H₂⁺）的分截面，发现CH自由基形成截面显著偏高。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04756v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tracking the complex non-adiabatic transitions in far-ultraviolet photodissociation demands highly accurate diabatic potential energy matrices (PEMs) across numerous excited states. To address this, we introduce a fully automated diabatization method that leverages artificial neural networks to fit PEMs. Our approach divides the PEM into a physically grounded zeroth-order diagonal term, which is then corrected by a neural network matrix to capture electronic couplings. By enforcing symmetry constraints on off-diagonal elements and sharing degenerate diabatic states between the A' and A'' irreducible representations, the diabatization process becomes completely automatic. We validate this method using time-dependent wavepacket calculations to simulate the photodissociation of CH₂⁺, incorporating relevant states up to approx 13.6~eV. Finally, we compute partial cross-sections for all fragmentation channels -- including total and partial fragmentation yielding ȩCH+, ȩCH, ȩH2, and ȩH2+ diatoms -- revealing a notably high cross-section for the formation of the ȩCH radical.

54

深度波动网络：多尺度物理动力学建模#

Deep Wave Network for Modeling Multi-Scale Physical Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Alexander I. Khrabry, Edward A. Startsev, Andrew T. Powis, Igor D. Kaganovich📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统U-Net"固定深度、仅调宽度"的架构优化范式，首创系统性深度扩展策略，揭示多尺度物理动力学模拟中深度-精度-成本的标度规律，为计算流体力学与等离子体模拟的高效神经网络架构设计提供理论指
该工作针对U-Net型编码器-解码器模型在多尺度气体、流体与等离子体动力学中的应用，系统探索深度对精度-成本权衡的影响。传统U-Net通常固定深度、仅调宽度，该工作通过增加下采样/上采样阶段数量及每阶段卷积层数来扩展深度，研究不同宽度-深度组合下的精度-成本标度行为，以突破现有架构优化局限。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对U-Net型编码器-解码器模型在多尺度气体、流体与等离子体动力学中的应用，系统探索深度对精度-成本权衡的影响。传统U-Net通常固定深度、仅调宽度，该工作通过增加下采样/上采样阶段数量及每阶段卷积层数来扩展深度，研究不同宽度-深度组合下的精度-成本标度行为，以突破现有架构优化局限。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04198v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Performance of deep learning models is strongly governed by architectural capacity, with width and depth as primary controls. However, in physical-science applications, models are often compared at a single fixed size or by separating accuracy and computational cost, which can be misleading since architectures exhibit different accuracy-cost scaling as width and depth vary. This issue is particularly relevant for U-Net-type encoder-decoder models, widely used for multi-scale gas, fluid, and plasma dynamics due to their ability to represent features across spatial scales. A U-Net constructs a multi-resolution representation via an encoder that progressively reduces spatial resolution, followed by a decoder that restores it for prediction. Skip connections link corresponding encoder and decoder features, preserving fine-scale information and improving optimization. In practice, U-Net width is routinely tuned, while depth is typically kept fixed (a set number of down/up-sampling stages with few convolutions per stage), limiting systematic exploration of depth for improving the accuracy-cost trade-off. We address this limitation by increasing effective depth through stacking multiple encoder-decoder "waves" in series, with skip connections both within and across waves to enable progressive cross-scale refinement. We call this architecture a Deep Wave Network (DW-Net). Training data, optimization, and schedules are kept identical across models. Instead of evaluating single configurations, we train multiple width variants of each architecture and compare accuracy vs. GPU time Pareto fronts. Across several 2D and 3D flow benchmarks, DW-Net models consistently improve the Pareto frontier over single-wave U-Nets, achieving higher accuracy at matched cost or similar accuracy at reduced cost, and reaching low-error regimes with up to 3x less training time under identical training settings.

55

从视频到偏微分方程：非线性染料羽流动力学的数据驱动发现#

From Video-to-PDE: Data-Driven Discovery of Nonlinear Dye Plume Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Cesar Acosta-Minoli, Sayantan Sarkar📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作核心创新在于建立"视频→PDE"全自动发现框架，通过强度加权质心分解漂移与扩散、紧凑梯度基库解决共线性病态、逆PINN与rollout再校准三重机制，实现非线性羽流的有效输运定律提取。其意义在于
该工作开发视频到PDE管道，将墨水羽流灰度录像转换为归一化标量场，通过强度加权质心分离整体漂移与内禀扩散，并以弱形式稀疏回归识别有效输运定律。针对过完备库的强共线性，限制为紧凑梯度基库；系数经逆物理信息网络精化并与前向 rollout 再校准，时序块自助法量化不确定性。所得约化模型uₜ+v(t)·∇u = 9.005|∇u|²+0.666Δu优于对流-扩散基线，拉普拉斯系数为正，可经Cole-Hopf变换约化为线性对流-扩散方程。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发视频到PDE管道，将墨水羽流灰度录像转换为归一化标量场，通过强度加权质心分离整体漂移与内禀扩散，并以弱形式稀疏回归识别有效输运定律。针对过完备库的强共线性，限制为紧凑梯度基库；系数经逆物理信息网络精化并与前向 rollout 再校准，时序块自助法量化不确定性。所得约化模型uₜ+v(t)·∇u = 9.005|∇u|²+0.666Δu优于对流-扩散基线，拉普拉斯系数为正，可经Cole-Hopf变换约化为线性对流-扩散方程。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04535v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Inferring continuum models directly from video is hampered by two facts: the recorded field is uncalibrated image intensity rather than a physical state, and direct numerical differentiation of noisy frames is unstable. We develop a video-to-PDE pipeline that converts grayscale recordings of an ink plume into a normalised scalar field u(x,y,t), isolates a bulk drift v(t) from intrinsic spreading via the intensity-weighted centroid, and identifies an effective transport law by weak-form sparse regression. Conditioning, threshold-sweep and random-centre diagnostics show that overcomplete libraries are strongly collinear; the search is therefore restricted to compact gradient-based libraries. Coefficients are refined by an inverse physics-informed network and recalibrated against forward rollouts, with a chronological block bootstrap quantifying uncertainty. The selected reduced model uₜ₊mathbf v(t)!ḑot!nabla u = 9.005,|nabla u|²+0.666,Δ u outperforms advection--diffusion baselines on held-out frames, retains a positive Laplacian coefficient, and admits a Cole--Hopf reduction to a linear advection--diffusion equation. The framework demonstrates that uncalibrated visual data can yield compact, predictive and structurally interpretable continuum models when discovery, calibration and uncertainty are treated as distinct stages.

56

面向AI数据中心短期GPU功率预测的物理感知框架#

A Physics-Aware Framework for Short-Term GPU Power Forecasting of AI Data Centers
📚 arXiv👤 Mohammad AlShaikh Saleh, Sanjay Chawla, Sertac Bayhan, Haitham Abu-Rub, Ali Ghrayeb📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将热力学物理约束嵌入轻量时序模型，突破纯数据驱动预测缺乏物理可解释性的瓶颈。PI-DLinear以集总RC网络刻画GPU电热耦合动态，确保预测结果满足功率节流的物理边界，为AI数据中心实
该工作提出首个物理信息嵌入的DLinear时序模型PI-DLinear，用于预测AI数据中心5-80分钟短期GPU功率利用。基于多节点集总热阻-容（RC）网络与牛顿冷却定律，建立功率消耗与GPU计算、内存利用率及温度耦合的时变常微分方程。在真实AI数据中心数据集上训练评估，该模型较现有最优方法更准确，且预测曲线满足功率节流下的底层物理约束。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出首个物理信息嵌入的DLinear时序模型PI-DLinear，用于预测AI数据中心5-80分钟短期GPU功率利用。基于多节点集总热阻-容（RC）网络与牛顿冷却定律，建立功率消耗与GPU计算、内存利用率及温度耦合的时变常微分方程。在真实AI数据中心数据集上训练评估，该模型较现有最优方法更准确，且预测曲线满足功率节流下的底层物理约束。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04074v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: AI data centers experience rapid fluctuations in power demand due to the heterogeneity of computational tasks that they have to support. For example, the power profile of inference and training of large language models (LLMs) is quite distinct and big divergences can result in the instability of the underlying electricity grid. In this paper we propose, to the best of our knowledge, the first physics-informed DLinear time-series model that can accurately forecast power utilization of an AI data center 5-80 minutes (short-term forecasting) into the future. The physics, based on a multi-node lumped thermal resistance-capacitance (RC) network consistent with Newton's law of cooling, is captured using newly derived time-dependent ordinary differential equations (ODE) that separately models and interlinks power consumption with the GPU compute and memory utilization and temperature. The resulting model, that we refer to as PI-DLinear, trained and evaluated on a real AI data center dataset and is not only more accurate than the state-of-the-art (SOTA) models tested, but the forecast profile respects the underlying physics under power throttling and load transient events. Relative to the SOTA transformer-based and non-transformer-based models, improvements in forecasting accuracy (averaged across all look-back and prediction windows) range from 0.782%-39.08% for MSE, 0.993%-51.82% for MAE, and 0.370%-22.28% for RMSE.

57

利用软传感器增强污水处理中空间变异N₂O模型预测的可解释性#

Enhancing the interpretability of spatially variable N2O model predictions with soft sensors during wastewater treatment
📚 arXiv👤 Mohammad Raeisi Gahrouei, Pedram Ramin, Vincenzo A. Riggio, Carlos Domingo-Felez📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将全厂机理模型与机器学习软传感器结合，系统量化了模型选择、空间尺度及扰动场景对N₂O预测可解释性的影响，揭示了自养-异养途径相互作用机制，为污水处理N₂O精准监测与减排策略优化提供了方法
该工作分析机器学习模型如何预测污水处理运行扰动及空间变异N₂O排放，验证四种ML模型（R²=0.79-0.89）的建模框架。通过全厂机理模型模拟N₂O监测活动，纳入附加传感器、厂级N₂O数据集及16种污水扰动。ML模型虽精度高（0.97±0.02），但特征重要性受模型、场景及N₂O测量尺度（反应器vs全厂）影响。研究指出N₂O软传感器预测受限于测量位置与方法学不确定性，机理模型分析揭示了自养与异养途径间的相互作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作分析机器学习模型如何预测污水处理运行扰动及空间变异N₂O排放，验证四种ML模型（R²=0.79-0.89）的建模框架。通过全厂机理模型模拟N₂O监测活动，纳入附加传感器、厂级N₂O数据集及16种污水扰动。ML模型虽精度高（0.97±0.02），但特征重要性受模型、场景及N₂O测量尺度（反应器vs全厂）影响。研究指出N₂O软传感器预测受限于测量位置与方法学不确定性，机理模型分析揭示了自养与异养途径间的相互作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04082v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Model-based solutions for nitrous oxide (N2O) emissions from wastewater treatment plants (WWTP) are informed by operational datasets designed to control nutrient levels in liquid waste, coupled with dedicated campaigns for N2O measurements. We analysed how machine learning (ML) models predict disturbances to WWT operation and spatially variable N2O emissions. A real dataset was investigated to validate the modelling framework from N2O emissions predicted by four ML models (R2 = 0.79 - 0.89). Monitoring campaigns for N2O were simulated with a plant-wide mechanistic model to include additional sensors, site-level N2O datasets, and wastewater disturbances (n = 16). ML models were highly accurate (0.97 +- 0.02, n = 80), but the feature importance depended on the model, the scenario and the N2O measurement scale (reactor vs. WWTP). We argue that N2O soft sensor model predictions are limited to the measuring location and the methodological uncertainty of the dataset, which affect the interpretability of the model. Lastly, the analysis of the mechanistic model structure exposed interactions between autotrophic and heterotrophic pathways over nitric oxide which can overestimate aerobic nitrite production and bias the N2O pathway contributions.

58

流形上卷积神经网络的同步逼近及其在边值问题中的应用#

Simultaneous CNN Approximation on Manifolds with Applications to Boundary Value Problems
📚 arXiv👤 Hanfei Zhou, Lei Shi📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破流形几何约束下的神经网络逼近理论瓶颈，核心创新在于建立CNN对函数及其导数的同步Sobolev逼近框架，揭示本征维数决定收敛速率从而规避维度灾难；针对物理信息神经网络边界惩罚与椭圆问题Sob
该工作发展紧致黎曼流形上边值问题的卷积神经网络（CNN）同步逼近方法。建立单通道与多通道CNN的同步Sobolev逼近理论，证明流形函数及其导数的逼近速率由本征维数与光滑间隙决定，缓解维度灾难。提出物理信息CNN（PICNN）框架，针对椭圆稳定性要求Sobolev迹控制而标准PINNs常用L²型边界惩罚的边界范数失配问题，引入基于边界Laplace-Beltrami算子的谱边界损失，将迹误差表示为加权频率能量。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展紧致黎曼流形上边值问题的卷积神经网络（CNN）同步逼近方法。建立单通道与多通道CNN的同步Sobolev逼近理论，证明流形函数及其导数的逼近速率由本征维数与光滑间隙决定，缓解维度灾难。提出物理信息CNN（PICNN）框架，针对椭圆稳定性要求Sobolev迹控制而标准PINNs常用L²型边界惩罚的边界范数失配问题，引入基于边界Laplace-Beltrami算子的谱边界损失，将迹误差表示为加权频率能量。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04126v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper develops convolutional neural network (CNN) methods for simultaneous approximation and elliptic boundary value problems on compact Riemannian manifolds. We establish simultaneous Sobolev approximation results for single- and multichannel CNNs, showing that manifold functions and their derivatives can be approximated with rates governed by the intrinsic dimension and the smoothness gap, rather than by the ambient dimension, thereby mitigating the curse of dimensionality. Building on this approximation theory, we propose a physics-informed CNN (PICNN) framework specially designed for boundary value problems. The main numerical issue is a boundary-norm mismatch: standard PINNs usually impose boundary data through low-order, often L2-type, penalties, whereas elliptic stability requires Sobolev trace control. We address this by introducing a spectral boundary loss based on the boundary Laplace-Beltrami operator, which represents trace errors as weighted frequency energies and relates truncation error to boundary eigenvalue decay. This avoids smooth auxiliary constructions required by exact boundary enforcement and singular double integrals arising in Sobolev-Slobodeckij penalties, while enabling implementations based on Fast Fourier Transforms (FFTs) or precomputed spectral bases on structured boundaries. Numerical experiments demonstrate improved accuracy, convergence, and stability over standard PINNs.

59

约束极端梯度提升用于自适应降阶模型#

Constrained Extreme Gradient Boosting for Adapting Reduced-Order Models
📚 arXiv👤 Melika Baghi, Xiao Liu, Kamran Paynabar📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作核心创新在于将Grassmann流形上的子空间几何嵌入欧氏空间，以约束梯度提升树实现POD基函数的参数化回归，突破了传统插值方法在流形结构保持上的局限；为参数化降阶模型提供了兼具计算效率与几何一
该工作提出约束极端梯度提升（cXGBoost）框架，用于预测系统参数依赖的本征正交分解（POD）基函数。将Grassmann流形上的子空间几何表示映射到欧氏空间，以梯度提升树实现高效回归；训练时施加范数约束保证逆映射有效性并维持预测子空间的几何结构。该方法在包括计算流体动力学和有限元分析等四个数值算例上验证，为参数变化下投影降阶模型的自适应基构造提供新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出约束极端梯度提升（cXGBoost）框架，用于预测系统参数依赖的本征正交分解（POD）基函数。将Grassmann流形上的子空间几何表示映射到欧氏空间，以梯度提升树实现高效回归；训练时施加范数约束保证逆映射有效性并维持预测子空间的几何结构。该方法在包括计算流体动力学和有限元分析等四个数值算例上验证，为参数变化下投影降阶模型的自适应基构造提供新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04130v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: High-fidelity simulations, such as computational fluid dynamics and finite element analysis, are essential for modeling complex engineering systems but are often prohibitively expensive for tasks including parametric studies, optimization, and real-time control. Projection-based reduced-order models (ROMs) alleviate this cost by projecting the governing dynamics onto low-dimensional subspaces. However, their performance can deteriorate under parameter variation, motivating the need for adaptive basis construction. In this work, we propose a constrained ensemble learning framework, termed Constrained Extreme Gradient Boosting (cXGBoost), for predicting Proper Orthogonal Decomposition (POD) bases as functions of system parameters. The approach leverages a geometric representation of subspaces on the Grassmann manifold, which are mapped to a Euclidean space to enable efficient regression using gradient boosting trees. A norm constraint is imposed during training to ensure the validity of the inverse mapping and preserve the geometric structure of the predicted subspaces. The proposed method is evaluated on four numerical examples, including fluid dynamics and wave propagation problems, demonstrating its ability to accurately predict parameter-dependent bases while maintaining robustness across nonlinear regimes. These results highlight the potential of combining geometric learning with constrained ensemble methods for scalable and reliable reduced-order modeling of high-dimensional parametric systems.

60

基于平均曲率的边界检测方法：无监督学习的几何洞察#

A Mean Curvature Approach to Boundary Detection: Geometric Insights for Unsupervised Learning
📚 arXiv👤 Alexandre L. M. Levada📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统密度依赖的边界检测范式，以微分几何中流形曲率为核心指标，将高维数据边界识别转化为可计算的几何问题。其意义在于：首次建立"曲率-边界-异常"的统一理论框架，使无监督学习获得可解释的几何直觉
该工作提出平均曲率边界点（MCBP）框架，从几何机器学习出发，通过显式建模数据流形的本征曲率实现高维数据边界检测。基于局部k近邻 patches 离散逼近形状算子，无需显式流形参数化即可计算逐点平均曲率。核心洞察为高曲率区域自然对应簇间过渡、几何不规则与低密度界面，统一边界、异常与过渡点的几何解释。引入自适应百分位阈值方案实现多尺度边界提取，摆脱对密度参数的依赖。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出平均曲率边界点（MCBP）框架，从几何机器学习出发，通过显式建模数据流形的本征曲率实现高维数据边界检测。基于局部k近邻 patches 离散逼近形状算子，无需显式流形参数化即可计算逐点平均曲率。核心洞察为高曲率区域自然对应簇间过渡、几何不规则与低密度界面，统一边界、异常与过渡点的几何解释。引入自适应百分位阈值方案实现多尺度边界提取，摆脱对密度参数的依赖。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04274v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate boundary detection in high-dimensional data remains a central challenge in unsupervised learning, particularly in the presence of non-linear structures and heterogeneous densities. In this work, we introduce Mean Curvature Boundary Points (MCBP), a novel geometric framework grounded in Geometric Machine Learning that departs from traditional density-based approaches by explicitly modeling the intrinsic curvature of the data manifold. The method relies on a discrete approximation of the shape operator, estimated from local k-nearest neighbor patches, to compute pointwise mean curvature without requiring explicit manifold parametrization. The key insight of MCBP is to use mean curvature as a principled descriptor of boundary structure: high-curvature regions naturally correspond to transitions between clusters, geometric irregularities, and low-density interfaces. This yields a unified geometric interpretation of boundary, outlier, and transition points. We further introduce an adaptive percentile-based thresholding scheme that enables multiscale boundary extraction without relying on ad hoc density parameters. Beyond detection, we propose a curvature-driven data decomposition that separates samples into smooth (low-curvature) and boundary (high-curvature) subsets, effectively acting as a non-linear geometric filtering mechanism. This representation enhances cluster separability and improves the robustness of downstream unsupervised algorithms. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that MCBP consistently improves clustering performance, particularly in complex and high-dimensional scenarios. These results position MCBP as a concrete contribution to Geometric Machine Learning, highlighting the potential of curvature-aware analysis as a unifying paradigm bridging differential geometry and data-driven modeling.

61

超越刚性几何：用于通用微分同胚SPD表示学习的样条-拉回度量#

Beyond Rigid Geometries: The Spline-Pullback Metric for Universal Diffeomorphic SPD Representation Learning
📚 arXiv👤 Tushar Das, Subrata Dutta, Sarmistha Neogy, Koushlendra Kumar Singh📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统SPD矩阵表示对静态度量的依赖，创新性地以B样条参数化微分同胚实现通用几何逼近，通过秩不变约束与全局双射拓扑保证训练稳定性，为黎曼流形上的深度学习提供了兼具理论完备性与计算鲁棒性的度量学
该工作提出样条-拉回度量（SPM），包括谱SPM与Cholesky-SPM两种实例，实现从静态度量选择到通用几何近似的范式转变。通过秩不变、单调约束的B样条参数化全局微分同胚，SPM作为严格递增C¹微分同胚的稠密通用逼近器，理论上涵盖现有拉回度量并支持局部非线性谱建模。拓扑上提供全局双射的拉回几何，避免秩相关退化、空间折叠及谱奇异点梯度崩溃，克服此前参数化方法违反矩阵函数公理的问题。

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出样条-拉回度量（SPM），包括谱SPM与Cholesky-SPM两种实例，实现从静态度量选择到通用几何近似的范式转变。通过秩不变、单调约束的B样条参数化全局微分同胚，SPM作为严格递增C¹微分同胚的稠密通用逼近器，理论上涵盖现有拉回度量并支持局部非线性谱建模。拓扑上提供全局双射的拉回几何，避免秩相关退化、空间折叠及谱奇异点梯度崩溃，克服此前参数化方法违反矩阵函数公理的问题。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04406v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The integration of Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) matrices into deep learning has historically relied on fixed algebraic Riemannian metrics. Analogous to hand-crafted features in classical machine learning, these static formulations impose rigid geometries limiting network expressivity and adaptability. Recent attempts to parameterize these geometries often violate the axioms of primary matrix functions through unconstrained powers or rank-dependent scaling, inviting spatial folding, loss of global surjectivity, and gradient collapse at spectral singularities. In this paper, we introduce the Spline-Pullback Metric (SPM), instantiated as Spectral-SPM and Cholesky-SPM, marking a paradigm shift from static metric selection to universal geometric approximation. By parameterizing the global diffeomorphism via a rank-invariant, monotonically constrained B-spline, SPM acts as a dense universal approximator for strictly increasing C¹ diffeomorphisms and theoretically subsumes existing pullback metrics while enabling localized non-linear spectral modelling. Topologically, SPM provides a globally bijective pullback geometry precluding rank-swapping discontinuities and gradient instabilities. Empirically, SPM achieves a state-of-the-art performance across 3 datasets utilizing Linear Probes, SPDNets, and deep Riemannian ResNets.

62

自适应谱PINNs求解刚性非线性ODE的梯度缩放效应#

Gradient Scaling Effects in Adaptive Spectral PINNs for Stiff Nonlinear ODEs
📚 arXiv👤 Isabela M. Yepes, Pavlos Protopapas📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次系统揭示了IC门控函数类型与自适应谱PINNs梯度缩放机制的深度耦合，发现刚度诱导的门控优劣反转现象，为刚性ODE求解中网络架构的自适应选择提供了理论依据，拓展了PINNs在强非线性动力学问
该工作研究自适应谱物理信息神经网络（PINNs）中初始条件（IC）嵌入的优化影响，揭示IC门控函数选择诱导的显式含时梯度缩放与谱表示的交互作用。以非线性刚性弹簧-摆ODE为基准，比较指数型与线性IC门控结合固定/自适应Fourier谱主干的效果。发现刚度依赖的相对主导性变化：中等刚度（k=20）时指数门控常误差更低但随机种子间行为异质；更高刚度（k=60）时线性门控更优，更大k值出现额外反转。趋势在相对L²误差与最大逐点误差上均成立。
阅读原文 ↗

中文摘要

该工作研究自适应谱物理信息神经网络（PINNs）中初始条件（IC）嵌入的优化影响，揭示IC门控函数选择诱导的显式含时梯度缩放与谱表示的交互作用。以非线性刚性弹簧-摆ODE为基准，比较指数型与线性IC门控结合固定/自适应Fourier谱主干的效果。发现刚度依赖的相对主导性变化：中等刚度（k=20）时指数门控常误差更低但随机种子间行为异质；更高刚度（k=60）时线性门控更优，更大k值出现额外反转。趋势在相对L²误差与最大逐点误差上均成立。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04502v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) often struggle to train reliably on stiff and oscillatory dynamical systems due to poor optimization conditioning. While prior work has emphasized representational remedies such as spectral parameterizations, the optimization implications of initial-condition (IC) embeddings in adaptive spectral PINNs have not been well characterized. In this work, we show that the choice of IC gating function induces explicit time-dependent gradient scaling, which interacts with spectral representations during training. Using a nonlinear stiff spring-pendulum ODE as a controlled benchmark, we compare exponential and linear IC gates in combination with fixed and adaptive Fourier spectral trunks. We observe stiffness-dependent changes in relative dominance for adaptive PINNs: at moderate stiffness (k=20), exponential gating often yields lower error but exhibits heterogeneous behavior across random seeds, whereas at higher stiffness (k=60), linear gating becomes preferable, with additional reversals observed at larger k. These trends hold for both relative L² error and maximum pointwise error and are confirmed by paired Wilcoxon signed-rank tests with Holm correction. Overall, our results demonstrate that IC embeddings are not a neutral design choice in PINNs: the induced gradient scaling materially shapes optimization conditioning in stiff regimes, with distinct sensitivity patterns in baseline and adaptive spectral models.

63

PINNs中可微化学求解器用于参数化刚性反应系统#

Differentiable Chemistry in PINNs for Solving Parameterized and Stiff Reaction Systems
📚 arXiv👤 Miloš Babić, Franz M. Rohrhofer, Stefan Posch📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作通过将可微化学求解器嵌入改进的物理信息神经网络，并设计参数化解架构与刚性自适应残差加权策略，突破了PINNs处理刚性反应系统的瓶颈。以氢燃烧为验证案例，实现了正逆问题的高效求解，为复杂化学动力学
该工作将可微化学求解器集成至改进的物理信息神经网络，求解固有刚性的参数化反应系统。框架包含可微化学求解器、参数化解网络架构及针对刚性反应的残差加权等关键组件。在氢燃烧相关微分方程组上评估，涵盖初/边值问题、逆参数识别及参数化偏微分方程。结果表明该方法扩展了PINNs至刚性化学系统的能力，为科学计算中物理、优化与仿真的可训练融合提供新途径。

该工作将可微化学求解器集成至改进的物理信息神经网络，求解固有刚性的参数化反应系统。框架包含可微化学求解器、参数化解网络架构及针对刚性反应的残差加权等关键组件。在氢燃烧相关微分方程组上评估，涵盖初/边值问题、逆参数识别及参数化偏微分方程。结果表明该方法扩展了PINNs至刚性化学系统的能力，为科学计算中物理、优化与仿真的可训练融合提供新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04708v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: From neural ODEs to continuous-time machine learning, differentiable solvers allow physics, optimization, and simulation to become trainable components within deep learning systems. This has opened the path to a new generation of deep learning frameworks for scientific computing, with many promising applications still emerging. In this paper, we integrate a differentiable chemistry solver into a modified physics-informed neural network to solve parameterized reaction systems that are inherently stiff. The proposed framework introduces several key components required to overcome limitations of standard physics-informed neural networks. These include a differentiable chemistry solver, a network architecture for parameterized solutions, and residual weighting tailored to stiff reactions. We evaluate the framework on a set of differential equations related to hydrogen combustion, which include initial/boundary value problems, inverse parameter identification, and a parameterized partial differential equation. Our results highlight the ability of the proposed approach to extend physics-informed neural networks to stiff chemical systems that were previously inaccessible.

64

静电纺丝中特征重要性的跨模型一致性：区分稳健特征与模型依赖特征#

Cross-Model Consistency of Feature Importance in Electrospinning: Separating Robust from Model-Dependent Features
📚 arXiv👤 Mehrab Mahdian, Ferenc Ender, Tamas Pardy📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本研究突破单一模型评估局限，首次系统量化静电纺丝特征重要性在21种异构模型间的一致性差异，以SHAP秩统计识别稳健特征与模型依赖特征，为高分子纳米纤维工艺优化建立了跨模型验证的可解释方法论框架，显著提
该工作系统评估了静电纺丝过程中机器学习特征重要性在多种模型族间的一致性。基于96组聚乙烯醇（PVA）静电纺丝实验数据，对涵盖线性、树、核、神经网络和基于实例方法的21种模型进行训练比较，采用SHAP值构建统一的可解释框架，并通过秩统计量化模型间一致性与参数排序稳健性。研究揭示了单一模型推断特征重要性的潜在局限性，为工艺参数优化提供了更可靠的跨模型验证策略。

中文摘要

该工作系统评估了静电纺丝过程中机器学习特征重要性在多种模型族间的一致性。基于96组聚乙烯醇（PVA）静电纺丝实验数据，对涵盖线性、树、核、神经网络和基于实例方法的21种模型进行训练比较，采用SHAP值构建统一的可解释框架，并通过秩统计量化模型间一致性与参数排序稳健性。研究揭示了单一模型推断特征重要性的潜在局限性，为工艺参数优化提供了更可靠的跨模型验证策略。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04905v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Electrospinning is a highly sensitive fabrication process in which small variations in operating parameters can significantly influence fiber morphology and material performance. Machine learning (ML) methods are increasingly employed to model these process-structure relationships and to identify the relative importance of processing variables. However, most existing studies rely on a single ML model, implicitly assuming that the resulting feature importance is robust and reproducible. In this study, the consistency of feature importance across multiple ML model families was systematically evaluated using a curated dataset of 96 polyvinyl alcohol (PVA) electrospinning experiments. Twenty-one ML models representing linear, tree-based, kernel-based, neural network, and instance-based approaches were trained and compared. To provide a unified interpretability framework, SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) values were used to calculate feature importance consistently across all models. A rank-based statistical analysis was then performed to quantify inter-model agreement and assess the robustness of parameter rankings. The results demonstrate that predictive performance and interpretive reliability are fundamentally distinct properties. Although several models achieved comparable predictive accuracy, substantial differences were observed in their feature importance rankings. Solution concentration emerged as the most robust and consistently influential parameter (variability = 0), whereas flow rate and applied voltage exhibited high ranking variability (variability > 0.9), indicating strong model dependence. These findings suggest that feature importance derived from a single ML model may be unreliable, particularly for small experimental datasets, and highlight the importance of cross-model validation for achieving trustworthy interpretation in ML-assisted electrospinning research.

65

训练时批归一化重塑分段仿射网络的局部分区几何#

Training-Time Batch Normalization Reshapes Local Partition Geometry in Piecewise-Affine Networks
📚 arXiv👤 Xuan Qi, Yi Wei, Fanqi Yu, Furao shen, Vittorio Murino, Cigdem Beyan📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次从函数几何视角严格证明批归一化通过批次质心参考超平面重构分段仿射网络的局部分区，揭示其断点平移机制与偏置解耦特性，并给出细化期望的显式条件，为理解BN的正则化本质提供了可解析的理论框架。
该工作从函数几何层面研究训练时批归一化（BN）对连续分段仿射（CPA）网络的影响。证明BN为每个神经元定义通过批次质心的参考超平面，且断点切换超平面为平行平移，其偏移量以批次标准化坐标表达并与原始偏置无关。在显式充分条件下，BN增加ReLU及更一般分段仿射网络的期望局部分区细化，且该机制在父仿射区域内通过深度局部传递。结果为BN的函数级几何效应提供了严格理论刻画。

中文摘要

该工作从函数几何层面研究训练时批归一化（BN）对连续分段仿射（CPA）网络的影响。证明BN为每个神经元定义通过批次质心的参考超平面，且断点切换超平面为平行平移，其偏移量以批次标准化坐标表达并与原始偏置无关。在显式充分条件下，BN增加ReLU及更一般分段仿射网络的期望局部分区细化，且该机制在父仿射区域内通过深度局部传递。结果为BN的函数级几何效应提供了严格理论刻画。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04946v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Batch normalization (BN) is central to modern deep networks, but its effect on the realized function during training remains less understood than its optimization benefits. We study training-time BN in continuous piecewise-affine (CPA) networks through the geometry of switching hyperplanes and the induced affine-region partition. Conditioned on a mini-batch, we show that BN defines for each neuron a reference hyperplane through the batch centroid, and that breakpoint-switching hyperplanes are parallel translates whose offsets are expressed in batch-standardized coordinates and are independent of the raw bias. This yields an exact criterion for when a switching hyperplane intersects a local ellᵢₙfty window and motivates a local region-density functional based on exact affine-region counts. Under explicit sufficient conditions, we show that BN increases expected local partition refinement in ReLU and more general piecewise-affine networks, and that this mechanism transfers locally through depth inside parent affine regions where the upstream representation map is an affine embedding. These results provide a function-level geometric account of training-time BN as a batch-conditional recentering mechanism near the data.

66

基于全卷积网络结合白光干涉测量的全芯片化学机械抛光建模#

Full-chip CMP modelling based on Fully Convolutional Network leveraging White Light Interferometry
📚 arXiv👤 Jules Exbrayat, Renan Bouis, Elie Sezestre, Viorel Balan, Arnaud Cornelis, Damien Hebras, Catherine Euvrard📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将白光干涉与原子力显微镜的互补测量优势融入深度学习框架，构建双路径全卷积网络替代传统DSH建模，突破了全芯片CMP形貌预测在精度与效率间的权衡瓶颈，为先进制程节点下集成电路可制造性设计提
该工作提出结合白光干涉测量（WLI）与原子力显微镜（AFM）两种表面分析技术，训练深度学习模型以预测全芯片化学机械抛光（CMP）后的纳米级形貌。采用两步卷积神经网络管道分别针对两种技术训练，旨在克服传统密度台阶高度（DSH）建模校准耗时、硬件资源需求大的问题，实现纳米精度的高效全芯片CMP预测，加速集成电路设计阶段的可制造性验证。
