页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出结合白光干涉测量（WLI）与原子力显微镜（AFM）两种表面分析技术，训练深度学习模型以预测全芯片化学机械抛光（CMP）后的纳米级形貌。采用两步卷积神经网络管道分别针对两种技术训练，旨在克服传统密度台阶高度（DSH）建模校准耗时、硬件资源需求大的问题，实现纳米精度的高效全芯片CMP预测，加速集成电路设计阶段的可制造性验证。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.05062v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As time-to-market is crucial in the Integrated Circuit (IC) industry, speeding up layout manufacturability verifi-cation is essential. Chemical-Mechanical Polishing (CMP) plays a vital role in IC fabrication but is significantly influenced by Layout-Dependent Effects (LDE). An accurate and efficient CMP model enables design teams to correct surface unevenness before fabrication, reducing costs and accelerating the design phase. However, existing models often rely on Density Step Height (DSH) modeling, which is time-consuming for calibration and requires substantial hardware resources for fine-grained predictions. In this paper, we propose combining the advantages of two surface analysis techniques, White Light Interfer-ometry (WLI) and Atomic Force Microscopy (AFM), to train a deep learning model. This model aims to predict full-chip post-CMP nanotopography with nanometer-scale accuracy. Our deep learning model is based on a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and follows a two-step pipeline. The model is trained on each technique separately, resulting in a detailed full-chip CMP model.

67

玻尔兹曼机与费曼路径积分的类比#

Analogy between Boltzmann machines and Feynman path integrals
📚 arXiv👤 Srinivasan S. Iyengar, Sabre Kais📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文揭示了玻尔兹曼机隐藏层与费曼路径积分路径元的数学同构，将机器学习优化重构为量子路径搜索问题。核心创新在于建立双向映射框架：既为神经网络赋予量子力学可解释性，又为路径积分提供量子电路实现方案。该工作
该工作详细阐释了机器学习中的玻尔兹曼机与量子统计力学中费曼路径积分形式体系之间的深层联系。发现玻尔兹曼机的隐藏层可解释为费曼路径积分中路径元的离散版本，机器学习的目标可理解为寻找适当的路径组合及其累积权重以正确映射输入输出关系。基于这一等价性，为玻尔兹曼机和费曼路径积分描述提供了通用量子电路模型，并建立了与逆量子散射问题的联系，为定义可解释的隐藏层提供了稳健途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作详细阐释了机器学习中的玻尔兹曼机与量子统计力学中费曼路径积分形式体系之间的深层联系。发现玻尔兹曼机的隐藏层可解释为费曼路径积分中路径元的离散版本，机器学习的目标可理解为寻找适当的路径组合及其累积权重以正确映射输入输出关系。基于这一等价性，为玻尔兹曼机和费曼路径积分描述提供了通用量子电路模型，并建立了与逆量子散射问题的联系，为定义可解释的隐藏层提供了稳健途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2301.06217v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We provide a detailed exposition of the connections between Boltzmann machines commonly utilized in machine learning problems and the ideas already well known in quantum statistical mechanics through Feynman's description of the same. We find that this equivalence allows the interpretation that the hidden layers in Boltzmann machines and other neural network formalisms are in fact discrete versions of path elements that are present within the Feynman path-integral formalism. Since Feynman paths are the natural and elegant depiction of interference phenomena germane to quantum mechanics, it appears that in machine learning, the goal is to find an appropriate combination of ``paths'', along with accumulated path-weights, through a network that cumulatively capture the correct x i̊ghtarrow y map for a given mathematical problem. As a direct consequence of this analysis, we are able to provide general quantum circuit models that are applicable to both Boltzmann machines and to Feynman path integral descriptions. Connections are also made to inverse quantum scattering problems which allow a robust way to define ``interpretable'' hidden layers.

68

面向高维分子势能面的大语言模型型架构#

A large language model-type architecture for high-dimensional molecular potential energy surfaces
📚 arXiv👤 Xiao Zhu, Srinivasan S. Iyengar📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将大语言模型的架构理念引入计算化学，突破传统图神经网络仅处理节点和边的局限，构建包含面等更高阶结构的分子图表示，实现51核维度化学系统的精确势能面计算。其核心贡献在于验证了低维训练模型向
该工作设计了一种类比于大语言模型的算法，用于计算分子体系和材料的高维势能面。将分子系统表示为包含节点、边、面等的图结构，利用图论获得的子系统构建相互作用，通过一族神经网络处理51核维度的化学系统。进而探索该低维图神经网络族向186维势能面的迁移能力，发现算法在更大维度问题上仍能提供准确预测，为计算化学中反应速率等基本预测挑战提供了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作设计了一种类比于大语言模型的算法，用于计算分子体系和材料的高维势能面。将分子系统表示为包含节点、边、面等的图结构，利用图论获得的子系统构建相互作用，通过一族神经网络处理51核维度的化学系统。进而探索该低维图神经网络族向186维势能面的迁移能力，发现算法在更大维度问题上仍能提供准确预测，为计算化学中反应速率等基本预测挑战提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2412.03831v2 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Computing high-dimensional potential energy surfaces for molecular systems and materials is considered to be a great challenge in computational chemistry with potential impact in a range of areas including the fundamental prediction of reaction rates. In this paper, we design and discuss an algorithm that has similarities to large language models in generative AI and natural language processing. Specifically, we represent a molecular system as a graph which contains a set of nodes, edges, faces, etc. Interactions between these sets, which represent molecular subsystems in our case, are used to construct the potential energy surface for a reasonably sized chemical system with 51 nuclear dimensions. For this purpose, a family of neural networks that pertain to the graph-theoretically obtained subsystems get the job done for this 51 nuclear dimensional system. We then ask if this same family of lower-dimensional graph-based neural networks can be transformed to provide accurate predictions for a 186-dimensional potential energy surface. We find that our algorithm does provide accurate results for this larger-dimensional problem with sub-kcal/mol accuracy for the higher-dimensional potential energy surface problem. Indeed, as a result of these developments, here we produce the first efforts towards a full-dimensional potential energy surface for the protonated 21-water cluster (186 nuclear dimensions) at CCSD level accuracy.

69

基于哈密顿动力学的深度伪造检测#

Detecting Deepfakes via Hamiltonian Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Harry Cheng, Ming-Hui Liu, Tianyi Wang, Weili Guan, Liqiang Nie, Mohan Kankanhalli📅 2026-05-07🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统"找伪影"的静态检测范式，创新性地引入物理动力学视角：将真实图像视为耗散系统的稳定平衡态，伪造图像则为哈密顿系统中的高能非稳态。通过HAAD框架量化能量响应差异，实现无需针对新合成技术反
该工作提出从静态模式识别转向动态稳定性分析的深度伪造检测新视角。基于自然图像作为耗散物理过程产物趋于稳定低能平衡态、而生成模型未显式强制几何平滑性约束导致伪造图像更可能处于不稳定高能态的物理先验，引入哈密顿作用异常检测（HAAD）。将图像潜流形建模为势能面，利用哈密顿启发动力学分析真实与伪造图像的能量响应差异，旨在打破检测器需周期性重新校准以捕捉新合成伪影的循环。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出从静态模式识别转向动态稳定性分析的深度伪造检测新视角。基于自然图像作为耗散物理过程产物趋于稳定低能平衡态、而生成模型未显式强制几何平滑性约束导致伪造图像更可能处于不稳定高能态的物理先验，引入哈密顿作用异常检测（HAAD）。将图像潜流形建模为势能面，利用哈密顿启发动力学分析真实与伪造图像的能量响应差异，旨在打破检测器需周期性重新校准以捕捉新合成伪影的循环。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.04405v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Driven by the rapid development of generative AI models, deepfake detectors are compelled to undergo periodic recalibration to capture newly developed synthetic artifacts. To break this cycle, we propose a new perspective on deepfake detection: moving from static pattern recognition to dynamical stability analysis. Specifically, our approach is motivated by physics-inspired priors: we hypothesize that natural images, as products of dissipative physical processes, tend to settle near stable, low-energy equilibria. In contrast, generative models optimize for statistical similarity to real images but do not explicitly enforce structural constraints such as geometric smoothness, leaving deepfakes more likely to occupy unstable, high-energy states. To operationalize this, we introduce Hamiltonian Action Anomaly Detection (HAAD), comprising three contributions: i) We model the image latent manifold as a potential energy surface. Under this hypothesis, real images are expected to produce basin-like low-energy responses, whereas fake images are more likely to induce high-potential, high-gradient responses. ii) We employ Hamiltonian-inspired dynamics as a stability probe. By releasing latent states from rest, samples near stable regions remain bounded, while high-gradient samples produce larger trajectory responses. iii) We quantify these dynamic behaviors through two trajectory statistics, ie, Hamiltonian action and energy dissipation. Extensive experiments show that HAAD outperforms evaluated state-of-the-art baselines on challenging cross-dataset transfer benchmarks, supporting a physics-inspired stability prior for digital forensics.

70

从增强采样到蛋白质动力学的人类可读表征#

From Enhanced Sampling to Human-Readable Representations of Protein Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Souvik Mondal, Michael A. Sauer, Matthias Heyden📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该框架通过频率选择非谐模式分析驱动增强采样，结合加权动态交叉相关矩阵后处理，将复杂轨迹转化为可解释的域间距离描述符，突破了传统机器学习集体变量物理意义不明的瓶颈，为蛋白质功能机制阐释提供了直观分析工具
该工作提出将增强采样轨迹自动转化为人类可读蛋白质动力学表征的框架。结合基于频率选择非谐模式分析的集体变量增强采样，以及对偏置轨迹的后处理加权动态交叉相关矩阵分析，识别表现出相关与反相关运动的残基对和结构域，得到简洁的域间距离描述符，解决了机器学习或集体振动模式导出的集体变量缺乏物理可解释性的问题。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出将增强采样轨迹自动转化为人类可读蛋白质动力学表征的框架。结合基于频率选择非谐模式分析的集体变量增强采样，以及对偏置轨迹的后处理加权动态交叉相关矩阵分析，识别表现出相关与反相关运动的残基对和结构域，得到简洁的域间距离描述符，解决了机器学习或集体振动模式导出的集体变量缺乏物理可解释性的问题。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03394v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding protein conformational dynamics is essential for elucidating biological function but remains challenging due to the wide range of timescales and the complexity of collective motions. Enhanced sampling methods overcome timescale limitations of conventional molecular dynamics, yet their effectiveness depends on the choice of collective variables (CVs), which are often difficult to define and may lack physical interpretability. In particular, collective variables derived from machine learning or collective vibrational modes can efficiently capture slow dynamics but are not easily mapped onto intuitive structural descriptors. Here, we present a fully automated framework that transforms enhanced sampling trajectories into human-readable representations of protein dynamics. Our approach combines enhanced sampling along CVs derived from frequency-selective anharmonic mode analysis with a post hoc analysis of biased trajectories using weighted dynamic cross-correlation matrices. From these, we identify residue pairs and domains exhibiting correlated and anti-correlated motions, yielding simple domain-domain distances that serve as physically interpretable CVs. We apply this method to five proteins, including KRAS and HIV-1 protease, and show that it consistently identifies biologically relevant domains and motions without prior system-specific knowledge. Projection onto these distances produces free energy surfaces that reproduce known conformational states with low statistical uncertainty while maximizing independent dynamical information. This workflow enables systematic recasting of complex CVs into simple geometric descriptors without loss of essential dynamics. Its generality and automation make it broadly applicable for interpreting enhanced sampling simulations and generating interpretable conformational ensembles for integration with emerging machine learning approaches.

71

原子尺度能量耗散解释硅玻璃断裂能随裂纹速度的变化#

Energy dissipation at the atomic scale explains how fracture energy depends on crack velocity in silica glass
📚 arXiv👤 Marthe Grønlie Guren, Sigbjørn Løland Bore, François Renard, Henrik Andersen Sveinsson📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次在原子尺度揭示硅玻璃动态断裂能非恒定的物理机制：第一性原理机器学习势模拟发现，裂纹速度提升使断裂能在分支前骤增33%，源于本征表面能密度上升与纳米级表面粗化的协同贡献，为理解脆性材料动态失效
该工作利用基于第一性原理机器学习原子间势的分子动力学模拟，研究硅玻璃的动态断裂。发现在分支阈值以下，结构断裂能已上升高达33%，表明断裂能非常量材料属性。断裂能上升大致均分于本征表面能密度增加和纳米尺度粗化导致的实际断裂表面积增加。动态断裂不仅通过创造更多表观表面，还通过创造纳米尺度 fundamentally 不同的表面来增加断裂能。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用基于第一性原理机器学习原子间势的分子动力学模拟，研究硅玻璃的动态断裂。发现在分支阈值以下，结构断裂能已上升高达33%，表明断裂能非常量材料属性。断裂能上升大致均分于本征表面能密度增加和纳米尺度粗化导致的实际断裂表面积增加。动态断裂不仅通过创造更多表观表面，还通过创造纳米尺度 fundamentally 不同的表面来增加断裂能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03457v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The fracture energy of brittle materials rises with crack velocity, and this effect is typically attributed to surface roughening from path instabilities. Here we show, using molecular dynamics simulations of silica glass with a first-principles machine learned interatomic potential, that the structural fracture energy rises by up to 33 % already below the branching threshold, showing that fracture energy is not a constant material property. This rise in fracture energy is roughly equally partitioned between an increase in the intrinsic surface energy density and nanoscale roughening that increases the real fracture surface area. Results demonstrate that dynamic fracture in silica glass increases the fracture energy not merely by creating more apparent surface, but also by creating a fundamentally different surface at the nanoscale.

72

阿贝尔格点规范理论Wilson圈表示中的图神经网络#

Graph Neural Networks in the Wilson Loop Representation of Abelian Lattice Gauge Theories
📚 arXiv👤 Ali Rayat, Gia-Wei Chern📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将规范对称性嵌入图神经网络架构，以Wilson圈为输入并在消息传递中保持规范不变性，解决了冗余自由度问题。该方法为格点规范理论提供了高效可扩展的机器学习框架，并成功应用于U(1)量子链模
该研究引入了阿贝尔格点规范模型的规范不变图神经网络架构，通过Wilson圈等局域规范不变量作为输入，并在消息传递过程中显式保持对称性，消除冗余规范自由度同时保留表达能力。在Z₂和U(1)格点规范模型上的基准测试表明，该方法能准确预测全局可观测量和空间分辨量，尽管存在规范-物质耦合诱导的非局域关联。研究进一步证明，学习所得模型可作为U(1)量子链模型半经典动力学的高效替代模拟器，无需重复费米子对角化即可实现稳定可扩展的时间演化。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究引入了阿贝尔格点规范模型的规范不变图神经网络架构，通过Wilson圈等局域规范不变量作为输入，并在消息传递过程中显式保持对称性，消除冗余规范自由度同时保留表达能力。在Z₂和U(1)格点规范模型上的基准测试表明，该方法能准确预测全局可观测量和空间分辨量，尽管存在规范-物质耦合诱导的非局域关联。研究进一步证明，学习所得模型可作为U(1)量子链模型半经典动力学的高效替代模拟器，无需重复费米子对角化即可实现稳定可扩展的时间演化。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03901v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Local gauge structures play a central role in a wide range of condensed matter systems and synthetic quantum platforms, where they emerge as effective descriptions of strongly correlated phases and engineered dynamics. We introduce a gauge-invariant graph neural network (GNN) architecture for Abelian lattice gauge models, in which symmetry is enforced explicitly through local gauge-invariant inputs, such as Wilson loops, and preserved throughout message passing, eliminating redundant gauge degrees of freedom while retaining expressive power. We benchmark the approach on both Z₂ and U(1) lattice gauge models, achieving accurate predictions of global observables and spatially resolved quantities despite the nonlocal correlations induced by gauge-matter coupling. We further demonstrate that the learned model serves as an efficient surrogate for semiclassical dynamics in U(1) quantum link models, enabling stable and scalable time evolution without repeated fermionic diagonalization, while faithfully reproducing both local dynamics and statistical correlations. These results establish gauge-invariant message passing as a compact and physically grounded framework for learning and simulating Abelian lattice gauge systems.

73

多体本征态中的信息：一个可学习性问题#

Information in Many-body Eigenstates: A Question of Learnability
📚 arXiv👤 Maksymilian Kliczkowski, Jarosław Pawłowski, Masudul Haque📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统纠缠熵刻画本征态的局限，首创"可学习性"指标——以神经网络重建哈密顿量的精度量化态的信息含量。核心发现谱边缘态因结构有序而具有高可学习性，远离边缘的混沌态则趋近随机不可学，为理解量子多体
该研究引入"可学习性"作为量化本征态信息含量的新指标：对于特定学习架构，从单个本征态重建哈密顿量的精确程度如何。利用编码器-解码器神经网络和物理启发的损失函数，研究发现谱边缘本征态（低纠缠、高度结构化）与远离谱边缘的本征态（高纠缠、近随机）之间的区别体现为可学习性的差异：边缘本征态预测精度更高，且学习哈密顿量所需的本征态数量更少。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究引入"可学习性"作为量化本征态信息含量的新指标：对于特定学习架构，从单个本征态重建哈密顿量的精确程度如何。利用编码器-解码器神经网络和物理启发的损失函数，研究发现谱边缘本征态（低纠缠、高度结构化）与远离谱边缘的本征态（高纠缠、近随机）之间的区别体现为可学习性的差异：边缘本征态预测精度更高，且学习哈密顿量所需的本征态数量更少。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03043v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: To what extent do individual eigenstates encode information of their underlying Hamiltonian, and how does this depend on their spectral position? For many-body quantum systems, this issue is widely understood in terms of the differing nature of the eigenstates near the spectral edges (low-entanglement, highly-structured eigenstates) and those far from the spectral edges (high-entanglement, near-random eigenstates). Utilizing the availability of machine learning tools, we introduce a new way to quantify the information contained in eigenstates: for a particular learning architecture, how precisely can the Hamiltonian be reconstructed from a single eigenstate? We refer to this property as learnability; it serves as a new, alternative measure of the information content of eigenstates, made possible by machine learning. Using an encoder-decoder neural network and a physics-inspired loss function, we demonstrate how the distinction between two types of eigenstates is manifested as a difference in learnability. For spectral-edge eigenstates, the prediction accuracy is much better, and fewer eigenstates are required to learn the Hamiltonian, compared to mid-spectrum eigenstates.

74

基于电调谐AlGaN/GaN等离子体晶体分析仪的神经网络太赫兹透射谱重建#

Neural-network reconstruction of THz transmission spectra using electrically tunable AlGaN/GaN plasmonic-crystal analyzer
📚 arXiv👤 A. Witkowska, M. Dub, P. Sai, P. Tiwari, M. Sakowicz, J. A. Majewski, W. Knap📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将电调谐AlGaN/GaN等离子体晶体分析仪与神经网络反演相结合，突破了传统太赫兹光谱对干涉仪的依赖。核心在于利用栅压调控等离子体共振实现光谱编码，再通过深度学习解码重建，显著降低伪峰与
该研究展示了利用电调谐栅控AlGaN/GaN等离子体晶体分析仪进行机器学习辅助的太赫兹透射谱重建。分析仪将透射谱编码为电压依赖强度，再由神经网络算法反演。在合成数据集上训练的前馈神经网络在标准FTIR模式和直接（固定镜）采集模式下对四个实验样品进行了验证，重建均方误差分别为0.015和0.038，各正确识别了七个真实共振中的六个。与一阶差分Tikhonov正则化基线相比，FTIR模式和直接模式的平均重建误差分别降低3.6倍和1.55倍…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究展示了利用电调谐栅控AlGaN/GaN等离子体晶体分析仪进行机器学习辅助的太赫兹透射谱重建。分析仪将透射谱编码为电压依赖强度，再由神经网络算法反演。在合成数据集上训练的前馈神经网络在标准FTIR模式和直接（固定镜）采集模式下对四个实验样品进行了验证，重建均方误差分别为0.015和0.038，各正确识别了七个真实共振中的六个。与一阶差分Tikhonov正则化基线相比，FTIR模式和直接模式的平均重建误差分别降低3.6倍和1.55倍，伪峰更少且峰位误差更低。电压可调等离子体滤波结合神经网络反演建立了无需干涉仪的太赫兹光谱重建架构。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03778v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We demonstrate machine learning (ML) based reconstruction of terahertz transmission spectra using an electrically tunable grating-gate AlGaN/GaN plasmonic-crystal analyzer. The analyzer encodes the transmission spectrum into a voltage-dependent intensity, which is then inverted by an ML algorithm. A feedforward neural network trained on a synthetic dataset is validated experimentally on four samples in standard Fourier Transform Infrared (FTIR) mode and in direct (fixed-mirror) acquisition mode. The network achieves a mean square error (MSE) of the reconstruction of 0.015 in FTIR mode and 0.038 in direct mode, correctly identifying six out of seven ground-truth resonances in each mode. Against a first-difference Tikhonov regularization baseline, the mean reconstruction error is reduced 3.6 times in FTIR mode and 1.55 times in direct mode, with fewer spurious peaks and lower peak-position errors. Voltage-tunable plasmonic filtering combined with neural-network inversion establishes an interferometer-free architecture for THz spectral reconstruction.

75

iGENE：基于TensorFlow的可微分通量管回旋动理学代码#

iGENE: A Differentiable Flux-Tube Gyrokinetic Code in TensorFlow
📚 arXiv👤 Victor Artigues, Gabriele Merlo, Frank Jenko📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将机器学习框架TensorFlow引入回旋动理学模拟，实现了端到端可微分，突破传统代码仅能数值求值的局限。核心创新在于利用自动微分获取梯度信息，虽受湍流随机性影响，仍成功应用于等离子体剖面预测等
该工作提出iGENE，一种基于TensorFlow的全可微分电磁局部非线性回旋动理学模型的实现，通过自动微分计算任意模拟输出对任意输入的梯度。研究表明，尽管湍流的随机性阻碍了非线性量梯度的精确求值，这些梯度仍可成功用于外环任务如剖面预测。该工作为将回旋动理学集成到自动化参数优化、不确定性量化、敏感性分析及AI工作流中提供了基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出iGENE，一种基于TensorFlow的全可微分电磁局部非线性回旋动理学模型的实现，通过自动微分计算任意模拟输出对任意输入的梯度。研究表明，尽管湍流的随机性阻碍了非线性量梯度的精确求值，这些梯度仍可成功用于外环任务如剖面预测。该工作为将回旋动理学集成到自动化参数优化、不确定性量化、敏感性分析及AI工作流中提供了基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03086v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present iGENE, a fully-differentiable TensorFlow implementation of the electromagnetic local nonlinear gyrokinetic model, which allows us to compute gradients of any simulation output with respect to any input via automatic differentiation. We show that even if the stochastic nature of turbulence prevents the exact evaluation of gradients of nonlinear quantities of interest, they can still be successfully used to perform outer-loop tasks, such as profile predictions. This work enables the integration of gyrokinetics into automated parameter optimization, uncertainty quantification, sensitivity analysis, and AI workflows.

76

基于WGAN的主动双频可开关频率选择表面逆设计#

WGAN based Inverse Design of Active Dual Band FSS with Switchable Transmission
📚 arXiv👤 Rui Xi, Xinke Kuang, Huanran Qiu, Shiyun Ma, Xiaokui Kang, Yuanyuan Wang, Ying Li, Long Li📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作核心创新在于将晶体生长式拓扑生成与简化U-Net WGAN相结合，实现电磁响应到FSS结构的高效逆设计，突破了传统方法依赖经验迭代、耗时费力的瓶颈。其意义在于为主动可重构电磁器件的智能化设计提供
该工作提出一种可开关双频透射型频率选择表面（FSS）的新设计方法，该FSS在高频保持通带特性，在低频通过改变PIN二极管状态实现透射与反射的切换。研究采用晶体生长式拓扑生成策略，并建立简化的U-Net Wasserstein GAN（WGAN）神经网络模型，实现从电磁响应到结构拓扑参数的逆映射。生成的结构拓扑经全波仿真和实验测量验证，该方法提升了设计灵活性并克服了传统FSS设计耗时的缺点。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出一种可开关双频透射型频率选择表面（FSS）的新设计方法，该FSS在高频保持通带特性，在低频通过改变PIN二极管状态实现透射与反射的切换。研究采用晶体生长式拓扑生成策略，并建立简化的U-Net Wasserstein GAN（WGAN）神经网络模型，实现从电磁响应到结构拓扑参数的逆映射。生成的结构拓扑经全波仿真和实验测量验证，该方法提升了设计灵活性并克服了传统FSS设计耗时的缺点。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03335v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This letter presents a novel design method for switchable dual band transmissive frequency selective surface (FSS). The proposed FSS possesses characteristics of maintaining passband characteristics at high frequencies, while switching from transmission to reflection at low frequencies with pin diodes states altering. Specifically, we propose a crystal growth-based topology generation strategy, and utilize a simplified U-Net Wasserstein GAN (WGAN) neural network model to establish an inverse mapping model from electromagnetic response to structure topology parameters. The trained WGAN achieves training and validation accuracies of 95.59% and 90.84%, while the simplified U-Net attains training and validation accuracies of 98.5% and 94.1%. Using the trained WGAN. The generated structural topologies were validated through full-wave simulations and experimental measurements. The proposed method enhances the design flexibility and overcomes the time- consuming drawbacks of conventional FSS design.

77

基于过渡路径采样主动学习的机器学习势函数发现反应机理#

Discovering Reaction Mechanisms with Transition Path Sampling-Based Active Learning of Machine-Learned Potentials
📚 arXiv👤 Ashique Lal, Rik S. Breebaart, Peter G. Bolhuis, Evert Jan Meijer📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将过渡路径采样与主动学习相结合，以不确定性驱动的方式定向优化势垒区域机器学习势，突破了传统方法依赖先验反应知识的局限，为复杂电化学界面反应机理的准确模拟提供了自动化、高精度的计算框架。
该工作提出一种主动学习框架，以过渡路径采样（TPS）作为针对性数据生成引擎，构建在势垒区域准确的机器学习原子间势（MLP）。TPS生成无偏反应轨迹系综，基于委员会的不确定性估计识别需选择性DFT标记和再训练的配置。迭代循环可在无需先验机制知识的情况下系统精化动力学相关区域的势能面。应用于显式水环境中铜表面电化学CO₂还原为CO反应，该方法消除了早期模型中的非物理赝像，实现了近DFT能量和力精度，并揭示了多种动力学可及的质子化机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出一种主动学习框架，以过渡路径采样（TPS）作为针对性数据生成引擎，构建在势垒区域准确的机器学习原子间势（MLP）。TPS生成无偏反应轨迹系综，基于委员会的不确定性估计识别需选择性DFT标记和再训练的配置。迭代循环可在无需先验机制知识的情况下系统精化动力学相关区域的势能面。应用于显式水环境中铜表面电化学CO₂还原为CO反应，该方法消除了早期模型中的非物理赝像，实现了近DFT能量和力精度，并揭示了多种动力学可及的质子化机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03737v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLPs) provide near density functional theory (DFT) accuracy at reduced computational cost, but their reliability depends on representative training data and often deteriorates in transition-state regions governing rare events. We introduce an active-learning framework in which Transition Path Sampling (TPS) serves as a targeted data-generation engine for constructing MLPs accurate in barrier regions. TPS generates ensembles of unbiased reactive trajectories, and a committee-based uncertainty estimate identifies configurations for selective DFT labeling and retraining. Iterating this cycle systematically refines the potential energy surface in dynamically relevant regions, without the need of prior knowledge of the mechanism. Applied to electrochemical CO₂ reduction to CO on copper in explicit water, the approach removes nonphysical artifacts present in early models, achieves near-DFT energy and force accuracy, and enables stable long-time sampling of reactive pathways. Extended TPS simulations reveal multiple dynamically accessible protonation mechanisms. This work establishes TPS as an efficient and principled active-learning strategy for reactive molecular simulations at electrochemical interfaces.

78

预训练模型表征作为机器学习原子间势主动学习的获取信号#

Pretrained Model Representations as Acquisition Signals for Active Learning of MLIPs
📚 arXiv👤 Eszter Varga-Umbrich, Shikha Surana, Paul Duckworth, Jules Tilly, Olivier Peltre, Zachary Weller-Davies📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将预训练MACE势的神经网络内在结构转化为可解释的获取信号，首次实现无需额外计算即可挖掘模型隐含的结构-能量认知。NTK与激活核双信号机制为反应化学MLIP的主动学习提供了物理可迁移的相
该工作提出直接从预训练MACE势导出两种获取信号——有限宽度神经正切核(NTK)与隐藏层特征激活核，用于主动学习训练反应化学MLIP。在反应化学基准测试中，两种核均优于固定描述符基线、委员会分歧及随机获取，平均减少38%能量误差和28%力误差所需数据量，且预训练模型诱导的相似性空间保留了化学有意义的结构。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出直接从预训练MACE势导出两种获取信号——有限宽度神经正切核(NTK)与隐藏层特征激活核，用于主动学习训练反应化学MLIP。在反应化学基准测试中，两种核均优于固定描述符基线、委员会分歧及随机获取，平均减少38%能量误差和28%力误差所需数据量，且预训练模型诱导的相似性空间保留了化学有意义的结构。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03964v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Training machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) for reactive chemistry is often bottlenecked by the high cost of quantum chemical labels and the scarcity of transition state configurations in candidate pools. Active learning (AL) can mitigate these costs, but its effectiveness hinges on the acquisition rule. We investigate whether the latent space of a pretrained MLIP already contains the information necessary for effective acquisition, eliminating the need for auxiliary uncertainty heads, Bayesian training and fine-tuning, or committee ensembles. We introduce two acquisition signals derived directly from a pretrained MACE potential: a finite-width neural tangent kernel (NTK) and an activation kernel built from hidden latent space features. On reactive-chemistry benchmarks, both kernels consistently outperform fixed-descriptor baselines, committee disagreement, and random acquisition, reducing the data required to reach performance targets by an average of 38% for energy error and 28% for force error. We further show that the pretrained model induces similarity spaces that preserve chemically meaningful structure and provide more reliable residual uncertainty estimates than randomly initialised or fixed-descriptor-based kernels. Our results suggest that pretraining aligns latent-space geometry with model error, yielding a practical and sufficient acquisition signal for reactive MLIP fine-tuning.

79

全球辐射反馈的近期减弱#

Recent Weakening of the Global Radiative Feedback
📚 arXiv👤 Senne Van Loon, Maria Rugenstein, Mark D. Zelinka, Timothy Andrews📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首创基于卷积神经网络的气候反馈实时估算方法，突破传统模式依赖，揭示全球辐射反馈参数λ由强负反馈向弱负反馈转变的关键转折，证实副热带东北太平洋增温的主导驱动作用，为地球气候稳定性监测提供了可操作的
该工作利用在气候模式模拟上训练的卷积神经网络，结合观测表面温度重建，估算至2025年的全球辐射反馈参数λ变化。发现λ在1990年代中期达最小值(约-3 Wm⁻²/K，最大稳定性)，此后显著减弱至约-2 Wm⁻²/K；该减弱不受ENSO或PDO显著影响。归因分析表明副热带东北太平洋增温是重要驱动因素，E3SMv2靶向实验予以确认，该方法可实现地球气候稳定性的近实时监测。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用在气候模式模拟上训练的卷积神经网络，结合观测表面温度重建，估算至2025年的全球辐射反馈参数λ变化。发现λ在1990年代中期达最小值(约-3 Wm⁻²/K，最大稳定性)，此后显著减弱至约-2 Wm⁻²/K；该减弱不受ENSO或PDO显著影响。归因分析表明副热带东北太平洋增温是重要驱动因素，E3SMv2靶向实验予以确认，该方法可实现地球气候稳定性的近实时监测。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.12515v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Earth's climate stability, characterized by the global radiative feedback parameter (łambda), varies decadally due to changing surface temperature patterns. Recent variations in łambda are poorly understood as coordinated model simulations typically end in 2014. We apply a convolutional neural network trained on climate model simulations to observation-based surface temperature reconstructions to estimate variations in łambda up to 2025. We find that łambda reached a minimum (maximum stability) around the mid 1990s (łambdasimeq -3 m̊ Wm⁻²/K), but has since weakened significantly (łambdasimeq -2, m̊ Wm⁻²/K). We confirm these results with climate model simulations extended to 2022. The recent łambda weakening is not significantly affected by El Niño Southern Oscillation or Pacific Decadal Oscillation. Attribution reveals that warming in the subtropical Northeast Pacific is an important driver of the recently weakened feedback, confirmed by targeted experiments in E3SMv2. Our approach enables near real-time monitoring of Earth's climate stability.

80

神经力场的标度律与对称性：经验证据#

Scaling Laws and Symmetry, Evidence from Neural Force Fields
📚 arXiv👤 Khang Ngo, Siamak Ravanbakhsh📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次系统量化了等变对称性对神经力场标度律的影响，揭示高阶等变表示可显著改善数据、参数与计算效率的幂律指数，证明显式编码对称性优于模型自行学习，为计算最优的大规模原子模拟提供了架构设计准则。
该工作对学习原子间势的几何任务进行实证研究，发现等变性在大规模下更为重要：等变架构利用任务对称性，在数据、参数量和计算上均呈现优于非等变模型的幂律标度，且高阶表示对应更优标度指数。分析表明计算最优训练需数据与模型规模同步增长，不应依赖模型自行发现对称性等基本归纳偏置，因其会改变任务固有难度与标度律。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对学习原子间势的几何任务进行实证研究，发现等变性在大规模下更为重要：等变架构利用任务对称性，在数据、参数量和计算上均呈现优于非等变模型的幂律标度，且高阶表示对应更优标度指数。分析表明计算最优训练需数据与模型规模同步增长，不应依赖模型自行发现对称性等基本归纳偏置，因其会改变任务固有难度与标度律。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.09768v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We present an empirical study in the geometric task of learning interatomic potentials, which shows equivariance matters even more at larger scales; we show a clear power-law scaling behaviour with respect to data, parameters and compute with ``architecture-dependent exponents''. In particular, we observe that equivariant architectures, which leverage task symmetry, scale better than non-equivariant models. Moreover, among equivariant architectures, higher-order representations translate to better scaling exponents. Our analysis also suggests that for compute-optimal training, the data and model sizes should scale in tandem regardless of the architecture. At a high level, these results suggest that, contrary to common belief, we should not leave it to the model to discover fundamental inductive biases such as symmetry, especially as we scale, because they change the inherent difficulty of the task and its scaling laws.

81

后验优先的神经偏微分方程模拟：从单场推断隐藏问题状态#

Posterior-First Neural PDE Simulation: Inferring Hidden Problem State from a Single Field
📚 arXiv👤 Wenshuo Wang, Fan Zhang📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破神经PDE模拟器"确定性坍缩"瓶颈，首创后验优先推断-条件预测范式，以贝叶斯框架恢复隐藏状态不确定性，显著提升复杂物理场预测的可靠性与精度，为科学机器学习在稀疏观测下的可信部署奠定理论基础。
针对神经PDE模拟器在部署时仅接收单一观测场、导致不同潜在问题状态坍缩为相同确定性接口而丧失预测可靠性的问题，该工作提出后验优先的神经PDE模拟框架。该框架首先推断最小任务充分问题状态的后验分布，再基于此进行条件预测。理论分析建立了贝叶斯下游价值、学习目标与确定性坍缩失效模式之间的联系，并在PDEBench任务上验证后验恢复可将集合滚动nRMSE从0.175降至0.132，闭合59.4%的直接-Oracle差距。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对神经PDE模拟器在部署时仅接收单一观测场、导致不同潜在问题状态坍缩为相同确定性接口而丧失预测可靠性的问题，该工作提出后验优先的神经PDE模拟框架。该框架首先推断最小任务充分问题状态的后验分布，再基于此进行条件预测。理论分析建立了贝叶斯下游价值、学习目标与确定性坍缩失效模式之间的联系，并在PDEBench任务上验证后验恢复可将集合滚动nRMSE从0.175降至0.132，闭合59.4%的直接-Oracle差距。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03247v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Neural PDE simulators often receive only a single observed field at deployment. In this setting, a field-to-future predictor can collapse distinct latent problem states into the same deterministic interface, losing the ambiguity needed for reliable rollout and downstream decisions. We propose posterior-first neural PDE simulation: first infer a posterior over the minimal task-sufficient problem state, then condition prediction on that posterior. The resulting theory connects the object, the learning target, and the failure mode: Bayes downstream values factor through this posterior, refinement labels make it learnable by proper scoring rules, and deterministic collapse incurs an ambiguity barrier whenever the true posterior is non-Dirac. Synthetic exact-ambiguity experiments show that point-versus-posterior gaps track the predicted barrier. On metadata-hidden PDEBench tasks, posterior recovery reduces pooled rollout nRMSE from 0.175 to 0.132, closing 59.4% of the direct-to-oracle gap. These results suggest that single-observation neural PDE simulation should be posterior-first rather than monolithic field-to-future prediction.

82

利用大语言模型发现强化学习接口#

Discovering Reinforcement Learning Interfaces with Large Language Models
📚 arXiv👤 Akshat Singh Jaswal, Ashish Baghel, Paras Chopra📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统强化学习依赖人工设计接口的瓶颈，创新性地将大语言模型的代码生成能力与进化算法结合，实现观测映射与奖励函数的联合自动发现。LIMEN框架在离散与连续控制任务中验证了联合优化的必要性，为降低
该工作研究从原始模拟器状态自动发现强化学习任务接口的问题，即同时生成观测映射和奖励函数。提出LIMEN框架，利用大语言模型引导进化算法生成可执行程序形式的候选接口，并通过策略训练反馈迭代优化。在离散网格世界和连续控制（运动与操作）领域的实验表明，仅给定轨迹级成功指标时，观测与奖励的联合进化能够发现有效接口，而单独优化任一组件至少在一个领域失效。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究从原始模拟器状态自动发现强化学习任务接口的问题，即同时生成观测映射和奖励函数。提出LIMEN框架，利用大语言模型引导进化算法生成可执行程序形式的候选接口，并通过策略训练反馈迭代优化。在离散网格世界和连续控制（运动与操作）领域的实验表明，仅给定轨迹级成功指标时，观测与奖励的联合进化能够发现有效接口，而单独优化任一组件至少在一个领域失效。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03408v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning systems rely on environment interfaces that specify observations and reward functions, yet constructing these interfaces for new tasks often requires substantial manual effort. While recent work has automated reward design using large language models (LLMs), these approaches assume fixed observations and do not address the broader challenge of synthesizing complete task interfaces. We study RL task interface discovery from raw simulator state, where both observation mappings and reward functions must be generated. We propose LIMEN (Code available at https://github.com/Lossfunk/LIMEN), a LLM guided evolutionary framework that produces candidate interfaces as executable programs and iteratively refines them using policy training feedback. Across novel discrete gridworld tasks and continuous control domains spanning locomotion and manipulation, joint evolution of observations and rewards discovers effective interfaces given only a trajectory-level success metric, while optimizing either component alone fails on at least one domain. These results demonstrate that automatic construction of RL interfaces from raw state can substantially reduce manual engineering and that observation and reward components often benefit from co-design, as single-component optimization fails catastrophically on at least one domain in our evaluation suite.

83

基于变分量子电路的量子分层强化学习#

Quantum Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning via Variational Quantum Circuits
📚 arXiv👤 Yu-Ting Lee, Samuel Yen-Chi Chen, Fu-Chieh Chang📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次将变分量子电路嵌入option-critic分层强化学习框架，系统探索了量子化特征提取、价值估计与策略决策的混合架构。核心发现是量子特征提取可在参数量缩减66%时超越经典基线，但量子选项价值
该工作开发了一种基于option-critic架构的混合分层智能体，将经典组件替换为变分量子电路，包括特征提取器、选项价值函数、终止函数和内部选项策略。在标准基准环境中的评估表明，采用量子特征提取器的混合智能体可超越经典基线，同时节省高达66%的可训练参数。研究同时识别出量子选项价值估计会严重降低性能的架构瓶颈，并通过消融实验揭示量子电路架构选择对性能的影响。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发了一种基于option-critic架构的混合分层智能体，将经典组件替换为变分量子电路，包括特征提取器、选项价值函数、终止函数和内部选项策略。在标准基准环境中的评估表明，采用量子特征提取器的混合智能体可超越经典基线，同时节省高达66%的可训练参数。研究同时识别出量子选项价值估计会严重降低性能的架构瓶颈，并通过消融实验揭示量子电路架构选择对性能的影响。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03434v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning is one of the most challenging learning paradigms where efficacy and efficiency gains are extremely valuable. Hierarchical reinforcement learning is a variant that leverages temporal abstraction to structure decision-making. While parametrized quantum computations have shown success in non-hierarchical reinforcement learning, whether these advantages adapt to hierarchical decision-making remains a critical open question. In this work, we develop a hybrid hierarchical agent based on the option-critic architecture. This hybrid agent substitutes classical components with variational quantum circuits for feature extractors, option-value functions, termination functions, and intra-option policies. Evaluated on standard benchmarking environments, results show that a hybrid agent utilizing a quantum feature extractor can outperform classical baselines while saving up to 66% trainable parameters. We also identify an architectural bottleneck that quantum option-value estimation severely degrades performance. Further ablation studies reveal how architectural choices of the quantum circuits affect performance. Our work establishes design principles for parameter-efficient hybrid hierarchical agents.

84

GRIFDIR：不规则域上函数空间的图分辨率不变有限元扩散模型#

GRIFDIR: Graph Resolution-Invariant FEM Diffusion Models in Function Spaces over Irregular Domains
📚 arXiv👤 James Rowbottom, Elizabeth L. Baker, Nick Huang, Ben Adcock, Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb, Alexander Denker📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：GRIFDIR将图卷积核参数化为有限元函数，突破傅里叶神经算子对规则网格的依赖，首次实现函数空间扩散模型在非结构化复杂几何上的分辨率不变推理，为科学计算中的多尺度、多拓扑问题生成建模提供通用框架。
该工作提出一种函数空间扩散模型的新架构，将广义图卷积核表示为有限元函数，使模型能够自然处理非结构化网格和复杂几何。针对现有基于傅里叶神经算子的骨干网络偏向规则网格、难以推广到复杂域拓扑的问题，该方法在非凸和多连通等多样几何的无条件和条件采样实验中，保持分辨率不变性并实现高保真度的功能分布捕捉。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出一种函数空间扩散模型的新架构，将广义图卷积核表示为有限元函数，使模型能够自然处理非结构化网格和复杂几何。针对现有基于傅里叶神经算子的骨干网络偏向规则网格、难以推广到复杂域拓扑的问题，该方法在非凸和多连通等多样几何的无条件和条件采样实验中，保持分辨率不变性并实现高保真度的功能分布捕捉。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03497v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Score-based diffusion models in infinite-dimensional function spaces provide a mathematically principled framework for modelling function-valued data, offering key advantages such as resolution invariance and the ability to handle irregular discretisations. However, practical implementations have struggled to fully realise these benefits. Existing backbones like Fourier neural operators are often biased towards regular grids and fail to generalise to complex domain topologies. We propose a novel architecture for function-space diffusion models that represents generalised graph convolutional kernels as finite element functions, enabling the model to naturally handle unstructured meshes and complex geometries. We demonstrate the efficacy of our network architecture through a series of unconditional and conditional sampling experiments across diverse geometries, including non-convex and multiply-connected domains. Our results show that the proposed method maintains resolution invariance and achieves high fidelity in capturing functional distributions on non-trivial geometries.

85

随机测试函数、H⁻¹范数等价性与随机变分物理信息神经网络#

Random test functions, H⁻¹ norm equivalence, and stochastic variational physics-informed neural networks
📚 arXiv👤 Diego Marcondes📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作核心创新在于建立H⁻¹范数的随机刻画：利用具有负Sobolev正则性的随机测试函数，通过期望平方赋值等价刻画对偶范数。此理论突破定义了与经典解一致的"随机弱解"，并催生了SV-PINNs方法——
该工作证明二阶线性椭圆偏微分方程弱解的对偶范数刻画中，任意泛函的H⁻¹范数等价于其关于随机测试函数分布的期望平方赋值，该分布仅依赖于区域。关键地，该随机测试函数的实现具有负Sobolev正则性，但平均后恰好恢复正确的弱拓扑。这一等价性引入"随机弱解"概念（与经典弱解一致），并推动随机变分物理信息神经网络（SV-PINNs）的发展，通过最小化PDE残差随机范数的经验近似来训练神经网络。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作证明二阶线性椭圆偏微分方程弱解的对偶范数刻画中，任意泛函的H⁻¹范数等价于其关于随机测试函数分布的期望平方赋值，该分布仅依赖于区域。关键地，该随机测试函数的实现具有负Sobolev正则性，但平均后恰好恢复正确的弱拓扑。这一等价性引入"随机弱解"概念（与经典弱解一致），并推动随机变分物理信息神经网络（SV-PINNs）的发展，通过最小化PDE残差随机范数的经验近似来训练神经网络。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03542v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The dual norm characterisation of weak solutions of second-order linear elliptic partial differential equations is mathematically natural but computationally intractable: evaluating the H⁻¹ norm of a residual requires a supremum over an infinite-dimensional function space. We prove that the H⁻¹ norm of any functional is equivalent to its expected squared evaluation against a random test function whose distribution depends only on the domain. Crucially, realisations of this random test function have negative Sobolev regularity for d ≥ 2, yet this roughness is not an obstacle: averaging over the distribution exactly recovers the correct weak topology, independently of the differential operator. This equivalence introduces the notion of stochastically weak solutions, which coincide with classical weak solutions, and motivates stochastic variational physics-informed neural networks (SV-PINNs): neural networks trained by minimising an empirical approximation of the stochastic norm of the PDE residual. Although instantiated here with neural networks as trial spaces, the underlying principle is independent of the approximation architecture and suggests a broader paradigm for numerical methods based on stochastic rather than deterministic test spaces. The framework extends naturally to higher-order elliptic, parabolic and hyperbolic equations and to abstract operator equations on Hilbert spaces. As a proof of concept, we present numerical experiments on eight challenging second-order linear elliptic problems spanning high-frequency and multi-scale solutions, indefinite operators, variable coefficients, and non-standard domains, in which SV-PINNs consistently and significantly outperform standard PINNs, recovering solutions to within one percent relative error in hundreds of L-BFGS steps.

86

贝叶斯不确定性量化中联合后验与预测分布的摊销变分推断#

Amortized Variational Inference for Joint Posterior and Predictive Distributions in Bayesian Uncertainty Quantification
📚 arXiv👤 Nan Feng, Xun Huan📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出摊销变分推断直接逼近联合后验-预测分布，通过KL散度上界与矩正则化实现离线训练、在线快速推断，突破了传统分步贝叶斯计算效率瓶颈，为固体力学等高维工程问题的不确定性传播提供了可扩展的实用框架。
该工作提出一种变分贝叶斯框架，直接目标于后验-预测分布，联合学习后验分布和相应预测分布的变分近似。通过引入Kullback-Leibler散度的变分上界和基于矩的正则化项，以摊销方式训练变分分布，将计算负担转移至离线阶段以实现高效在线推断。数值实验涵盖解析基准到有限元固体力学问题，验证了该方法在传播参数不确定性至感兴趣量方面的有效性和计算优势。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出一种变分贝叶斯框架，直接目标于后验-预测分布，联合学习后验分布和相应预测分布的变分近似。通过引入Kullback-Leibler散度的变分上界和基于矩的正则化项，以摊销方式训练变分分布，将计算负担转移至离线阶段以实现高效在线推断。数值实验涵盖解析基准到有限元固体力学问题，验证了该方法在传播参数不确定性至感兴趣量方面的有效性和计算优势。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03710v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Bayesian predictive inference propagates parameter uncertainty to quantities of interest through the posterior-predictive distribution. In practice, this is typically performed using a two-stage procedure: first approximating the posterior distribution of model parameters, and then propagating posterior samples through the predictive model via Monte Carlo simulation. This sequential workflow can be computationally demanding, particularly for high-fidelity models such as those governed by partial differential equations. We propose a variational Bayesian framework that directly targets the posterior-predictive distribution and jointly learns variational approximations of both the posterior and the corresponding predictive distribution. The formulation introduces a variational upper bound on the Kullback--Leibler divergence together with moment-based regularization terms. The variational distributions are trained in an amortized manner, shifting computational effort to an offline stage and enabling efficient online inference. Numerical experiments ranging from analytical benchmarks to a finite-element solid mechanics problem demonstrate that the proposed method achieves more accurate predictive distributions than conventional two-stage variational inference, while substantially reducing the cost of online predictive inference.

87

保守量子离线基于模型的优化#

Conservative quantum offline model-based optimization
📚 arXiv👤 Kristian Sotirov, Annie E. Paine, Savvas Varsamopoulos, Antonio A. Gentile, Osvaldo Simeone📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作针对量子极值学习中分布外输入导致的泛化风险，创新性地引入保守正则化机制，构建COM-QEL混合算法。核心贡献在于首次将保守目标模型与量子神经网络相结合，在保持量子表达优势的同时，通过离线数据驱动
该工作将量子极值学习（QEL）与保守目标模型（COM）相结合，提出混合算法COM-QEL，用于仅利用固定先验输入-输出数据、无需主动实验的离线基于模型的优化任务。通过保守正则化技术确保对分布外输入的谨慎预测，COM-QEL在保持量子神经网络表达能力的同时保障泛化安全性。基准优化任务的实证结果表明，COM-QEL相比原始QEL能够可靠地找到具有更高真实目标值的解。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作将量子极值学习（QEL）与保守目标模型（COM）相结合，提出混合算法COM-QEL，用于仅利用固定先验输入-输出数据、无需主动实验的离线基于模型的优化任务。通过保守正则化技术确保对分布外输入的谨慎预测，COM-QEL在保持量子神经网络表达能力的同时保障泛化安全性。基准优化任务的实证结果表明，COM-QEL相比原始QEL能够可靠地找到具有更高真实目标值的解。

English Abstract

arXiv:2506.19714v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Offline model-based optimization (MBO) refers to the task of optimizing a black-box objective function using only a fixed set of prior input-output data, without any active experimentation. Recent work has introduced quantum extremal learning (QEL), which leverages the expressive power of variational quantum circuits to learn accurate surrogate functions by training on a few data points. However, as widely studied in the classical machine learning literature, predictive models may incorrectly extrapolate objective values in unexplored regions, leading to the selection of overly optimistic solutions. In this paper, we propose integrating QEL with conservative objective models (COM) - a regularization technique aimed at ensuring cautious predictions on out-of-distribution inputs. The resulting hybrid algorithm, COM-QEL, builds on the expressive power of quantum neural networks while safeguarding generalization via conservative modeling. Empirical results on benchmark optimization tasks demonstrate that COM-QEL reliably finds solutions with higher true objective values compared to the original QEL, validating its superiority for offline design problems.

88

基于魔术量的量子架构搜索#

Magic-Informed Quantum Architecture Search
📚 arXiv👤 Vincenzo Lipardi, Domenica Dibenedetto, Georgios Stamoulis, Mark H. M. Winands📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出魔术量感知的量子架构搜索，创新性地将AlphaGo启发的蒙特卡洛树搜索与图神经网络结合，实现对量子电路魔术量的主动调控。该方法突破了传统QAS仅优化电路深度的局限，为量子计算中资源-精度权衡提
提出魔术量感知的量子架构搜索（QAS）技术，在电路设计框架内控制量子资源。采用AlphaGo启发的蒙特卡洛树搜索，配备图神经网络估计候选量子电路的魔术量，引导搜索朝向高或低魔术量regime。在基态能量问题和量子态近似问题上进行基准测试，实验结果表明该方法能有效影响搜索树及最终电路的魔术量，即使在图神经网络分布外实例上亦然。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

提出魔术量感知的量子架构搜索（QAS）技术，在电路设计框架内控制量子资源。采用AlphaGo启发的蒙特卡洛树搜索，配备图神经网络估计候选量子电路的魔术量，引导搜索朝向高或低魔术量regime。在基态能量问题和量子态近似问题上进行基准测试，实验结果表明该方法能有效影响搜索树及最终电路的魔术量，即使在图神经网络分布外实例上亦然。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03932v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Nonstabilizerness, commonly referred to as magic, is a fundamental resource underpinning quantum advantage. In this paper, we propose a magic-informed quantum architecture search (QAS) technique that enables control over a quantum resource within the general framework of circuit design. Inspired by the AlphaGo approach, we tackle the problem with a Monte Carlo Tree Search technique equipped with a Graph Neural Network (GNN) that estimates the magic of candidate quantum circuits. The GNN model induces a magic-based bias that steers the search toward either high- or low-magic regimes, depending on the target objective. We benchmark the proposed magic-informed QAS technique on both the structured ground-state energy problem and on the more general quantum state approximation problem, spanning different sizes and target magic levels. Experimental results show that the proposed technique effectively influences the magic across the search tree and notably also on the resulting final circuit, even in regimes where the GNN operates on out-of-distribution instances. Although introducing a problem-agnostic magic bias could, in principle, constrain the search dynamics, we observe consistent improvements in solution quality across all problems tested.

89

面向固态储氢材料的物理感知AI生态系统构建#

Building a physics-aware AI ecosystem for solid-state hydrogen storage materials
📚 arXiv👤 Seong-Hoon Jang, Yiwen Yao, Chuanyu Liu, Linda Zhang, Di Zhang, Xue Jia, Hung Ba Tran, Eric Jianfeng Cheng, Ryuhei Sato, Yusuke Ohashi, Toyoto Sato, Yusuke Hashimoto, Mark Allendorf, Nongnuch Artrith, Marcello Baricco, Andreas Borgschulte, Darren P. Broom, Ang Cao, Benjamin W. J. Chen, Lixin Chen, Ping Chen, Eun Seon Cho, Stefano Deledda, Zhao Ding, Martin Dornheim, Michael Felderhoff, Yaroslav Filinchuk, George E. Froudakis, Mingxia Gao, Thomas Gennett, Zaiping Guo, Ikutaro Hamada, Jason Hattrick-Simpers, Bjørn C. Hauback, Michael Hirscher, Torben R. Jensen, Baohua Jia, Hyoung Seop Kim, Takahiro Kondo, Kentaro Kutsukake, Xiao-Yan Li, Tongliang Liu, Piao Ma, Jianfeng Mao, Rana Mohtadi, Hyunchul Oh, Mark Paskevicius, Chris J. Pickard, Astrid Pundt, Long Qi, Anibal Ramirez-Cuesta, Hiroyuki Saitoh, Kaihang Shi, Aloysius Soon, Chenghua Sun, Chris Wolverton, Hiroshi Yabu, Weijie Yang, Zhenpeng Yao, Xuebin Yu, Jianxin Zou, Shouyi Hu, Panpan Zhou, Xi Lin, Zhigang Hu, Zhenhao Zhou, Pengfei Ou, Jiayu Peng, Shin-ichi Orimo, Hao Li📅 2026-05-06🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统"数据+AI"的孤立模式，核心创新在于构建"数据-物理-实验"三重闭环：以物理约束嵌入保证模型外推可靠性，以实验反馈驱动自适应优化，形成数字孪生驱动的自主发现范式。其意义在于为储氢材料这
氢能规模化应用受限于储氢材料在多尺度热力学、动力学及微观结构演化方面的耦合复杂性。本文提出一个统一框架，整合连贯数据基础设施、物理基础建模与AI驱动逆向设计，形成闭环发现范式。通过嵌入物理约束与实验反馈，实现自适应、物理一致的优化，为自主数字孪生赋能的储氢材料发现建立路径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

氢能规模化应用受限于储氢材料在多尺度热力学、动力学及微观结构演化方面的耦合复杂性。本文提出一个统一框架，整合连贯数据基础设施、物理基础建模与AI驱动逆向设计，形成闭环发现范式。通过嵌入物理约束与实验反馈，实现自适应、物理一致的优化，为自主数字孪生赋能的储氢材料发现建立路径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.03081v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Hydrogen storage remains a central bottleneck for scalable hydrogen energy systems due to the multiscale and coupled nature of the thermodynamics, kinetics, and microstructural evolution of hydrogen storage materials (HSMs). Although artificial intelligence (AI) has accelerated materials discovery, current approaches remain constrained by fragmented data, limited physical consistency, and weak integration with experimental validation. Here, we propose a unified framework that integrates coherent data infrastructure, physics-grounded modeling, and AI-driven inverse design within a closed-loop discovery paradigm. By embedding physical constraints and experimental feedback, this approach enables adaptive, physically consistent optimization, thereby establishing a pathway toward autonomous, digital-twin-enabled discovery of HSMs.

90
