Experiments on standard protein representation learning benchmarks demonstrate strong and competitive performance across diverse tasks, with particularly notable gains on the Fold Classification benchmark, where PRIME outperforms the strongest geometric GNN baseline by margins of 13.80 and 18.30 points on the harder Superfamily and Fold splits, and achieves a state-of-the-art accuracy of 84.10% on Reaction Class prediction, surpassing all baseline methods, including ESM. Ablation studies confirm that each structural level contributes complementary and non-redundant information, and adaptive cross-attention analysis reveals that PRIME autonomously identifies the most task-relevant structural resolutions at prediction time. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/HySonLab/PRIME

124

基于切比雪夫增强的单次迁移学习用于非线性微分方程的物理信息神经网络#

Chebyshev-Augmented One-Shot Transfer Learning for PINNs on Nonlinear Differential Equations
📚 arXiv👤 Yiqi Rao, Pavlos Protopapas📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出切比雪夫增强的单次迁移学习（Chebyshev-OTL），核心创新在于以截断切比雪夫展开将光滑弱非线性项转化为多项式形式，通过扰动分解为线性子问题，从而闭式求解最优输出权重。该框架突破了OTL
物理信息神经网络（PINNs）通过将控制方程嵌入训练目标求解微分方程，但标准PINNs需针对每个新强迫项、边界/初始条件或参数设置重新训练。单次迁移学习（OTL）通过冻结预训练潜在表示并闭式计算最优输出权重，解决了线性算子的这一瓶颈，但非线性问题因损失在输出层非凸而难以闭式适配。本文将OTL与切比雪夫多项式代理相结合，在指定解范围内用截断切比雪夫展开逼近一般光滑弱非线性项，得到可通过扰动分解为线性子问题处理的多项式非线性。多头部PIN…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

物理信息神经网络（PINNs）通过将控制方程嵌入训练目标求解微分方程，但标准PINNs需针对每个新强迫项、边界/初始条件或参数设置重新训练。单次迁移学习（OTL）通过冻结预训练潜在表示并闭式计算最优输出权重，解决了线性算子的这一瓶颈，但非线性问题因损失在输出层非凸而难以闭式适配。本文将OTL与切比雪夫多项式代理相结合，在指定解范围内用截断切比雪夫展开逼近一般光滑弱非线性项，得到可通过扰动分解为线性子问题处理的多项式非线性。多头部PINN学习主导线性算子的可复用潜在空间，测试时对新实例实现快速适配。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.01634v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) offer a flexible paradigm for solving differential equations by embedding governing laws into the training objective. A persistent limitation is instance specificity: standard PINNs typically require retraining for each new forcing term, boundary/initial condition, or parameter setting. One-shot transfer learning (OTL) addresses this bottleneck for linear operators by freezing a pretrained latent representation and computing optimal output weights in closed form, but for nonlinear problems closed-form adaptation is generally unavailable because the loss is nonconvex in the output layer. In this paper we substantially broaden the class of nonlinearities amenable to one-shot PINN transfer by combining OTL with Chebyshev polynomial surrogates. We approximate general smooth weakly nonlinear terms by truncated Chebyshev expansions over a prescribed solution range, yielding a polynomial nonlinearity that can be handled by a perturbative decomposition into linear subproblems. A multi-head PINN learns a reusable latent space associated with the dominant linear operator; at test time, solutions to new instances are obtained via a sequence of closed-form linear solves in the output layer, without retraining the network body. We provide a unified derivation of the framework for ODEs and PDEs and demonstrate accuracy and fast online adaptation on nonlinear benchmarks, including non-polynomial and singular ODE nonlinearities as well as a reaction-diffusion PDE with saturating kinetics, demonstrating the method's utility in many-query regimes.

125

面向电网优化问题的系统性泛化#

Towards Systematic Generalization for Power Grid Optimization Problems
📚 arXiv👤 Zeeshan Memon, Yijiang Li, Hongwei Jin, Kibaek Kim, Liang Zhao📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文突破现有方法孤立求解ACOPF与SCUC的局限，创新性地构建联合学习框架，以共享图网络统一表征电网物理拓扑，通过任务特定解码器适配静态与时序决策差异，并嵌入物理约束与求解器监督确保解的可行性。该工
交流最优潮流（ACOPF）和安全约束机组组合（SCUC）是电力系统运行的核心优化问题。ACOPF作为电网仿真和实时运行的物理骨架，强制非线性潮流可行性和网络约束；SCUC则是在运行和安全约束下安排发电的市场级决策过程。尽管二者共享相同输电网和物理定律，但决策变量与时序耦合方式不同，现有学习方法孤立处理，导致模型和表示割裂。本文提出联合建模ACOPF与SCUC的学习框架，通过共享图骨干网络捕捉电网拓扑与物理交互，结合面向静态和时序决策的…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

交流最优潮流（ACOPF）和安全约束机组组合（SCUC）是电力系统运行的核心优化问题。ACOPF作为电网仿真和实时运行的物理骨架，强制非线性潮流可行性和网络约束；SCUC则是在运行和安全约束下安排发电的市场级决策过程。尽管二者共享相同输电网和物理定律，但决策变量与时序耦合方式不同，现有学习方法孤立处理，导致模型和表示割裂。本文提出联合建模ACOPF与SCUC的学习框架，通过共享图骨干网络捕捉电网拓扑与物理交互，结合面向静态和时序决策的任务特定解码器；训练融入求解器监督与物理信息目标以强制AC可行性和跨时段运行约束，并评估跨未知电网拓扑的迁移泛化能力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02026v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: AC Optimal Power Flow (ACOPF) and Security-Constrained Unit Commitment (SCUC) are fundamental optimization problems in power system operations. ACOPF serves as the physical backbone of grid simulation and real-time operation, enforcing nonlinear power flow feasibility and network limits, while SCUC represents a core market-level decision process that schedules generation under operational and security constraints. Although these problems share the same underlying transmission network and physical laws, they differ in decision variables and temporal coupling, and prior learning-based approaches address them in isolation, resulting in disjoint models and representations.We propose a learning framework that jointly models ACOPF and SCUC through a shared graph-based backbone that captures grid topology and physical interactions, coupled with task-specific decoders for static and temporal decision-making. Training includes solver supervision with physics-informed objectives to enforce AC feasibility and inter-temporal operational constraints. To evaluate generalization, we assess cross-case transfer on unseen grid topologies for ACOPF and SCUC without retraining, and systematic generalization on the UC-ACOPF problem using unsupervised, physics-based objectives and a power-dispatch consensus mechanism. Experiments across multiple grid scales demonstrate improved performance and transferability relative to existing learning-based baselines, indicating that the model can support learning across heterogeneous power system optimization problems.

126

深度神经网络的几何与谱对齐 I#

Geometric and Spectral Alignment for Deep Neural Network I
📚 arXiv👤 Ziran Liu, Wei Wang, Jinhao Wang, Pengcheng Wang, Xinyi Sui, Cihan Ruan, Nam Ling, Wei Jiang📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文首次建立深度残差网络雅可比矩阵奇异谱的确定性几何理论框架，核心创新在于将Frobenius归一化层因子映射至迹归一化Cartan轨道，揭示其与Gibbs族、Fisher信息及Bures-Wasse
深度残差架构被建模为近恒等雅可比矩阵的乘积。本文证明了Frobenius归一化层因子的奇异谱的确定性商几何估计，强调归一化顶部径向Cartan坐标与拟合幂律图表。满秩因子通过A↦A^⊤A从GL(d)映射到正锥，再映射到有序特征值数据。在Frobenius归一化下，精确幂律谱形成迹归一化Cartan轨道，该轨道是秩上的Gibbs族、Fisher信息线和Bures-Wasserstein曲线。主要刚性定理为松弛感知边界不等式：界面径向幅度…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

深度残差架构被建模为近恒等雅可比矩阵的乘积。本文证明了Frobenius归一化层因子的奇异谱的确定性商几何估计，强调归一化顶部径向Cartan坐标与拟合幂律图表。满秩因子通过A↦A^⊤A从GL(d)映射到正锥，再映射到有序特征值数据。在Frobenius归一化下，精确幂律谱形成迹归一化Cartan轨道，该轨道是秩上的Gibbs族、Fisher信息线和Bures-Wasserstein曲线。主要刚性定理为松弛感知边界不等式：界面径向幅度、非回溯松弛和带符号残差变化控制拟合Cartan坐标的位移。在精确图表零松弛情形下，深度L预算给出指数为(log M)/L阶的漂移；一般情况下松弛和残差增量增强该界。本文还分离了标量顶部径向与完整Cartan谱控制，后者需要Bures/Hellinger残差变化。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02108v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deep residual architectures are modeled as products of near-identity Jacobians. This paper proves deterministic quotient-geometric estimates for singular spectra of Frobenius-normalized layer factors, emphasizing a normalized top-radial Cartan coordinate and fitted power-law chart. Full-rank factors are mapped from GL(d) to the positive cone by Amapsto A^→p A, then to ordered eigenvalue data. Under Frobenius normalization, exact power-law spectra form a trace-normalized Cartan orbit. This orbit is a Gibbs family on ranks, a Fisher information line, and a Bures--Wasserstein curve with line element d/4 times Fisher information. The main rigidity theorem is a slack-aware margin inequality: interface radial amplitude, non-backtracking slack, and signed residual variation control displacement of the fitted Cartan coordinate. In the exact-chart zero-slack case, a depth-L budget gives exponent drift of order (łog M)/L; generally, slack and residual increments augment the bound. We separate scalar top-radial from full-Cartan spectral control, which also needs Bures/Hellinger residual variation. We prove approximate-power-law and metric-chart versions, converse lower bounds, Fisher--KL/Bures action estimates, and near-identity expansions for normalized residual chains. Near-identity results verify transport budgets; chart quality remains measurable. Effective rank is a spectral-energy quantile, giving finite-width power-law tail bounds and robust rank-window transition estimates. Empirical static-weight exponent profiles serve as diagnostics; full verification also requires interface budgets, slacks, and residuals for the same operator chain.

127

LUMINA：用于AC最优潮流代理学习基准测试的电网基础模型#

LUMINA: A Grid Foundation Model for Benchmarking AC Optimal Power Flow Surrogate Learning
📚 arXiv👤 Hongwei Jin, Keunju Song, Zeeshan Memon, Yijiang Li, Stefano Fenu, Hongseok Kim, Liang Zhao, Kibaek Kim📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对ACOPF代理模型跨拓扑泛化不足的瓶颈，LUMINA-Bench构建了首个涵盖多拓扑预训练、迁移与适配的标准化评估体系，创新性地统一量化预测精度与物理约束违反度，并系统对比多种约束感知损失函数的精
交流最优潮流（ACOPF）计算昂贵，驱动了面向大规模电网分析的学习型代理模型研究，但这些代理常无法跨网络拓扑泛化，制约了在训练未见过电网上的部署和常规运行假设分析。本文提出LUMINA-Bench，一套全面的ACOPF代理学习基准套件，涵盖多拓扑预训练、迁移和适配。该基准在单拓扑和多拓扑学习设置下评估同构与异构架构，采用统一指标同时衡量预测精度与物理信息约束违反程度。此外，还比较了MSE、增广拉格朗日和基于违反的拉格朗日损失等约束感知…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

交流最优潮流（ACOPF）计算昂贵，驱动了面向大规模电网分析的学习型代理模型研究，但这些代理常无法跨网络拓扑泛化，制约了在训练未见过电网上的部署和常规运行假设分析。本文提出LUMINA-Bench，一套全面的ACOPF代理学习基准套件，涵盖多拓扑预训练、迁移和适配。该基准在单拓扑和多拓扑学习设置下评估同构与异构架构，采用统一指标同时衡量预测精度与物理信息约束违反程度。此外，还比较了MSE、增广拉格朗日和基于违反的拉格朗日损失等约束感知训练目标，以刻画不同设置下的精度-鲁棒性权衡。数据处理、训练和评估框架作为LUMINA套件开源，以支持可复现性并加速可行性感知OPF代理研究。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02133v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: AC optimal power flow (ACOPF) is foundational yet computationally expensive in power grid operations, driving learning-based surrogates for large-scale grid analysis. These surrogates, however, often fail to generalize across network topologies, a critical gap for deployment on grids not seen during training and for routine operational what-if studies. We introduce LUMINA-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark suite for ACOPF surrogate learning covering multi-topology pretraining, transfer, and adaptation. The benchmark evaluates homogeneous and heterogeneous architectures under single- and multi-topology learning settings using unified metrics that capture both predictive accuracy and physics-informed constraint violations. We additionally compare constraint-aware training objectives, including MSE, augmented Lagrangian, and violation-based Lagrangian losses, to characterize accuracy-robustness trade-offs across settings. Data processing, training, and evaluation frameworks are open-sourced as the LUMINA suite to support reproducibility and accelerate future research on feasibility-aware OPF surrogates.

128

基于高斯核注意力的无投影Transformer#

Projection-Free Transformers via Gaussian Kernel Attention
📚 arXiv👤 Debarshi Kundu, Archisman Ghosh, Swaroop Ghosh, Vasant Honavar📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文创新性地以高斯核注意力替代标准Transformer中的学习投影Q、K、V，仅保留每头带宽参数σₕ与单一输出投影，大幅降低参数量与训练成本。该工作架起了现代Transformer与经典核方法的桥梁
Transformer中的自注意力通常实现为softmax(QK^⊤/√d)V，其中Q、K、V为输入X的学习线性投影。本文质疑这些学习投影的必要性，提出以更简单基于相似度的扩散算子替代。高斯核注意力（GKA）作为点积注意力的即插即用替代，直接利用应用于每头token特征的高斯径向基函数核计算token亲和性。每头仅学习带宽参数σₕ，单一输出投影W_O保持与标准Transformer接口兼容。GKA可解释为token上的归一化核回归，将…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

Transformer中的自注意力通常实现为softmax(QK^⊤/√d)V，其中Q、K、V为输入X的学习线性投影。本文质疑这些学习投影的必要性，提出以更简单基于相似度的扩散算子替代。高斯核注意力（GKA）作为点积注意力的即插即用替代，直接利用应用于每头token特征的高斯径向基函数核计算token亲和性。每头仅学习带宽参数σₕ，单一输出投影W_O保持与标准Transformer接口兼容。GKA可解释为token上的归一化核回归，将现代Transformer架构与经典非局部滤波和核平滑方法关联。在视觉和语言建模设置中评估GKA：在nanochat框架的自回归语言建模中，通过掩码和重归一化高斯核实现因果掩码和滑动窗口约束；深度20时，GKA模型以0.42倍参数量和0.49倍训练时间达到可比性能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02144v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Self-attention in Transformers is typically implemented as softmax(QK^→p/sqrtd)V, where Q=XW_Q, K=XW_K, and V=XW_V are learned linear projections of the input X. We ask whether these learned projections are necessary, or whether they can be replaced by a simpler similarity-based diffusion operator. We introduce Gaussian Kernel Attention (GKA), a drop-in replacement for dot-product attention that computes token affinities directly using a Gaussian radial basis function (RBF) kernel applied to per-head token features. Each head learns only a bandwidth parameter σₕ, while a single output projection W_O preserves compatibility with the standard Transformer interface. GKA can be interpreted as normalized kernel regression over tokens, linking modern Transformer architectures to classical non-local filtering and kernel smoothing methods. We evaluate GKA in both vision and language modeling settings. For autoregressive language modeling within the textttnanochat framework, we implement causal masking and sliding-window constraints by masking and renormalizing the Gaussian kernel. At depth 20, a GKA model with 0.42× the parameters and 0.49× the total training FLOPs of a standard attention baseline trains stably, exhibits a near-zero train-validation gap, and demonstrates competitive behavior on standard benchmarks, albeit with higher bits-per-byte (BPB) at this compute scale. Overall, GKA provides a minimal, interpretable attention mechanism with an explicit locality scale, offering a dimension in the accuracy-efficiency trade-off for Transformer design.

129

面向参数化多物理代理的变分矩阵学习傅里叶网络#

Variational Matrix-Learning Fourier Networks for Parametric Multiphysics Surrogates
📚 arXiv👤 Xinyu Li, Jianhua Zhang, Liang Chen📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出VMLFN方法，通过对数空间正弦神经表示与变分弱形式重构，将物理信息训练转化为线性矩阵求解，仅需一阶导数即可确定输出层权重，避免了高阶自动微分和惩罚系数调参；结合启发式频率扫描实现问题自适应谱
多物理仿真对芯粒设计的系统-技术协同优化至关重要，但参数化设计探索中重复有限元求解PDE控制问题计算昂贵。本文提出变分矩阵学习傅里叶网络（VMLFN）用于高效参数化多物理代理建模。VMLFN构建对数空间正弦神经表示，具有随机采样谱频率、频率相关衰减调节和嵌入Dirichlet边界条件。固定隐藏层参数后，通过将控制PDE重构为变分弱形式并强制能量泛函驻点条件确定输出层权重，将物理信息训练转化为线性矩阵求解问题，仅需一阶导数，避免高阶自动…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

多物理仿真对芯粒设计的系统-技术协同优化至关重要，但参数化设计探索中重复有限元求解PDE控制问题计算昂贵。本文提出变分矩阵学习傅里叶网络（VMLFN）用于高效参数化多物理代理建模。VMLFN构建对数空间正弦神经表示，具有随机采样谱频率、频率相关衰减调节和嵌入Dirichlet边界条件。固定隐藏层参数后，通过将控制PDE重构为变分弱形式并强制能量泛函驻点条件确定输出层权重，将物理信息训练转化为线性矩阵求解问题，仅需一阶导数，避免高阶自动微分和惩罚系数调参。进一步引入启发式频率扫描算法选择问题自适应最大频率以覆盖目标问题主导谱范围。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02280v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multiphysics simulation is critical for system-technology co-optimization (STCO) in chiplet-based design, but repeated finite-element solutions of PDE-governed problems are computationally expensive in parametric design exploration. This paper proposes a variational matrix-learning Fourier network (VMLFN) for efficient parametric multiphysics surrogate modeling. VMLFN constructs a log-space sine neural representation with randomly sampled spectral frequencies, frequency-dependent decay regulation, and embedded Dirichlet boundary conditions. With fixed hidden-layer parameters, the output-layer weights are determined by reformulating the governing PDEs into variational weak forms and enforcing the stationarity condition of the resulting energy functional. This converts physics-informed training into a linear matrix-solving problem, requiring only first-order derivatives and avoiding both high-order automatic differentiation and penalty-coefficient tuning. A heuristic frequency-scanning algorithm is further introduced to select a problem-adaptive maximum frequency that covers the dominant spectral range of the target problem. The proposed method is validated on heat conduction, solid mechanics, and Helmholtz wave propagation problems. Results from five benchmark cases demonstrate that VMLFN delivers accurate full-field predictions with substantial speedup over conventional physics-informed neural networks and repeated finite-element simulations.

130

面向离线RLHF的高效偏好投毒攻击#

Efficient Preference Poisoning Attack on Offline RLHF
📚 arXiv👤 Chenye Yang, Weiyu Xu, Lifeng Lai📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文揭示DPO单标签翻转会诱导参数无关梯度偏移，据此将投毒攻击转化为结构化二元稀疏逼近问题，提出基于格约化与匹配追踪的两种攻击方法并给出理论保证，为离线RLHF系统的鲁棒性评估与防御设计提供了新分析框
离线人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）流程如直接偏好优化（DPO）在预收集偏好数据集上训练，易受偏好投毒攻击。本文研究针对对数线性DPO的标签翻转攻击，首先揭示翻转单个偏好标签会在DPO梯度中诱导与参数无关的偏移。利用这一关键性质，将目标投毒问题转化为结构化二元稀疏逼近问题，并开发两种攻击方法：二元感知格攻击（BAL-A）将二元翻转选择嵌入二元感知格，应用LLL约化和Babai最近平面算法，提供强制二元系数和恢复最小翻转目标的充分条件；二元…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

离线人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）流程如直接偏好优化（DPO）在预收集偏好数据集上训练，易受偏好投毒攻击。本文研究针对对数线性DPO的标签翻转攻击，首先揭示翻转单个偏好标签会在DPO梯度中诱导与参数无关的偏移。利用这一关键性质，将目标投毒问题转化为结构化二元稀疏逼近问题，并开发两种攻击方法：二元感知格攻击（BAL-A）将二元翻转选择嵌入二元感知格，应用LLL约化和Babai最近平面算法，提供强制二元系数和恢复最小翻转目标的充分条件；二元匹配追踪攻击（BMP-A）将二元匹配追踪适配于非归一化梯度字典，给出基于相干性的恢复保证和K翻转预算下的鲁棒性（不可能性）证书。在合成字典和Stanford数据集上的实验验证了攻击有效性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02495v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Offline Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) pipelines such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) train on a pre-collected preference dataset, which makes them vulnerable to preference poisoning attack. We study label flip attacks against log-linear DPO. We first illustrate that flipping one preference label induces a parameter-independent shift in the DPO gradient. Using this key property, we can then convert the targeted poisoning problem into a structured binary sparse approximation problem. To solve this problem, we develop two attack methods: Binary-Aware Lattice Attack (BAL-A) and Binary Matching Pursuit Attack (BMP-A). BAL-A embeds the binary flip selection problem into a binary-aware lattice and applies Lenstra-Lenstra-Lovász reduction and Babai's nearest plane algorithm; we provide sufficient conditions that enforce binary coefficients and recover the minimum-flip objective. BMP-A adapts binary matching pursuit to our non-normalized gradient dictionary and yields coherence-based recovery guarantees and robustness (impossibility) certificates for K-flip budgets. Experiments on synthetic dictionaries and the Stanford Human Preferences dataset validate the theory and highlight how dictionary geometry governs attack success.

131

耦合温室气候动力学状态重构与参数辨识的物理信息神经学习#

Physics-Informed Neural Learning for State Reconstruction and Parameter Identification in Coupled Greenhouse Climate Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Sani Biswas, Khursheed J. Ansari, Md. Nasim Akhtar📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将降阶物理模型嵌入PINN框架，实现温室温湿度动态重构与关键参数辨识的紧耦合求解，突破了传统方法物理一致性与数据效率难以兼顾的瓶颈，为农业设施智能环控提供了可解释、高鲁棒的数字孪生建模范
该工作提出一种耦合物理信息神经网络（PINN）方法，联合重构温室环境中的室内温度与湿度动态，并同步辨识关键模型参数。方法将降阶物理模型嵌入学习过程，在稀疏含噪观测下实现一致估计。在模拟昼夜强迫条件的合成基准上验证，耦合PINN相比纯数据驱动基线提升了温湿度重构精度。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出一种耦合物理信息神经网络（PINN）方法，联合重构温室环境中的室内温度与湿度动态，并同步辨识关键模型参数。方法将降阶物理模型嵌入学习过程，在稀疏含噪观测下实现一致估计。在模拟昼夜强迫条件的合成基准上验证，耦合PINN相比纯数据驱动基线提升了温湿度重构精度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02524v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have recently emerged as a promising framework for integrating data-driven learning with physical knowledge. In this work, we propose a coupled PINN approach for the joint reconstruction of indoor temperature and humidity dynamics in greenhouse environments, together with simultaneous identification of key model parameters. The method incorporates a reduced-order physically motivated model into the learning process, enabling consistent estimation under sparse and noisy observations. The artificial intelligence contribution lies in the development of a coupled physics-informed neural learning framework that integrates governing dynamical constraints into neural network training, while the engineering application focuses on greenhouse climate state reconstruction and parameter identification. The proposed framework is evaluated on a controlled synthetic benchmark that mimics diurnal forcing conditions. Compared with a purely data-driven neural network baseline, the coupled PINN achieves improved reconstruction accuracy, reducing temperature and humidity errors while maintaining high coefficients of determination. The improvement is particularly pronounced in the humidity channel, where latent moisture dynamics are more difficult to infer from limited measurements. In addition to accurate state reconstruction, the method successfully recovers the dominant physical parameters governing the system dynamics, demonstrating its ability to learn interpretable representations beyond data interpolation. These results highlight the potential of physics-informed learning for greenhouse climate modeling and, more broadly, for data-scarce environmental systems.

132

基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络样条局部性的超快速片上在线学习#

Ultrafast On-chip Online Learning via Spline Locality in Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
📚 arXiv👤 Duc Hoang, Aarush Gupta, Philip Harris📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将KAN的B-样条局部性转化为硬件优势：稀疏更新机制规避了反向传播的全局计算，天然适配FPGA定点运算，将在线学习延迟压缩至亚微秒量级。其核心意义在于重新定义了边缘智能的时延边界，为量子
该工作针对量子计算控制、核聚变等亚微秒级自适应需求的高频系统，利用Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KAN）的B-样条局部性实现稀疏更新，并证明其对定点量化的固有鲁棒性。在FPGA上实现定点在线训练，KAN在线学习器在低延迟与资源约束任务中显著优于多层感知机，首次实现亚微秒延迟的无模型在线学习。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对量子计算控制、核聚变等亚微秒级自适应需求的高频系统，利用Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KAN）的B-样条局部性实现稀疏更新，并证明其对定点量化的固有鲁棒性。在FPGA上实现定点在线训练，KAN在线学习器在低延迟与资源约束任务中显著优于多层感知机，首次实现亚微秒延迟的无模型在线学习。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.02056v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Ultrafast online learning is essential for high-frequency systems, such as controls for quantum computing and nuclear fusion, where adaptation must occur on sub-microsecond timescales. Meeting these requirements demands low-latency, fixed-precision computation under strict memory constraints, a regime in which conventional Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) are both inefficient and numerically unstable. We identify key properties of Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) that align with these constraints. Specifically, we show that: (i) KAN updates exploiting B-spline locality are sparse, enabling superior on-chip resource scaling, and (ii) KANs are inherently robust to fixed-point quantization. By implementing fixed-point online training on Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs), a representative platform for on-chip computation, we demonstrate that KAN-based online learners are significantly more efficient and expressive than MLPs across a range of low-latency and resource-constrained tasks. To our knowledge, this work is the first to demonstrate model-free online learning at sub-microsecond latencies.

133

从离子阱实验中学习对称保护拓扑序#

Learning symmetry-protected topological order from trapped-ion experiments
📚 arXiv👤 Nicolas Sadoune, Ivan Pogorelov, Claire L. Edmunds, Giuliano Giudici, Giacomo Giudice, Christian D. Marciniak, Martin Ringbauer, Thomas Monz, Lode Pollet📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将机器学习与量子计算实验深度融合，核心创新在于用无监督张量核方法直接从含噪实验数据中"学习"拓扑序，无需预设理论判据。其意义在于为NISQ时代量子态层析提供了可扩展的拓扑特征提取范式，并验证了对
该工作采用张量核支持向量机（TK-SVM）这一无监督方法分析离子阱量子计算机实验数据，直接识别表征对称保护拓扑（SPT）相的非平凡弦序。应用于自旋-1/2模型（团簇态）和自旋-1模型（AKLT态），利用矩阵乘积态生成跨越平凡相与SPT相的量子电路族。在基于量子比特和量子utrit的两台不同离子阱机器上实验，TK-SVM成功区分所有含噪数据集的两相。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用张量核支持向量机（TK-SVM）这一无监督方法分析离子阱量子计算机实验数据，直接识别表征对称保护拓扑（SPT）相的非平凡弦序。应用于自旋-1/2模型（团簇态）和自旋-1模型（AKLT态），利用矩阵乘积态生成跨越平凡相与SPT相的量子电路族。在基于量子比特和量子utrit的两台不同离子阱机器上实验，TK-SVM成功区分所有含噪数据集的两相。

English Abstract

arXiv:2408.05017v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Classical machine learning has proven remarkably useful in post-processing quantum data, yet typical learning algorithms often require prior training to be effective. In this work, we employ a tensorial kernel support vector machine (TK-SVM) to analyze experimental data produced by trapped-ion quantum computers. This unsupervised method benefits from directly interpretable training parameters, allowing it to identify the non-trivial string-order characterizing symmetry-protected topological (SPT) phases. We apply our technique to two examples: a spin-1/2 model and a spin-1 model, featuring the cluster state and the AKLT state as paradigmatic instances of SPT order, respectively. Using matrix product states, we generate a family of quantum circuits that host a trivial phase and an SPT phase, with a sharp phase transition between them. For the spin-1 case, we implement these circuits on two distinct trapped-ion machines based on qubits and qutrits. Our results demonstrate that the TK-SVM method successfully distinguishes the two phases across all noisy experimental datasets, highlighting its robustness and effectiveness in quantum data interpretation.

134

2026年人工智能与机器学习赋能智能制造路线图#

2026 Roadmap on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for Smart Manufacturing
📚 arXiv👤 Jay Lee, Hanqi Su, Marco Macchi, Adalberto Polenghi, Wei Wu, Zhiheng Zhao, George Q. Huang, Kiva Allgood, Devendra Jain, Benedikt Gieger, Vibhor Pandhare, Soumyabrata Bhattacharjee, Ram Mohril, Lingbao Kong, Qiyuan Wang, Xinlan Tang, Sungjong Kim, Chan Hee Park, Byeng D. Youn, Guo Dong Goh, Xi Huang, Wai Yee Yeong, Yung C Shin, He Zhang, Zitong Wang, Fei Tao, Jagjit Singh Srai, Satyandra K. Gupta, Byung Gun Joung, Albin John, John W. Sutherland, Sang Won Lee, Olga Fink, Vinay Sharma, Faez Ahmed, Wei Chen, Mark Fuge, Arild Waaler, Martin G. Skjæveland, Dimitris Kyritsis, Wei Chen, VispiNevile Karkaria, Yi-Ping Chen, Ying-Kuan Tsai, Joseph Cohen, Xun Huan, Jing Lin, Liangwei Zhang, Gregory W. Vogl, Aaron W. Cornelius, Xiaodong Jia, Dai-Yan Ji, Takanobu Minami, Ruoxin Wang📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该路线图首次系统构建AI/ML赋能智能制造的三层框架，核心创新在于将工业大数据复杂性、异构系统集成与可信AI等挑战纳入统一分析范式，为制造业数字化转型提供可操作的跨领域技术路径与优先级指引。
该路线图系统阐述AI/ML在智能制造中的基础、应用与新兴方向，分三部分：第一部分梳理AI在智能制造中演进的基础与趋势；第二部分聚焦已产生进展的关键领域，包括工业大数据分析、先进传感与感知、自主系统、增材与激光制造、数字孪生、机器人、供应链物流优化及可持续制造；第三部分探讨新兴方向。全文针对工业大数据复杂性、数据管理、异构传感控制系统集成及高 stakes工业环境中可信、可解释、可靠运行等关键挑战提供综合视角。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该路线图系统阐述AI/ML在智能制造中的基础、应用与新兴方向，分三部分：第一部分梳理AI在智能制造中演进的基础与趋势；第二部分聚焦已产生进展的关键领域，包括工业大数据分析、先进传感与感知、自主系统、增材与激光制造、数字孪生、机器人、供应链物流优化及可持续制造；第三部分探讨新兴方向。全文针对工业大数据复杂性、数据管理、异构传感控制系统集成及高 stakes工业环境中可信、可解释、可靠运行等关键挑战提供综合视角。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00839v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) is reshaping smart manufacturing by providing new capabilities for efficiency, adaptability, and autonomy across industrial value chains. However, the deployment of AI and ML in industrial settings still faces critical challenges, including the complexity of industrial big data, effective data management, integration with heterogeneous sensing and control systems, and the demand for trustworthy, explainable, and reliable operation in high-stakes industrial environments. In this roadmap, we present a comprehensive perspective on the foundations, applications, and emerging directions of AI and ML in smart manufacturing. It is structured in three parts. The first highlights the foundations and trends that frame the evolution of AI in smart manufacturing. The second focuses on key topics where AI is already enabling advances, including industrial big data analytics, advanced sensing and perception, autonomous systems, additive and laser-based manufacturing, digital twins, robotics, supply chain and logistics optimization, and sustainable manufacturing. The third section explores non-traditional ML approaches that are opening new frontiers, such as physics-informed AI, generative AI, semantic AI, advanced digital twins, explainable AI, RAMS, data-centric metrology, LLMs, and foundation models for highly connected and complex manufacturing systems. By identifying both opportunities and remaining barriers across these areas, this roadmap outlines the advances needed in methods, integration strategies, and industrial adoption. We hope this roadmap will serve as a guide for researchers, engineers, and practitioners to accelerate innovation, align academic and industrial priorities, and ensure that AI-driven smart manufacturing delivers reliable, sustainable, and scalable impact for the future of manufacturing ecosystems.

135

基于强化学习的观测器控制用于纯方位跟踪#

Reinforcement Learning Trained Observer Control for Bearings-Only Tracking
📚 arXiv👤 Branko Ristic, Sanjeev Arulampalam📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将纯方位跟踪的观测器机动问题建模为信念马尔可夫决策过程，以容积卡尔曼滤波后验表征信念状态，并设计融合欧氏距离与马氏距离的帕累托插值奖励函数，通过深度Q网络实现智能机动决策。该框架突破了传
该研究将纯方位跟踪的观测器机动问题表述为信念马尔可夫决策过程，以容积卡尔曼滤波（CKF）后验表示信念状态，设计兼顾目标位置估计误差（欧氏距离）与CKF估计一致性（马氏距离）的奖励函数，以权重因子β∈[0,1]在帕累托前沿进行几何插值。策略通过50,000回合训练的深度Q网络（DQN）实现，5,000次蒙特卡洛评估表明β=0.7的DQN策略在精度与鲁棒性间取得最佳平衡，匹配信息论基线的平均跟踪精度同时降低最坏情况误差。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究将纯方位跟踪的观测器机动问题表述为信念马尔可夫决策过程，以容积卡尔曼滤波（CKF）后验表示信念状态，设计兼顾目标位置估计误差（欧氏距离）与CKF估计一致性（马氏距离）的奖励函数，以权重因子β∈[0,1]在帕累托前沿进行几何插值。策略通过50,000回合训练的深度Q网络（DQN）实现，5,000次蒙特卡洛评估表明β=0.7的DQN策略在精度与鲁棒性间取得最佳平衡，匹配信息论基线的平均跟踪精度同时降低最坏情况误差。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.02120v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper develops a deep reinforcement learning based observer control policy for autonomous bearings-only tracking of a moving target. The observer manoeuvre problem is formulated as a belief Markov decision process, where the belief state is represented by the posterior of a cubature Kalman filter (CKF). The reward function is designed to address two conflicting objectives: minimising the absolute target position estimation error (Euclidean distance) and maintaining CKF estimation consistency (Mahalanobis distance). The reward is formulated as a geometric interpolation between the two objectives on the Pareto front, parametrised by a weighting factor β in [0,1]. The policy is implemented as a deep Q-network (DQN) trained over 50,000 episodes. Performance is evaluated over 5,000 Monte Carlo episodes and compared against two baselines: the perpendicular-to-bearing heuristic and the D-optimal Fisher information maximisation criterion. The results show that the DQN policy at β = 0.7 achieves the best trade-off between accuracy and robustness: it matches the information-theoretic baseline on mean tracking accuracy while reducing the worst-case error by nearly a factor of ten, owing to the implicit filter-consistency regularisation provided by the Mahalanobis term in the reward.

136

异质量子-经典超算跨越12,000原子壁垒：蛋白质-配体复合物的量子化学#

Crossing the 12,000-atom barrier with heterogeneous quantum-classical supercomputing: quantum chemistry of protein-ligand complexes
📚 arXiv👤 Kenneth M. Merz, Jr., Akhil Shajan, Danil Kaliakin, Fangchun Liang, Yuichi Otsuka, Tomonori Shirakawa, Lukas Broers, Han Xu, Miwako Tsuji, Mitsuhisa Sato, Seiji Yunoki, Ryo Wakizaka, Yukio Kawashima, Jun Doi, Toshinari Itoko, Hiroshi Horii, Thaddeus Pellegrini, Javier Robledo Moreno, Kevin J. Sung, Ella Fejer, Robert Walkup, Seetharami Seelam, Mario Motta📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将量子嵌入分解与异质量子-经典混合架构相结合，首次实现万原子级蛋白质-配体体系的量子化学模拟。核心创新在于通过分子片段化策略克服量子比特数量限制，并借助超算优化实现高效并行，将量子计算的
该工作开发了结合量子嵌入分子分解与异质量子-经典（HQC）方法的计算流程，模拟蛋白质-配体复合物。在两块156量子比特处理器上使用最多94量子比特、运行9200个线路超过100小时、收集13亿次测量结果；在Fugaku和Miyabi-G超算上通过优化子空间对角化实现72.5%并行效率。成功模拟了11,608和12,635原子的两个蛋白质-配体复合物，系统规模提升40倍以上，精度较先前最优水平提高达210倍，HQC片段能量匹配耦合簇CC…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发了结合量子嵌入分子分解与异质量子-经典（HQC）方法的计算流程，模拟蛋白质-配体复合物。在两块156量子比特处理器上使用最多94量子比特、运行9200个线路超过100小时、收集13亿次测量结果；在Fugaku和Miyabi-G超算上通过优化子空间对角化实现72.5%并行效率。成功模拟了11,608和12,635原子的两个蛋白质-配体复合物，系统规模提升40倍以上，精度较先前最优水平提高达210倍，HQC片段能量匹配耦合簇CCSD精度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.01138v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Ab initio wavefunction methods provide accurate molecular simulations but their computational scaling restricts applications to small systems. We develop a workflow combining quantum embedding to decompose a molecule into fragments with a heterogeneous quantum-classical (HQC) method to simulate fragments. We sample fragment electronic configurations on two 156-qubit quantum processors (ibm_cleveland, ibmₖₒbe), using up to 94 qubits, running 9,200 circuits for over 100 hours, collecting 1.3 ḑot 10⁹ measurement outcomes - the most resource-intensive HQC computation for quantum chemistry to date. We compute fragment wavefunctions via optimized subspace diagonalization on two supercomputers (Fugaku, Miyabi-G), achieving 72.5% parallel efficiency with scalable distributed linear algebra kernels. We simulate two protein-ligand complexes spanning dispersion- and electrostatics-dominated regimes (11,608 and 12,635 atoms), demonstrate >40× increase in system size and up to 210× improvement in accuracy over the previous state-of-the-art, with HQC matching coupled-cluster (CCSD) accuracy in fragment energies, and establish a scalable pathway for systematically improvable biomolecular simulations.

137

具有增强非线性光学特性的分子的多目标进化设计#

Multi-Objective Evolutionary Design of Molecules with Enhanced Nonlinear Optical Properties
📚 arXiv👤 Dominic Mashak, Jacob Schrum, S. A. Alexander📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文首次系统对比多种进化算法在多目标非线性光学分子设计中的性能，创新性地将β/γ比值、能隙与极化率窗口约束及原子化能量同时优化，以SMILES编码结合量子化学计算实现分子性质精准预测。研究为高性能NL
该工作比较了多种进化算法用于非线性光学（NLO）分子设计，针对四个竞争目标：最大化一阶与二阶超极化率比值β/γ、将HOMO-LUMO能隙和线性极化率优化至目标范围、最小化每原子能量。分子以SMILES字符串编码，用量子化学计算评估性质。研究表明NSGA-II在各目标上 consistently 获得高分，而MOME在探索广泛可能性方面表现更优，具有更高的全局超体积和MOQD分数。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作比较了多种进化算法用于非线性光学（NLO）分子设计，针对四个竞争目标：最大化一阶与二阶超极化率比值β/γ、将HOMO-LUMO能隙和线性极化率优化至目标范围、最小化每原子能量。分子以SMILES字符串编码，用量子化学计算评估性质。研究表明NSGA-II在各目标上 consistently 获得高分，而MOME在探索广泛可能性方面表现更优，具有更高的全局超体积和MOQD分数。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.16044v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Nonlinear optical (NLO) materials are essential for many photonic, telecommunication, and laser technologies, yet discovering better NLO molecules is computationally challenging due to the vast chemical space and competing objectives. We compare evolutionary algorithms for molecular design, targeting four objectives: maximizing the ratio of first-to-second hyperpolarizability (β/γ), optimizing HOMO-LUMO gap and linear polarizability to target ranges, and minimizing energy per atom. We encode molecules as SMILES strings and evaluate their properties using quantum-chemical calculations. We compare NSGA-II, MAP-Elites, MOME, a single-objective (μ+łambda) evolutionary algorithm, and simulated annealing. Quality diversity methods maintain archives across a measure space defined by atom and bond count, enabling the discovery of structurally diverse molecules. Our results demonstrate that NSGA-II consistently earns high scores in every objective, leading to high-quality molecules, but MOME does a better job exploring a wide range of possibilities, resulting in higher global hypervolume and MOQD scores. However, each method has strengths and weaknesses, and produced many promising molecules.

138

散度即不确定性：流匹配的闭式后验协方差#

Divergence is Uncertainty: A Closed-Form Posterior Covariance for Flow Matching
📚 arXiv👤 Jiarui Xing, Song Wang, Jian Wang📅 2026-05-05🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次建立流匹配速度场散度与后验协方差迹的精确闭式关系，突破传统需采样估计不确定性的范式，为预训练流模型提供免训练、免改架构的固有不确定性量化工具，对单步生成器尤其具有实时风险控制的实用价值。
该工作证明了对于任何预训练的流匹配速度场，给定当前状态的干净数据后验协方差的迹等于速度场散度的闭式表达式，仅含已知时间依赖前置因子和加性常数，称为流匹配的"散度-不确定性恒等式"。矩阵级形式同样为闭式，仅依赖速度雅可比。该恒等式精确且事后可计算，无需重新训练或修改架构即可应用于任何预训练流匹配模型；对于MeanFlow等单步生成器，同一恒等式在单次前向传播中给出精确的端到端生成不确定性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作证明了对于任何预训练的流匹配速度场，给定当前状态的干净数据后验协方差的迹等于速度场散度的闭式表达式，仅含已知时间依赖前置因子和加性常数，称为流匹配的"散度-不确定性恒等式"。矩阵级形式同样为闭式，仅依赖速度雅可比。该恒等式精确且事后可计算，无需重新训练或修改架构即可应用于任何预训练流匹配模型；对于MeanFlow等单步生成器，同一恒等式在单次前向传播中给出精确的端到端生成不确定性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00941v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Flow matching has become a leading framework for generative modeling, but quantifying the uncertainty of its samples remains an open problem. Existing approaches retrain the model with auxiliary variance heads, maintain costly ensembles, or propagate approximate covariance through many integration steps, trading off training cost, inference cost, or accuracy. We show that none of these trade-offs is necessary. We prove that, for any pre-trained flow matching velocity field, the trace of the posterior covariance over the clean data given the current state equals, in closed form, the divergence of the velocity field, up to a known time-dependent prefactor and an additive constant. We call this the emphdivergence-uncertainty identity for flow matching. The matrix-level form of the identity is similarly closed-form, depending solely on the velocity Jacobian. Because the identity is exact and post-hoc, it is computable on any pre-trained flow matching model, with no retraining and no architectural modification. For one-step generators such as MeanFlow, the same identity yields the exact end-to-end generation uncertainty in a single forward pass, eliminating the multi-step variance propagation required by all prior methods. Experiments on MNIST confirm that the resulting per-pixel uncertainty maps are semantically meaningful, concentrating on digit boundaries where inter-sample variation is highest, and that the scalar uncertainty score tracks actual prediction error, all at roughly 10,000× less total compute than ensembling or Monte Carlo dropout.

139

超越结构：通过AI驱动的合成协议-性质关系革新材料发现#

Beyond Structure: Revolutionising Materials Discovery via AI-Driven Synthesis Protocol-Property Relationships
📚 arXiv👤 Guillaume Lambard📅 2026-05-04🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破AI材料发现中"结构优先"的可合成性困境，首创以合成协议P为核心设计变量的新范式，建立P→X→y因果框架，通过生成式模型与闭环实验优化实现可执行配方的逆向设计，为自驱动实验室与绿色化学提供方
该工作针对AI驱动材料发现中结构中心范式遭遇的可合成性瓶颈，提出转向合成优先范式。核心思路将可执行的合成协议而非仅原子构型作为首要设计变量，围绕三支柱构建路线图：（i）将合成过程表示为机器可读协议，（ii）部署生成式与逆向设计模型提出可操作的反应路径和配方，（iii）整合闭环优化以针对实验现实和可持续性约束精修协议。以P→X→y的因果骨架（协议P到结构X再到性质y）为框架，阐述了方法模块、标准需求和自驱动实验室集成策略。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对AI驱动材料发现中结构中心范式遭遇的可合成性瓶颈，提出转向合成优先范式。核心思路将可执行的合成协议而非仅原子构型作为首要设计变量，围绕三支柱构建路线图：（i）将合成过程表示为机器可读协议，（ii）部署生成式与逆向设计模型提出可操作的反应路径和配方，（iii）整合闭环优化以针对实验现实和可持续性约束精修协议。以P→X→y的因果骨架（协议P到结构X再到性质y）为框架，阐述了方法模块、标准需求和自驱动实验室集成策略。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00313v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The current structure-centric paradigm in artificial intelligence (AI)-driven materials discovery, despite delivering thousands of candidate structures, is stalling at a critical barrier: the synthesizability gap. We argue that closing this gap demands a pivot to a synthesis-first paradigm in which executable synthesis protocols, not just atomic configurations, are treated as primary design variables. We outline a roadmap built on three pillars: (i) representing synthesis procedures as machine-readable protocols, (ii) deploying generative and inverse-design models to propose actionable reaction pathways and recipes, and (iii) integrating closed-loop optimisation to refine protocols against experimental realities and sustainability constraints. Framed in terms of the causal backbone P->X->y from protocol P to structure X and properties y, this perspective sets out methodological building blocks, standards needs and self-driving laboratory (SDL) integration strategies to accelerate reproducible, data-first materials discovery.

140

过冷水结构描述符的机器学习评估#

Machine learning evaluation of structural descriptors for supercooled water
📚 arXiv👤 Kohei Yoshikawa, Kokoro Shikata, Kang Kim, Nobuyuki Matubayasi📅 2026-05-04🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作以神经网络温度分类为客观判据，首次系统基准测试了16种过冷水结构描述符，突破传统人为评估的局限性；结合可解释AI揭示描述符编码局域结构的差异机制，为液体-液体相变微观机理研究提供了数据驱动的方法
该工作系统评估了16种先前提出的过冷水结构描述符。基于神经网络温度分类框架，客观检验各描述符区分过冷水温度依赖结构变化的能力，并应用可解释AI方法识别驱动模型预测的结构特征。研究揭示了不同描述符编码局域结构信息的方式，为液体水中结构描述符的基准测试建立了数据驱动框架，有助于理解四面体氢键网络与液体-液体相变关联的微观机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作系统评估了16种先前提出的过冷水结构描述符。基于神经网络温度分类框架，客观检验各描述符区分过冷水温度依赖结构变化的能力，并应用可解释AI方法识别驱动模型预测的结构特征。研究揭示了不同描述符编码局域结构信息的方式，为液体水中结构描述符的基准测试建立了数据驱动框架，有助于理解四面体氢键网络与液体-液体相变关联的微观机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00415v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The anomalous behavior of liquid water is widely associated with a liquid-liquid phase transition between high- and low-density states in the supercooled regime. At the microscopic level, tetrahedral hydrogen-bond networks govern these properties, motivating structural descriptors that characterize local molecular environments. These structural descriptors quantify features such as tetrahedral order, local density, and the separation between the first and second coordination shells; however, they have largely been proposed independently, with limited systematic comparison. Here we evaluate 16 previously proposed descriptors using a neural-network-based temperature classification framework, enabling an objective assessment of their ability to distinguish temperature-dependent structural changes in supercooled water. We further apply an explainable artificial intelligence method that identifies the structural features responsible for the model predictions. This approach reveals how different descriptors encode local structural information and establishes a data-driven framework for benchmarking structural descriptors in liquid water.

141

甲脒铅碘化物中动力学阻滞的孪晶畴态#

Kinetically Arrested Twin-Domain State in Formamidinium Lead Iodide
📚 arXiv👤 Xia Liang, Milos Dubajic, Zezhu Zeng, Yang Lu, Johan Klarbring, Samuel D. Stranks, Aron Walsh📅 2026-05-04🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统静态相图框架，首次揭示FAPbI₃中动力学阻滞的孪晶畴网络这一隐藏亚稳态，阐明浅能量势垒与有机阳离子动力学耦合是低温无序结构起源，为钙钛矿低温异常物性提供统一动力学图像，对光电器件稳定性
该工作结合大规模分子动力学与DFT精度的机器学习力场，跨介观尺度解析杂化铅卤钙钛矿的结构动力学。在FAPbI₃中识别出：高温α相具有动态局域序和关联倾斜纳米畴，有序γ相具有长程a⁺a⁺a⁺倾斜相干性，以及低于~100 K的历史依赖γ'态——由局域γ样纳米区域被锐利孪晶界分隔构成的动力学阻滞亚稳孪晶畴网络。该低温无序态并非独立体相多晶型，而是由浅倾斜能量学与FA再取向减慢共同选择，为实验观测的低温漫散射特征和展宽低能振动模式提供了统一解…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合大规模分子动力学与DFT精度的机器学习力场，跨介观尺度解析杂化铅卤钙钛矿的结构动力学。在FAPbI₃中识别出：高温α相具有动态局域序和关联倾斜纳米畴，有序γ相具有长程a⁺a⁺a⁺倾斜相干性，以及低于~100 K的历史依赖γ'态——由局域γ样纳米区域被锐利孪晶界分隔构成的动力学阻滞亚稳孪晶畴网络。该低温无序态并非独立体相多晶型，而是由浅倾斜能量学与FA再取向减慢共同选择，为实验观测的低温漫散射特征和展宽低能振动模式提供了统一解释。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00427v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Hybrid lead halide perovskites exhibit a delicate interplay between average crystallographic symmetry, local structural disorder and A-site orientational dynamics, giving rise to unusual vibrational and electronic behaviour. Here, we combine large-scale molecular dynamics with a density-functional-theory-accurate machine learning force field to resolve the structural dynamics of perovskites across mesoscopic length scales. In formamidinium lead iodide FAPbI₃, we identify a high-temperature α phase with dynamic local order and correlated tilt nanodomains, an ordered γ phase with long-range a⁺a⁺a⁺ tilt coherence, and, below sim100~K, a history-dependent γ' state consisting of locally γ-like nanoscale regions separated by sharp twin-like boundaries. This low-temperature disordered state is not a distinct bulk polymorph, but a kinetically arrested metastable twin-domain network selected by the interplay between shallow tilt energetics and slowing FA reorientation. This picture provides a consistent explanation for the low-temperature diffuse scattering features observed experimentally, and accounts for the broadened low-energy vibrational response found in the simulations. Furthermore, this unique structural landscape imprints a spatially varying electronic disorder that directly impacts macroscopic optoelectronic properties, evidenced by an anomalous increase in the Urbach energy at low temperatures. Our results reconcile the debated low-temperature behaviour of FAPbI₃ in terms of competition between ordered and arrested structural states, and show more broadly that in hybrid perovskites the organic cation can actively select the macroscopic structural and electronic response through its reorientation kinetics, placing thermal history on equal footing with composition as a determinant of structural and optoelectronic properties.

142

双原子催化剂配位工程用于全解水：恒电势第一性原理与机器学习的机理洞察#

Coordination Engineering of Dual-Atom Catalysts for Overall Water Splitting: Mechanistic Insights from Constant-Potential First-Principles and Machine Learning
📚 arXiv👤 Jiahang Li, Suhang Li, Chong Yan, Jiajun Yu, Qinzhuang Liu, Ruo-Ya Wang, Dongwei Ma📅 2026-05-04🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将恒电势密度泛函理论与机器学习相结合，建立三步筛选策略系统评估228种双原子催化剂的OER活性，突破传统恒电荷方法的电化学准确性局限；所识别的CoNi/CoCu基催化剂兼具与IrO₂相当
该工作以石墨烯负载双原子催化剂（TM1TM2-C₆₋ₓNₓ）为模型体系，探索配位工程化的双功能全解水电催化剂。通过调控C/N配位和双金属组合（Fe、Co、Ni、Cu），构建了228种结构库。结合恒电荷与恒电势密度泛函理论及质子耦合电子转移（PCET）动力学分析的三步筛选策略，识别出24种高活性候选催化剂（TM1TM2=CoNi、CoCu和Co₂），具有混合C/N配位，用于析氧反应（OER）。这些催化剂的过电位与IrO₂相当，PCET能…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作以石墨烯负载双原子催化剂（TM1TM2-C₆₋ₓNₓ）为模型体系，探索配位工程化的双功能全解水电催化剂。通过调控C/N配位和双金属组合（Fe、Co、Ni、Cu），构建了228种结构库。结合恒电荷与恒电势密度泛函理论及质子耦合电子转移（PCET）动力学分析的三步筛选策略，识别出24种高活性候选催化剂（TM1TM2=CoNi、CoCu和Co₂），具有混合C/N配位，用于析氧反应（OER）。这些催化剂的过电位与IrO₂相当，PCET能垒低于0.40 eV，详情需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00609v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The rational design of bifunctional electrocatalysts for the hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) and oxygen evolution reaction (OER) is essential for achieving efficient and cost-effective overall water splitting. Atomically dispersed transition-metal catalysts, including single-atom catalysts and dual-atom catalysts (DACs), have emerged as a prominent class of heterogeneous catalysts, in which coordination engineering plays a decisive role in tuning catalytic performance. Herein, we explore coordination-engineered bifunctional overall water splitting electrocatalysts using graphene-supported DACs (TM1TM2-C6-xNx) as model systems. By tuning C/N coordination and dual-metal combinations (Fe, Co, Ni, and Cu), a library of 228 structures was constructed. A three-step screening strategy, combining constant-charge and constant-potential density functional theory with kinetic analysis of proton-coupled electron transfer (PCET), identifies 24 highly active candidates (TM1TM2 = CoNi, CoCu and Co2) with mixed C/N coordination for OER. These catalysts exhibit overpotentials comparable to that of IrO2 and low PCET barriers (lower than 0.40 eV), among which 22 also show high HER activity. Machine learning reveals clear coordination-dependent structure-performance relationships. Such bifunctionality arises from coordination engineering that enables the simultaneous optimization of OER intermediate adsorption and the hydrogen binding strength for HER. This work establishes coordination engineering as an effective strategy for designing high-performance bifunctional dual-atom electrocatalysts for overall water splitting.

143

Born-Qualified：先进能源与电子材料自主部署框架#

Born-Qualified: An Autonomous Framework for Deploying Advanced Energy and Electronic Materials
📚 arXiv👤 Steven R. Spurgeon, Milad Abolhasani, Frederick Baddour, Ryan B. Comes, Vinayak P. Dravid, Hilary Egan, Patrick Emami, Robert W. Epps, Davi M. Fébba, Renae Gannon, E. Ashley Gaulding, Ayana Ghosh, Kenny Gruchalla, Grace Guinan, Taro Hitosugi, Michael Holden, Sergei V. Kalinin, Yangang Liang, John S. Mangum, Matthew J. Olszta, Nathaniel H. Park, Axel Palmstrom, Michelle A. Smeaton, Brooks Tellekamp, Nicholas E. Thornburg, Raymond R. Unocic, Daniela Ushizima, Rama K. Vasudevan, Robert White, Andrew Young, Andriy Zakutayev📅 2026-05-04🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该框架突破传统材料研发"实验室-产业化"脱节瓶颈，创新性地将制造约束前置为发现驱动力，通过因果建模与模块化闭环实现"设计即合格"，为加速先进能源与电子材料商业化提供可落地的系统性解决方案。
该工作针对自主科学在材料发现中面临的“死亡谷”问题——即实验室优化指标与工业可行性脱节——提出“生而合格”的自主开发新策略。该框架通过四大支柱实现：多目标指标开发、因果模型构建、模块化基础设施以及将制造环节嵌入发现循环，从源头嵌入可制造性、成本与耐久性约束。作者强调实现这一愿景需要学界持续广泛的协作投入。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对自主科学在材料发现中面临的“死亡谷”问题——即实验室优化指标与工业可行性脱节——提出“生而合格”的自主开发新策略。该框架通过四大支柱实现：多目标指标开发、因果模型构建、模块化基础设施以及将制造环节嵌入发现循环，从源头嵌入可制造性、成本与耐久性约束。作者强调实现这一愿景需要学界持续广泛的协作投入。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.00639v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autonomous science is transforming how we discover materials and chemical systems for advanced energy technologies. However, many initially promising systems never reach deployment. This "valley of death" stems from optimization that prioritizes laboratory metrics over industrial viability. We propose a new strategy: "born-qualified" autonomous development, which embeds manufacturability, cost, and durability constraints from the outset. This approach is enabled by four pillars, including the development of multi-objective metrics, causal models, a modular infrastructure, and embedding manufacturing in the discovery loop. Realizing this vision will require sustained, community-wide commitment, but the potential return on that investment is commensurate with the scale of the challenge.

144

材料电子结构数据中惊人高冗余度的低本征维度解释#

Surprisingly High Redundancy in Electronic Structure Data Across Materials Explained by Low Intrinsic Dimensionality
📚 arXiv👤 Sazzad Hossain, Ponkrshnan Thiagarajan, Shashank Pathrudkar, Stephanie Taylor, Abhijeet S. Gangan, Amartya S. Banerjee, Susanta Ghosh📅 2026-05-04🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文揭示材料电子结构数据的高冗余性源于其本征低维流形结构，提出基于覆盖度的剪枝策略，以百分之一数据量保持化学精度，为高效构建机器学习电子结构模型奠定理论基础。
机器学习电子结构模型通常依赖昂贵的Kohn-Sham密度泛函理论计算生成的大规模数据集。本文发现不同材料体系的电子结构数据存在显著冗余，根源在于数据的本征低维度特性。随机剪枝即可大幅缩减数据量而预测精度损失极小；基于覆盖度的剪枝策略更能以两个数量级的数据量保持化学精度与模型泛化性，训练时间缩短三倍以上。核心电子结构信息位于低维非线性流形上，为剪枝可行性提供了几何解释。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

机器学习电子结构模型通常依赖昂贵的Kohn-Sham密度泛函理论计算生成的大规模数据集。本文发现不同材料体系的电子结构数据存在显著冗余，根源在于数据的本征低维度特性。随机剪枝即可大幅缩减数据量而预测精度损失极小；基于覆盖度的剪枝策略更能以两个数量级的数据量保持化学精度与模型泛化性，训练时间缩短三倍以上。核心电子结构信息位于低维非线性流形上，为剪枝可行性提供了几何解释。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.09001v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Machine learning (ML) models for electronic structure typically rely on large datasets generated by computationally expensive Kohn-Sham density functional theory calculations, as it is not known a priori which portions of the data are essential for accurate learning. Here, we reveal significant redundancies in electronic structure datasets across diverse material systems and attribute them to the low intrinsic dimensionality of the underlying data. We show that even random pruning can substantially reduce dataset size with minimal degradation in predictive accuracy. Moreover, a state-of-the-art coverage-based pruning strategy that samples data across all learning difficulties preserves chemical accuracy and model generalizability while using up to two orders of magnitude less data and reducing training time by a factor of three or more. We further demonstrate that the essential electronic structure information lies on a low-dimensional, non-linear manifold, providing a geometric explanation for the observed prunability. These observations are consistent with the predominance of local atomic environments in determining electronic properties, as suggested by nearsightedness arguments, and indicate that large-scale datasets may contain highly overlapping information. Our findings challenge the prevailing assumption that such extensive datasets are necessary for accurate ML-based electronic structure predictions and open a path toward identifying minimal, representative datasets for each material class.

145

AI驱动的Alexandria数据库扩展与应用#

AI-Driven Expansion and Application of the Alexandria Database
📚 arXiv👤 Théo Cavignac (Research Center Future Energy Materials and Systems of the University Alliance Ruhr and ICAMS, Ruhr University Bochum, Bochum, Germany), Jonathan Schmidt (Department of Materials, ETH Zürich, Zürich, Switzerland), Pierre-Paul De Breuck (Research Center Future Energy Materials and Systems of the University Alliance Ruhr and ICAMS, Ruhr University Bochum, Bochum, Germany), Antoine Loew (Research Center Future Energy Materials and Systems of the University Alliance Ruhr and ICAMS, Ruhr University Bochum, Bochum, Germany), Tiago F.
